title: Membrane wrinkling model for incremental constitutive models based on a plane stress projection procedure and a dynamic relaxation method
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The plastic films of stratospheric balloon envelopes, obtained by extrusion, have anisotropic behavior which affects the appearance of wrinkles during the inflation of these balloons. The aim of this paper is to present a new membrane model, named PS-DPS-V2, which allows to simulate wrinkling phenomena of films within the framework of an incremental resolution of nonlinear constitutive laws. The “Plane Stress-Double Plane Stress” PS-DPS-V2 model is the evolution of a previous wrinkling model called PS-DPS, intended only for the isotropic material behavior. A projection technique based on the Newton–Raphson (NR) method allows control of the in-plane stress state and in-plane contraction for this type of material behavior. Based on an approach using the Almansi deformation formulation, this model is also able to simulate membrane thickness changes. Numerical instabilities due to the occurrence of wrinkles are resolved using the Dynamic Relaxation (DR) method integrating kinetic damping procedures. Results of several benchmark problems available in the literature are compared with this new wrinkling model in using two constitutive incremental models: an orthotropic elastic behavior and a non-linear hyperelasto-hysteresis model. The inflation of a square cushion composed of an anisotropic plastic film are also carried out experimentally and the formation of wrinkles on the cushion and the deformations obtained are compared with the results of the PS-DPS-V2 model. Comparisons with literature and experimental results show that the PS-DPS-V2 model is capable of accurately determining the distribution of wrinkles and stress values for orthotropic and nonlinear behavior models.
ai_text: 通过挤出成型的平流层气球囊体的塑料薄膜具有各向异性行为，这影响了气球充气过程中皱纹的出现。本文旨在提出一种新的膜模型，命名为PS-DPS-V2，该模型允许在非线性本构定律的增量求解框架内模拟薄膜的起皱现象。“平面应力-双平面应力”PS-DPS-V2模型是先前仅适用于各向同性材料行为的起皱模型PS-DPS的演进版本。基于牛顿-拉弗森（NR）方法的投影技术允许控制此类材料行为的面内应力状态和面内收缩。基于使用Almansi变形公式的方法，该模型还能够模拟膜厚度的变化。由于皱纹出现引起的数值不稳定性通过集成动能阻尼程序的动态松弛（DR）方法得到解决。使用两种本构增量模型：正交各向异性弹性行为和非线性超弹性-滞后模型，将文献中几个基准问题的结果与这种新的起皱模型进行了比较。还实验性地进行了由各向异性塑料薄膜组成的方形气垫的充气，并将气垫上皱纹的形成和获得的变形与PS-DPS-V2模型的结果进行了比较。与文献和实验结果的比较表明，PS-DPS-V2模型能够准确确定正交各向异性和非线性行为模型的皱纹分布和应力值。

title: Design and impact resistance analysis of sandwich structures with auxetic honeycomb core
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Sandwich structures are widely used in the design of impact-resistant structures and their core layers play a crucial role in enhancing the impact-resistance of the structures. To enhance the energy absorption performance of sandwich structures, new cores consisting of multilayer honeycombs with auxetic cells are proposed. The deformation and failure behavior are investigated by numerical and experimental approaches. In the process of experiment, the deformation processes of sandwich structures under drop weight impact are captured by high-speed photography. The effects of auxetic cell geometry and multilayer core configuration on energy absorption are systematically investigated. The results demonstrate that the impact resistance of the sandwich structures with auxetic honeycomb core is significantly influenced by the geometric dimensions of the honeycomb cells and the core configuration. In the parallel arrangement, the maximum energy absorption of the sandwich structure can be increased by 67.01% (4.99 kJ) through modifying the geometry and configuration of the honeycomb core. In the orthogonal arrangement, the contact force transmitted to the bottom concrete slab can be reduced by up to 87.27% (1090.86 kN) through adjusting the geometric dimensions of auxetic cells within the sandwich structure. The deformation and failure process of sandwich structures in numerical simulation are in good agreement with the experimental deformation and failure process under high-speed photography. This work provides a reliable basis for designing composite sandwich structures under impact loads.
ai_text: 夹层结构广泛应用于抗冲击结构的设计中，其芯层在增强结构的抗冲击性方面起着至关重要的作用。为了提升夹层结构的能量吸收性能，提出了由具有 auxetic 胞元的多层蜂窝组成的新型芯层。通过数值和实验方法研究了变形和失效行为。在实验过程中，通过高速摄影捕捉了夹层结构在落锤冲击下的变形过程。系统研究了 auxetic 胞元几何形状和多层芯层配置对能量吸收的影响。结果表明，具有 auxetic 蜂窝芯的夹层结构的抗冲击性显著受蜂窝胞元几何尺寸和芯层配置的影响。在平行排列中，通过修改蜂窝芯的几何形状和配置，夹层结构的最大能量吸收可提高 67.01%（4.99 kJ）。在正交排列中，通过调整夹层结构内 auxetic 胞元的几何尺寸，传递到底部混凝土板的接触力最多可降低 87.27%（1090.86 kN）。数值模拟中夹层结构的变形和失效过程与高速摄影下的实验变形和失效过程吻合良好。这项工作为设计冲击载荷下的复合夹层结构提供了可靠基础。

title: Nonlinear complementarity framework for sliding cable analysis with elastic catenary equation considering frictional nonsmoothness
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Sliding cable structures are widely present in many engineering applications, and their complex motion states and diverse mechanical behaviors make their analysis particularly challenging, especially when large sag effects and frictional interactions at cable–pulley interfaces are involved. In this paper, an efficient and robust numerical method is proposed within the nonlinear complementarity function (NCP) framework to address these challenges. The core idea is to construct an implicit cable model based on elastic catenary equations, while the frictional sliding conditions are reformulated into a set of complementarity equations using a modified Fischer–Burmeister function. The sliding length is introduced as an additional degree of freedom in the finite element formulation, enabling a consistent resolution of the strong coupling between sliding motion and frictional effects. The resulting nonlinear system is solved using the classical Newton–Raphson algorithm with a closed-form tangent matrix, ensuring computational efficiency and robustness. The proposed approach accurately captures both the nonsmooth and nonlinear characteristics of large-sag sliding cables under friction, without resorting to trial-and-error procedures for determining sliding states. Several numerical examples are presented to demonstrate the effectiveness and general applicability of the method in modeling complex sliding cable systems.
ai_text: 滑动电缆结构广泛存在于众多工程应用中，其复杂的运动状态与多样的力学行为使得对其分析尤为困难，尤其是在涉及大垂度效应及缆索-滑轮界面摩擦相互作用时。本文在非线性互补函数框架下提出了一种高效且鲁棒的数值方法以应对这些挑战。其核心思想是基于弹性悬链线方程构建隐式缆索模型，同时利用修正的Fischer–Burmeister函数将摩擦滑动条件重构为一组互补方程。在有限元公式中引入滑动长度作为附加自由度，从而能够一致地求解滑动运动与摩擦效应之间的强耦合。所得非线性系统采用经典的牛顿-拉弗森算法及闭式切线矩阵进行求解，确保了计算效率与鲁棒性。所提方法精确捕捉了摩擦作用下大垂度滑动电缆的非光滑和非线性特性，且无需通过试错过程来确定滑动状态。文中给出了若干数值算例，以证明该方法在模拟复杂滑动电缆系统时的有效性与普适性。

title: Synergistic effects of fractal order and microscale layering on the compressive response of 3D-printed architected materials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Architected materials with precisely engineered microstructures have attracted significant interest due to their high mechanical efficiency and multifunctionality. Some monolithic (single material) architectures are limited in ductility and energy absorption due to constrained stress redistribution and fail catastrophically in a brittle manner. Bioinspired multilayered designs offer an alternative paradigm by enabling distributed deformation and enhanced damage tolerance. In this work, we investigate the coupled effects of mesoscale fractal topology and microscale soft-stiff layering on the compressive response of 3D-printed fractal lattices. A design space spanning (i) fractal order (N = 1–3), (ii) soft material volume fraction, and (iii) number of layers within each cell wall is explored through quasi-static axial compression experiments complemented by calibrated finite element simulations. The results show a pronounced enhancement in energy absorption with increasing fractal order: the N = 3 lattice achieves approximately fivefold higher energy absorption than a honeycomb with the same wall thickness, attributable to the activation of localized short-wavelength buckling modes. Introducing a compliant phase markedly increases energy absorption, while the peak stress and stiffness exhibit trade-offs governed by layer thickness and interlayer constraint effects. In the traditional single-phase honeycomb, replacing 50.9% of the stiff material with an intermediate soft layer resulted in 43% increase in energy absorption. Similarly, we achieved fully ductile behavior in a fractal configuration by including a single soft layer compared to a fully brittle response of the corresponding monolithic fractal. Numerical simulations further revealed non-linear interlayer interactions that lead to a non-monotonic dependence of peak stress on layer number. Collectively, these findings establish mechanistic links between fractal topology, layering configuration, and progressive buckling. The combination of soft and stiff material offers enhanced mechanical properties for applications such as protective helmets, soft robotics, and athletic shoe soles.
ai_text: 具有精确设计微结构的架构材料因其高机械效率和多功能性而引起了广泛关注。一些整体式（单一材料）架构由于应力重分布受限，在延展性和能量吸收方面有限，并以脆性方式发生灾难性破坏。仿生多层设计通过实现分布式变形和增强损伤容限，提供了一种替代范式。在本工作中，我们研究了介观尺度分形拓扑和微观尺度软硬分层对3D打印分形晶格压缩响应的耦合效应。通过准静态轴向压缩实验和校准的有限元模拟，探索了涵盖（i）分形阶数（N = 1–3）、（ii）软材料体积分数和（iii）每个胞壁内层数的设计空间。结果表明，随着分形阶数的增加，能量吸收显著增强：N = 3的晶格比具有相同壁厚的蜂窝结构实现了约五倍高的能量吸收，这归因于局部短波长屈曲模式的激活。引入柔顺相显著增加了能量吸收，而峰值应力和刚度则表现出由层厚和层间约束效应控制的权衡。在传统的单相蜂窝结构中，用中间软层替换50.9%的硬材料，导致能量吸收增加了43%。类似地，我们通过包含单个软层，在分形配置中实现了完全延性行为，而相应的整体分形则表现出完全脆性响应。数值模拟进一步揭示了非线性层间相互作用，导致峰值应力对层数的非单调依赖性。总的来说，这些发现建立了分形拓扑、分层配置和渐进屈曲之间的机制联系。软硬材料的组合为防护头盔、软体机器人和运动鞋鞋底等应用提供了增强的机械性能。

title: Surface inertia effects on effective dynamic properties of SH-wave in unidirectional porous materials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In anti-plane dynamic boundary value problems that incorporate surface effects, the boundary conditions encompass not only surface elasticity but also surface inertia. The surface inertia is directly quantified by the parameter of surface mass density. However, due to the challenges in measuring the surface mass density and the increased complexity of boundary conditions when this parameter is introduced, most existing literature on the dynamic boundary value problems with surface effects tends to omit the surface inertia-either without explanation or with only brief justification. While this simplification facilitates problem-solving, it limits deeper investigation into the phenomenon. Moreover, recent studies have demonstrated that the surface inertia can significantly influence the dynamic mechanical behavior of structures at micro-and nano-scales. This paper investigates the effective dynamic properties of SH-wave by cylindrical porous structures with surface effects using the generalized self-consistent method. We find that the surface inertia significantly reduces both the effective SH-wave phase velocity and the effective axial shear modulus, while simultaneously enhancing the effective attenuation. This demonstrates that the surface inertia plays a non-negligible role in influencing the dynamic properties of porous structures.
ai_text: 在包含表面效应的反平面动态边界值问题中，边界条件不仅包括表面弹性，还包括表面惯性。表面惯性直接由表面质量密度参数量化。然而，由于测量表面质量密度的挑战以及引入该参数时边界条件复杂性的增加，大多数现有关于具有表面效应的动态边界值问题的文献倾向于忽略表面惯性——要么没有解释，要么只有简要的理由。虽然这种简化有助于问题求解，但它限制了对现象的深入研究。此外，最近的研究表明，表面惯性可以显著影响微米和纳米尺度结构的动态力学行为。本文使用广义自洽方法，研究了具有表面效应的圆柱形多孔结构中SH波的有效动态性质。我们发现，表面惯性显著降低了有效SH波相速度和有效轴向剪切模量，同时增强了有效衰减。这表明表面惯性在影响多孔结构的动态性质中扮演着不可忽略的角色。

title: A computationally efficient plastic substructure method for multi-scale explosion analysis
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Accurate simulation of nonlinear wave propagation in geotechnical media under largescale explosions remains a critical challenge due to the conflicting requirements of mesh resolution and computational cost. To resolve this bottleneck, this study proposes a plastic substructure method that enforces a physical and numerical decoupling between near-field detonation dynamics and far-field propagation. By incorporating an elastic transition layer into the traditional substructure framework, the method effectively isolates the internal path-dependent plastic deformation history from the equivalent load calculation. This innovation permits the truncation boundary of the refined mesh to be significantly contracted from the far-field elastic zone (approximately 120 scaled radii) to the interface of the crushed or plastic zones (approximately 40 scaled radii), thereby drastically enhancing computational efficiency. Comparative validations of 2D crack propagation and 3D wave fields confirm that the proposed method rectifies the severe distortion errors inherent in traditional approaches, capturing complex fracture patterns and nonlinear wave propagation with exceptional fidelity. The established framework offers a theoretically sound and numerically efficient solution for the nonlinear dynamic analysis of large-scale explosions in complex engineering sites under multi-scenario conditions.
ai_text: 由于网格分辨率和计算成本之间的冲突要求，大规模爆炸下岩土介质中非线性波传播的精确模拟仍然是一个关键挑战。为解决这一瓶颈，本研究提出了一种塑性子结构方法，该方法强制实现了近场爆炸动力学与远场传播之间的物理和数值解耦。通过将弹性过渡层引入传统子结构框架，该方法有效地将内部路径依赖性塑性变形历史与等效载荷计算隔离开来。这一创新允许细化网格的截断边界从远场弹性区（约120缩放半径）显著收缩至破碎区或塑性区的界面（约40缩放半径），从而大幅提高计算效率。通过2D裂纹扩展和3D波场的对比验证，证实了所提方法纠正了传统方法中固有的严重畸变误差，以极高的保真度捕捉了复杂断裂模式和非线性波传播。所建立的框架为多场景条件下复杂工程场地中大规模爆炸的非线性动力分析提供了一个理论可靠且数值高效的解决方案。

title: Exploiting graded auxeticity for tunable tension-induced out-of-plane buckling in elastic plates for shape morphing
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Plates with negative Poisson’s ratios exhibit unconventional mechanical responses; however, the stability behaviour of plates with spatially graded auxeticity remains largely unexplored. This study investigates the linear out-of-plane buckling behaviour of graded auxetic plates subjected to in-plane tensile loading. It is shown that spatial variation in Poisson’s ratio induces internal compressive stress fields under tension, which can trigger out-of-plane buckling despite the absence of externally applied compression. An analytical buckling framework is developed to quantify the critical buckling strain and associated mode shapes as functions of the auxeticity gradient. The analysis reveals that both the onset of buckling and the spatial characteristics of the buckling modes are governed by the internally generated compressive stresses arising from Poisson’s ratio mismatch. Finite element simulations of continuum and lattice-based plate models, together with experiments on additively manufactured graded auxetic sheets, are used to validate the analytical predictions. The results demonstrate that graded auxeticity provides a tunable mechanism for enabling tension-induced out-of-plane buckling, including the localization of compression, the critical strain, and the selected buckling mode. These findings establish a mechanical basis for exploiting spatial auxetic gradients to program instability-driven shape forming in latticed structures.
ai_text: 具有负泊松比的板表现出非常规的力学响应；然而，具有空间梯度拉胀性的板的稳定性行为在很大程度上仍未得到探索。本研究研究了受面内拉伸载荷作用的梯度拉胀板的面外线性屈曲行为。研究表明，泊松比的空间变化在拉伸下诱导内部压缩应力场，这可以触发面外屈曲，尽管没有外部施加的压缩。开发了一个分析屈曲框架，以量化临界屈曲应变和相关的模态形状作为拉胀梯度的函数。分析表明，屈曲的发生和屈曲模态的空间特征都由泊松比失配产生的内部压缩应力所控制。连续体和基于格子的板模型的有限元模拟，以及对增材制造的梯度拉胀薄板的实验，被用来验证分析预测。结果表明，梯度拉胀性提供了一个可调机制，用于实现拉伸诱导的面外屈曲，包括压缩的局部化、临界应变和选定的屈曲模态。这些发现为利用空间拉胀梯度来编程不稳定性驱动的形状形成在格子结构中建立了力学基础。

title: Three-dimensional analysis of fretting-fatigue problems under variable normal loading conditions: Correlation between experiments and simulations using a non-local approach
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper deals with the crack initiation life prediction in fretting-fatigue contacts subjected to complex loading conditions, by taking into account the gradient effects arising in such problems. For this purpose, a non-local modeling of the contact region is adopted. This non-local modeling relies on an analogy between contact mechanics and linear elastic fracture mechanics, and enables to take into account the gradient effects independently of the contacting bodies geometry. In this paper, the non-local model is used to predict the crack initiation lives from three-dimensional finite element simulations that are representative of fretting-fatigue experiments carried out under variable normal loading conditions. Since the normal load is time varying, the size of the contact zone changes over time. This variability in time of the contact zone size leads to spatial dispersion of the damage on the contact surface, which is accounted for in the crack initiation life prediction. In order to show the prediction capability of the non-local model, the predicted crack initiation lives are confronted to the experimental crack initiation lives. Lastly, the non-local model is directly applied to mechanical fields captured during fretting-fatigue experiments. To do so, the Digital Image Correlation (DIC) technique is used to measure the experimental mechanical fields during the experiments.
ai_text: 本文通过考虑此类问题中出现的梯度效应，处理微动疲劳接触在复杂载荷条件下的裂纹萌生寿命预测。为此，采用了接触区域的非局部建模。这种非局部建模基于接触力学与线弹性断裂力学之间的类比，并能够独立于接触体几何形状考虑梯度效应。在本文中，非局部模型用于从三维有限元模拟中预测裂纹萌生寿命，这些模拟代表了在变幅法向载荷条件下进行的微动疲劳实验。由于法向载荷随时间变化，接触区的大小也随时间变化。接触区大小的这种时间变异性导致接触表面损伤的空间分散，这在裂纹萌生寿命预测中得到了考虑。为了展示非局部模型的预测能力，将预测的裂纹萌生寿命与实验裂纹萌生寿命进行对比。最后，非局部模型直接应用于微动疲劳实验中捕获的力学场。为此，使用数字图像相关（DIC）技术来测量实验过程中的实验力学场。

title: Tailoring tensile responses of trilayer heterostructures
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: We perform uniaxial tensile tests on sandwich-like trilayer heterostructures, in which the middle layers are relatively brittle compared to the lateral layers. A variety of tensile responses are observed before the fracture of the lateral layers, including both monotonic and non-monotonic force–displacement curves. The non-monotonic one typically features a plateau region, which may be flat or fluctuating. By integrating experiments, analytical modeling, and finite element analysis, we demonstrate that the variety of tensile responses arises from the competition between interface and bulk fracture. Then, the tensile response can be tailored by rationally designing the interfacial and material properties based on our analytical solution. Moreover, our analysis reveals a significant size effect on the tensile response. Leveraging this effect, we propose a fracture engineering strategy to proactively modulate the response. For example, the increase in the number of uniformly distributed pre-cracks, which are intentionally introduced within the middle layer, can decrease the plateau length to zero and reduce the tendency of the middle layer to fracture. This process is customizable, theoretically predictable, and experimentally feasible. Furthermore, the tunable tensile response implies that the energy dissipation capability can be tailored accordingly. We anticipate that our strategies can be broadly generalized to guide the rational design of diverse heterostructures.
ai_text: 我们对三明治状三层异质结构进行单轴拉伸试验，其中中间层相对于侧层较为脆性。在侧层断裂之前，观察到多种拉伸响应，包括单调和非单调的力-位移曲线。非单调曲线通常具有一个平台区域，该区域可能是平坦的或波动的。通过结合实验、解析建模和有限元分析，我们证明了拉伸响应的多样性源于界面断裂和体断裂之间的竞争。然后，基于我们的解析解，通过合理设计界面和材料性能，可以定制拉伸响应。此外，我们的分析揭示了拉伸响应存在显著的尺寸效应。利用这一效应，我们提出了一种断裂工程策略来主动调控响应。例如，增加在中间层内有意引入的均匀分布预裂纹的数量，可以将平台长度减小到零，并降低中间层断裂的倾向。这个过程是可定制的、理论上可预测的，并且实验上可行的。此外，可调的拉伸响应意味着能量耗散能力可以相应地定制。我们预期我们的策略可以广泛推广，以指导多种异质结构的合理设计。

title: Evolving-plasticity-based forming limit prediction for magnesium alloys at elevated temperature
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In this study, the formability of magnesium alloys is predicted using a macroscopic evolving yield function at elevated temperature. At room temperature, plastic deformation in magnesium alloys is limited due to the activation of only a few slip systems; therefore, sheet forming is often performed at elevated temperatures. Owing to the complex activation of slip/twinning systems and the strong texture effects, the plastic anisotropy of magnesium alloys evolves significantly during deformation, exhibiting isotropic-distortional hardening behavior. Consequently, the formability of magnesium alloys, which strongly depends on their plastic properties, is evaluated using the Marciniak–Kuczyński (M−K) approach extended with an evolving non-quadratic yield function. The directional anisotropy of two magnesium alloys, E-form and AZ31B, is calibrated from uniaxial tension data. Their biaxial properties, which are difficult to measure experimentally, are indirectly determined from force–displacement curves of circular specimens during Nakajima tests. The results show that the forming limits of both materials are accurately predicted by the evolving Yld2000-2d model with exponent a = 8, whereas models with lower exponents or quadratic yield functions fail to match the experimental data. Furthermore, non-evolving yield functions, derived at a specific plastic work from the best-fit parameters, yields predictions that deviate from the experimental results. The proposed approach highlights the necessity of using an evolving non-quadratic yield function for accurate plasticity modeling and forming limit prediction of magnesium alloys, and introduces a concise, practical methodology applicable when experimental biaxial data are limited.
ai_text: 在本研究中，使用宏观演化屈服函数在高温下预测镁合金的成形性。在室温下，由于仅激活少数滑移系统，镁合金的塑性变形受限；因此，板材成形通常在高温下进行。由于滑移/孪生系统的复杂激活和强烈的织构效应，镁合金的塑性各向异性在变形过程中显著演化，表现出各向同性-畸变硬化行为。因此，镁合金的成形性，强烈依赖于其塑性性能，通过使用扩展的演化非二次屈服函数的Marciniak–Kuczyński (M−K)方法进行评估。两种镁合金E-form和AZ31B的方向各向异性通过单轴拉伸数据校准。它们的双轴性能，难以通过实验测量，通过Nakajima试验中圆形试样的力-位移曲线间接确定。结果表明，使用指数a = 8的演化Yld2000-2d模型可以准确预测两种材料的成形极限，而指数较低或二次屈服函数的模型无法与实验数据匹配。此外，从最佳拟合参数在特定塑性功下导出的非演化屈服函数，其预测结果与实验结果存在偏差。所提出的方法强调了使用演化非二次屈服函数对于准确塑性建模和镁合金成形极限预测的必要性，并介绍了一种简洁实用的方法，适用于实验双轴数据有限的情况。

title: Analytical solutions for critical loads, causing cylindrical-bending instability, of thick and thin plates without assumptions on through-thickness variations of displacements
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In this paper, critical loads for cylindrical-bending instability of simply supported wide plates are calculated analytically without any simplifying assumptions on the through-thickness variations of displacements, and without any limitations on the plates’ thickness-to-length ratios (for thick and thin plates). These calculations are performed for an isotropic, linearly elastic material, and are used to evaluate accuracy of critical loads produced by engineering plate theories, for large range of thickness-to-length ratios. Additionally, the obtained analytical solution is used to evaluate accuracy of critical load calculated by the MSC Nastran finite element analysis software with the use of plain strain elements.
ai_text: 本文中，对于简支宽板的圆柱弯曲失稳临界载荷，进行了解析计算，未对位移沿厚度方向的变化做任何简化假设，且未对板的厚长比（适用于厚板和薄板）施加任何限制。这些计算针对各向同性线弹性材料进行，并用于评估工程板理论产生的临界载荷的准确性，适用于大范围的厚长比。此外，所获得的解析解用于评估使用平面应变单元的 MSC Nastran 有限元分析软件计算的临界载荷的准确性。

title: A reconfigurable auxetic lattice with dual-stress plateaus for spacecraft soft-landing energy absorption
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Reusable landing systems are critical for sustainable space exploration, yet existing energy-absorbing materials often suffer from single-impact limitations and lack of adaptive mechanical response. Here, we present a three-dimensional auxetic metamaterial (3D-AMM) lattice based on strut integration and fabricated from hyperelastic thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU). This architected metamaterial combines geometric reconfiguration, persistent global auxetic effect, and repeatable energy absorption—enabling tailored cushioning for spacecraft soft landing. Through selective laser sintering and mechanical training via quasi-static cyclic loading, we stabilize their properties and test their dynamic impact performance using a drop-hammer system. Our findings reveal that individual 3D-AMM units exhibit a well-defined dual-stress plateau response, while lattices maintain auxetic behavior throughout compression. Remarkably, cyclic tests demonstrate specific energy storage retention rates of 87.7–94.7%, exceeding conventional honeycomb and auxetic structures. Under successive low-velocity impacts, the metamaterial shows reproducible energy absorption with minimal degradation, with orthogonal configurations further enhancing stress plateau stability across loading events. These results establish a framework for designing lightweight, reusable, and intelligently reconfigurable cushioning systems, offering a promising avenue for next-generation extraterrestrial landing technologies.
ai_text: 可重复使用的着陆系统对于可持续太空探索至关重要，然而现有的能量吸收材料常受限于单次冲击且缺乏自适应力学响应。本文提出了一种基于杆件集成的三维拉胀超材料（3D-AMM）晶格，采用超弹性热塑性聚氨酯（TPU）制造。这种架构超材料结合了几何可重构性、持续的全局拉胀效应和可重复的能量吸收能力，从而能够为航天器软着陆提供可定制的缓冲。通过选择性激光烧结和准静态循环加载的力学训练，我们稳定了其性能，并利用落锤系统测试了其动态冲击性能。研究结果表明，单个3D-AMM单元表现出明确的双应力平台响应，而晶格在压缩过程中始终保持拉胀行为。值得注意的是，循环测试显示其比能量储存保持率达到87.7–94.7%，超过了传统蜂窝结构和拉胀结构。在连续低速冲击下，该超材料表现出可重复的能量吸收能力且性能衰减极小，正交构型进一步增强了不同加载事件间应力平台的稳定性。这些结果为设计轻质、可重复使用且智能可重构的缓冲系统建立了框架，为下一代地外着陆技术提供了有前景的途径。

title: Plane strain problem for a moving interface crack with a contact zone in a 1D piezoelectric quasicrystal
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper considers a plane strain problem for a Yoffe-type electrically permeable crack moving at a subsonic speed along the interface of two one-dimensional hexagonal piezoelectric quasicrystals under mixed-mode mechanical loading. Using the Galilean transformation, a moving coordinate system associated with the crack tip is introduced. All required phonon, phason, and electrical parameters are expressed in this coordinate system via vector functions analytic in the entire complex plane, except for the crack region. Initially, the open crack model is analyzed, and interpenetration of the crack faces is observed at crack speeds approaching the critical crack speed, even for pure tensile loading. Therefore, the contact zone model is also considered. A combined Dirichlet–Riemann boundary value problem was formulated in this case and its exact analytical solution was presented. Transcendental equations defining the contact zone length were derived, while stresses, stress intensity factors, as well as displacement jumps along different parts of the material interface, were found analytically and presented graphically.
ai_text: 本文研究了在混合模式机械载荷下，一个Yoffe型电可渗透裂纹以亚音速沿两个一维六方压电准晶体界面移动的平面应变问题。利用伽利略变换，引入了与裂纹尖端相关的移动坐标系。所有所需的声子、相位子和电学参数在该坐标系中通过在整个复平面（除裂纹区域外）解析的向量函数表示。首先分析了开放裂纹模型，并观察到在裂纹速度接近临界裂纹速度时，即使对于纯拉伸载荷，裂纹面也会发生相互穿透。因此，也考虑了接触区模型。在这种情况下，建立了一个组合的Dirichlet–Riemann边值问题，并给出了其精确解析解。推导了定义接触区长度的超越方程，同时应力、应力强度因子以及沿材料界面不同部分的位移跳跃被解析地求出并以图形形式展示。

title: The influence of tapered cell walls on the stiffness and strength of hexagonal honeycombs under uniaxial and biaxial loading
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study highlights the potential of leveraging solid material redistribution through tapered cell walls to enhance the stiffness and strength of regular hexagonal honeycombs. The investigation includes analytical derivation of the stiffness, buckling stress, plastic strength and yield domain of honeycomb with tapered struts subjected to uniaxial, shear and biaxial in-plane loading, benchmarking them against the properties of uniform hexagonal honeycombs, to highlight the effects of linearly varying thickness in the cell walls. Furthermore, for uniaxial loading, the influence of geometric design parameters and relative density is assessed to define the dominant failure mode between elastic buckling and plastic failure and to select the optimal tapered profile among the Pareto optimal solutions that simultaneously enhance stiffness and strength. For biaxial loading, the geometry-dependent equivalent stiffness is computed including axial effects and compared with that of the uniform tapered uniaxial counterparts, while the yield domain is obtained considering different failure mechanism. Finite element analyses and experiments on polymeric and stainless steel lattices with different relative densities are carried out to validate the analytical findings. The results show how tapered struts increase the stiffness and strength of uniform honeycombs under all in-plane loading conditions assessed, except when the loading approaches equibiaxial conditions. At low relative densities undergoing elastic instabilities, the uniaxial stiffness of the uniform honeycomb can be enhanced by 40.1% without compromising the buckling strength, while above the critical relative density, the uniaxial stiffness and strength can be simultaneously increased by 61.2% and 97.7%. Similarly, it is shown that tapered honeycombs optimised for uniaxial loading can also offer an increase in shear and biaxial properties, with an increase in stiffness and expansion of the yield domain for most of stress biaxiality ratios. These gains are primarily due to increased nodal resistance and a more efficient material arrangement that follows the stress distribution, which delays the onset of failure and enhances overall structural integrity. The analytical results and the gains achievable by tapered honeycombs represent valuable insights for engineering applications requiring lightweight, high-specific stiffness and strength materials.
ai_text: 本研究强调了通过锥形胞壁重新分布固体材料以增强规则六边形蜂窝的刚度和强度的潜力。该研究包括对具有锥形支柱的蜂窝在单轴、剪切和双轴面内加载下的刚度、屈曲应力、塑性强度和屈服域进行解析推导，并以均匀六边形蜂窝的性能为基准，以突出胞壁线性变化厚度的影响。此外，对于单轴加载，评估了几何设计参数和相对密度的影响，以确定弹性屈曲和塑性失效之间的主导失效模式，并从同时增强刚度和强度的Pareto最优解中选择最优锥形轮廓。对于双轴加载，计算了包括轴向效应在内的几何相关等效刚度，并与均匀锥形单轴对应物进行比较，同时考虑不同失效机制获得屈服域。对不同相对密度的聚合物和不锈钢点阵结构进行了有限元分析和实验，以验证解析结果。结果表明，在所有评估的面内加载条件下，锥形支柱提高了均匀蜂窝的刚度和强度，除了加载接近等双轴条件时。在经历弹性失稳的低相对密度下，均匀蜂窝的单轴刚度可以提高40.1%而不损害屈曲强度，而在临界相对密度以上，单轴刚度和强度可以同时提高61.2%和97.7%。类似地，研究表明，针对单轴加载优化的锥形蜂窝也能提高剪切和双轴性能，对于大多数应力双轴比，刚度增加且屈服域扩大。这些增益主要归因于节点抗力的增加和更高效的遵循应力分布的材料排列，这延迟了失效的发生并增强了整体结构完整性。解析结果以及锥形蜂窝可实现的增益为需要轻质、高比刚度和强度材料的工程应用提供了有价值的见解。

title: A multiphysically-based micromechanical model for time-evolutionary piezoresistive behaviors of viscoelastic porous nanocomposites
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Carbon-based polymer nanocomposites have emerged as promising flexible sensing materials due to their intrinsic electrical conductivity, high sensitivity, and porous microstructures-enhanced electromechanical performance, enabling advanced applications in health monitoring and intelligent robotics. Experimentally, such piezoresistive sensors frequently exhibit pronounced resistance creep and relaxation subjected to step and cyclic loadings, thereby compromising sensing accuracy and stability. Owing to the heterogeneity of viscoelastic porous nanocomposites (VPNs), the time-dependent piezoresistivity cannot be attributed solely to the inherent viscoelasticity of polymer matrix; rather, it arises from complex microstructural factors incorporating void evolution, interfacial interactions, and nanofiller aggregation. However, the existing models are insufficient to reveal such time-dependent electromechanical mechanisms of VPNs. This work presents a multiphysically-based micromechanical model to elucidate the time-evolutionary piezoresistive behavior of VPNs. Firstly, the geometric configuration of multiwalled carbon nanotubes (MWCNTs) with interfacial interactions and percolation conductivity networks are constructed at the microscale; and then porous microstructures and non-uniform nanofiller aggregation are homogenized at the mesoscale; consequently, the macroscale effective mechanical and electrical properties of VPNs are derived based on Mori-Tanaka and Maxwell far-field methods, respectively. Besides, the post deformation temporal creep and relaxation of electrical resistance are characterized under both step and cyclic loading conditions in experiment, and further validated the proposed model using theoretical calculation and numerical simulation. Furthermore, this model explicitly describes the impacts of the evolution of void aspect ratio and porosity on electromechanical performances of VPNs, and the predicted results of the evolution trends of voids are consistent with the observed time-dependent piezoresistive behaviors. Based on the proposed model, piezoresistive accuracy and stability of VPNs-based flexible sensors can be enhanced by tailoring the viscoelasticity of polymer matrix via the four Burgers parameters. The outcome of this work can provide theoretical guidance for the optimal design of high-performance sensing composites.
ai_text: 碳基聚合物纳米复合材料因其固有的导电性、高灵敏度以及多孔微结构增强的机电性能，已成为有前景的柔性传感材料，使其在健康监测和智能机器人领域实现先进应用。实验上，此类压阻传感器在阶跃和循环载荷下常表现出显著的电阻蠕变和松弛，从而影响传感的准确性和稳定性。由于粘弹性多孔纳米复合材料（VPNs）的非均质性，其随时间变化的压阻性不能仅归因于聚合物基体的固有粘弹性；相反，它源于包含孔隙演化、界面相互作用和纳米填料聚集在内的复杂微观结构因素。然而，现有模型不足以揭示VPNs这种随时间变化的机电机制。本研究提出了一种基于跨物理场的微观力学模型，以阐明VPNs随时间演化的压阻行为。首先，在微观尺度构建了包含界面相互作用和渗流导电网络的多壁碳纳米管（MWCNTs）几何构型；随后，在细观尺度对多孔微观结构和非均匀纳米填料聚集进行了均质化处理；进而，分别基于Mori-Tanaka方法和Maxwell远场方法推导了VPNs在宏观尺度上的等效力学与电学性能。此外，实验表征了阶跃和循环载荷下电阻的变形后时间蠕变与松弛，并通过理论计算和数值模拟进一步验证了所提模型。进一步地，该模型明确描述了孔隙纵横比和孔隙率的演化对VPNs机电性能的影响，且孔隙演化趋势的预测结果与观测到的随时间变化的压阻行为一致。基于所提模型，可通过调控四个Burgers参数来调整聚合物基体的粘弹性，从而提升基于VPNs的柔性传感器的压阻准确性和稳定性。本工作成果可为高性能传感复合材料的优化设计提供理论指导。

title: Integration of numerical manifold method with second order cone programming for upper bound limit analysis
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper presents a novel numerical framework for upper bound limit analysis by integrating the numerical manifold method (NMM) with second order cone programming. By decoupling the mathematical cover from physical boundaries through its dual cover system, the NMM eliminates the need for mesh conformity, efficiently addressing complex geometries. The velocity field is discretized using shape functions constructed by combining weight functions on mathematical patches with local velocity approximations on physical patches, where the degrees of freedom serve as optimization variables. With the plastic dissipation power expressed in terms of such a kinematically admissible velocity field, the upper bound limit analysis problem is formulated as a nonlinear programming problem subject to the external work rate normalization constraint and the incompressibility condition, which is treated differently for plane stress and plane strain states. The resulting non-smooth optimization problem is further expressed as the minimization of a sum of Euclidean norms, cast as a second order cone programming problem, and solved using a primal–dual interior-point algorithm to directly obtain the limit load multiplier and the associated kinematically admissible velocity field. The strong performance of the proposed upper bound limit analysis method is validated through several benchmark examples under both plane stress and plane strain states, demonstrating its capability to effectively eliminate volumetric locking.
ai_text: 本文提出了一种将数值流形方法（NMM）与二阶锥规划相结合的上限极限分析新数值框架。通过其双重覆盖系统将数学覆盖与物理边界解耦，NMM无需网格协调性，可高效处理复杂几何形状。速度场采用由数学覆盖上的权函数与物理覆盖上的局部速度近似相结合构造的形函数进行离散，其中自由度作为优化变量。通过将塑性耗散功率以此类运动许可速度场表示，上限极限分析问题被表述为受外功率归一化约束和不可压缩条件约束的非线性规划问题，其中平面应力与平面应变状态下的不可压缩条件处理方式不同。由此产生的非光滑优化问题进一步表示为欧几里得范数之和的最小化，并转化为二阶锥规划问题，采用原始-对偶内点算法求解，直接获得极限荷载乘数及相应的运动许可速度场。通过多个平面应力和平面应变状态下的基准算例，验证了所提上限极限分析方法的优异性能，证明了其有效消除体积闭锁的能力。

title: Symplectic Hamiltonian formulation for stress and deformation in anisotropic auxetic beams
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: An energy-based symplectic Hamiltonian framework is developed to derive an exact analytical solution for stress and deformation responses of anisotropic auxetic beams. Architected auxetic materials exhibit extreme extension–shear and bending–shear couplings that fundamentally violate the kinematic assumptions underlying classical and higher-order beam theories, while purely numerical approaches obscure the governing physical mechanisms. In this study, the two-dimensional elasticity framework of a homogenized anti-tetrachiral lattice is reformulated as a canonical Hamiltonian system and solved via symplectic eigendecomposition without ad hoc kinematic assumptions or shear correction factors. The proposed formulation provides exact closed-form representations of cross-sectional warping, coupled stress redistribution, and boundary-layer decay, offering physical insights unavailable to existing beam theories. Analytical predictions show excellent agreement with high-fidelity finite element simulations across a wide range of slenderness ratios. Parametric investigations reveal two key non-classical behaviors intrinsic to auxetic architected beams: (i) chiral microstructural topology induces asymmetric stress distributions through the thickness, and (ii) orientation-dependent stiffness exhibits a boundary-condition-dependent reversal driven by coupling-induced membrane stress. The framework establishes a unified, energy-consistent, and computationally efficient analytical tool for predicting and interpreting the mechanics of anisotropic auxetic beams. It provides a rigorous theoretical foundation for geometry- and orientation-programmed stiffness tailoring and stress management in next-generation architected and metamaterial structures.
ai_text: 基于能量的辛哈密顿框架被开发出来，用于推导各向异性拉胀梁应力和变形响应的精确解析解。结构化拉胀材料表现出极端的拉伸-剪切和弯曲-剪切耦合，这从根本上违反了经典和高阶梁理论背后的运动学假设，而纯数值方法则掩盖了主导物理机制。在本研究中，均匀化反四手性晶格的二维弹性框架被重新表述为一个正则哈密顿系统，并通过辛特征分解求解，无需特设的运动学假设或剪切修正因子。所提出的框架提供了截面翘曲、耦合应力重分布和边界层衰减的精确闭式表示，提供了现有梁理论无法获得的物理见解。解析预测与高保真有限元模拟在广泛的长细比范围内表现出极好的一致性。参数研究揭示了拉胀结构化梁固有的两个关键非经典行为：(i) 手性微结构拓扑诱导沿厚度方向的不对称应力分布，以及 (ii) 取向依赖性刚度表现出由耦合诱导膜应力驱动的边界条件依赖性反转。该框架建立了一个统一、能量一致且计算高效的解析工具，用于预测和解释各向异性拉胀梁的力学行为。它为下一代结构化和超材料结构中的几何和取向编程刚度定制及应力管理提供了严格的理论基础。

title: Porous bionic nested tubular structures of luffa sponge with orthogonal gradient auxetic layers: design and energy absorption characteristics
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Lightweight luffa sponge with nested tubular morphology shows promising in energy absorption enhancement. However, its structural extreme complexity hinders the development of manufacturable bio-inspired structures, requiring concise modelling. In this study, a novel nested bio-inspired tubular (NBT) structure, driven from the orthogonal and gradient fiber distributions on the inner and outer walls of luffa sponge and core support system, is designed and fabricated by additive manufacturing. The reentrant configurations are integrated into the inner and outer layers of NBT in axial and hoop directions for their tunable anisotropic mechanical properties. The energy absorption mechanism of NBT is systematically investigated by compressive experiments and validated finite element (FE) models. A comprehensive comparison is conducted between the present NBT and its constituent parts, as well as NBTs with different designs to provide optimal design principle. Further, the influences of key geometric parameters of the optimal NBT design are explored, including the number of connecting ribs, the porosity difference of the inner and outer layers, and the interesting gradient porosity. The results demonstrate that axial gradient design boosts energy absorption efficiency by 44% compared to the uniform structure. The findings provide a valuable foundation for designing and optimizing advanced energy-absorbing tubular structures for protective engineering applications
ai_text: 具有嵌套管状形态的轻质丝瓜海绵在能量吸收增强方面显示出潜力。然而，其结构的极端复杂性阻碍了可制造仿生结构的发展，需要简洁的建模。在本研究中，受丝瓜海绵内外壁和核心支撑系统的正交和梯度纤维分布启发，设计并通过增材制造制备了一种新型嵌套仿生管状（NBT）结构。凹角结构被集成到NBT的内层和外层，沿轴向和环向，以实现可调的各向异性力学性能。通过压缩实验和验证的有限元（FE）模型，系统研究了NBT的能量吸收机制。对当前NBT及其组成部分，以及不同设计的NBT进行了全面比较，以提供最优设计原则。进一步，探索了最优NBT设计的关键几何参数的影响，包括连接肋的数量、内外层的孔隙率差异以及有趣的梯度孔隙率。结果表明，与均匀结构相比，轴向梯度设计将能量吸收效率提高了44%。这些发现为设计和优化用于防护工程应用的先进能量吸收管状结构提供了宝贵基础。

title: Constitutive modeling of rubber-like materials based on insights from molecular dynamics simulations
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: A major challenge in developing accurate and reliable constitutive models for soft materials is understanding and characterizing the relationship between microstructure and macroscopic mechanical behavior. In this work, coarse-grained molecular dynamics simulations of natural rubber are performed to investigate this relationship. The affine model is critically examined, the fluctuation range of molecular chains is quantified using the envelope surface of molecular trajectories, and the shape and characteristics of force transmission along the primitive paths are analyzed using the average trajectories of each chain. Three key insights have been obtained: (1) many crosslink constraints in equilibrium states can be effectively regarded as entanglement constraints; (2) Although individual chain strands deviate significantly from affine deformation, there are longer chain paths under nearly uniform force that are appropriately described by the affine model; and (3) the fluctuation range of molecular chains remains nearly constant during deformation. Based on these findings, a novel curved affine tube model is proposed to describe the mechanical response between two macroscopic points in such materials. The constitutive model in terms of stretch ratios is analyzed, leading to the formulation of two new elastic models. Validation against experimental data demonstrates that both models exhibit high accuracy and reliability. This study provides a deeper understanding and a corresponding expression of the correlation between elasticity and microstructure in soft materials, offering valuable guidance for the design of high-performance materials.
ai_text: 开发准确可靠的软材料本构模型的一个主要挑战是理解和表征微观结构与宏观力学行为之间的关系。在这项工作中，对天然橡胶进行了粗粒度分子动力学模拟以研究这种关系。对仿射模型进行了批判性检验，使用分子轨迹的包络表面量化了分子链的波动范围，并使用每条链的平均轨迹分析了沿原始路径的力传递形状和特性。获得了三个关键见解：(1) 平衡状态下的许多交联约束可以有效地视为缠结约束；(2) 尽管单个链段显著偏离仿射变形，但在近乎均匀的力作用下，存在更长的链路径，这些路径可以由仿射模型适当描述；(3) 分子链的波动范围在变形过程中几乎保持恒定。基于这些发现，提出了一种新的弯曲仿射管模型来描述此类材料中两个宏观点之间的力学响应。分析了以拉伸比表示的本构模型，从而制定了两个新的弹性模型。与实验数据的验证表明，这两个模型都表现出高准确性和可靠性。这项研究提供了对软材料中弹性与微观结构之间相关性的更深入理解和相应表达，为高性能材料的设计提供了有价值的指导。

title: An analytical-driven multiscale modeling method for the mode I fracture behavior of fiber-reinforced cementitious composites
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Although various cross-scale models have been developed for fiber-reinforced cementitious composites (FRCCs), achieving a balance between physical fidelity and computational efficiency remains challenging. To address this, this study establishes a multi-scale modelling method driven by microscopic interfacial mechanics analytical theories. It develops a multi‑stage progressive analytical model covering interfacial shear stress, fiber pull‑out, crack bridging, and component tension, while quantitatively characterizing cross‑scale mechanical behavior under mild to moderate corrosion conditions through the introduction of corrosion coefficients. On this basis, a theory‑driven numerical method is proposed: utilizing derived analytical solutions for the single fiber pull‑out to define the nonlinear connector elements in ABAQUS. With a self‑developed three‑dimensional stochastic fiber generation algorithm, automated construction of finite element models for FRCC components is achieved. This research quantitatively captures the evolutionary modulation laws of corrosion coefficients χ and η c on fiber pull‑out load and macroscopic tensile stress. The proposed numerical method accurately reproduces the complex influence of fiber inclination, correctly reflecting the non-monotonic evolution of peak loads caused by snubbing and matrix spalling. Furthermore, the failure modes of fibers are investigated, further demonstrating the regulatory effects of yield strength on such failure behavior. Experimental validation via a dog-bone specimen confirms the model’s robustness and efficiency in reproducing concurrent fiber debonding and fracture. This study introduces a generalizable computational modeling method for the high-fidelity analysis of complex FRCC systems.
ai_text: 尽管已经为纤维增强水泥基复合材料（FRCCs）开发了多种跨尺度模型，但在物理保真度和计算效率之间取得平衡仍然具有挑战性。为此，本研究建立了一种由微观界面力学解析理论驱动的多尺度建模方法。它开发了一个多阶段渐进解析模型，涵盖界面剪切应力、纤维拔出、裂纹桥接和构件拉伸，同时通过引入腐蚀系数，定量表征了在轻度至中度腐蚀条件下的跨尺度力学行为。在此基础上，提出了一种理论驱动的数值方法：利用推导出的单纤维拔出解析解来定义 ABAQUS 中的非线性连接器单元。通过自主开发的三维随机纤维生成算法，实现了 FRCC 构件有限元模型的自动构建。本研究定量捕捉了腐蚀系数 χ 和 η c 对纤维拔出荷载和宏观拉伸应力的演化调制规律。所提出的数值方法准确再现了纤维倾斜的复杂影响，正确反映了由纤维弯折和基体剥落引起的峰值荷载的非单调演化。此外，研究了纤维的失效模式，进一步证明了屈服强度对此类失效行为的调控作用。通过狗骨试样的实验验证，证实了该模型在再现纤维同时脱粘和断裂方面的鲁棒性和效率。本研究引入了一种可推广的计算建模方法，用于复杂 FRCC 系统的高保真分析。

title: Elastodynamic pinhole diffraction by finite interfaces: A semi-analytical framework for directional beaming and inverse source localization
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study develops a semi-analytical solution for the scattering of shear horizontal (SH) waves by two elastic half-spaces connected through a finite interface. The resulting mixed boundary value problem is resolved using a domain decomposition strategy and Fourier-Bessel wave function expansions. By strictly enforcing displacement and traction continuity across the interface, the expansion coefficients are determined and subsequently validated against independent finite element simulations. Physical analysis demonstrates that the finite interface functions as an elastodynamic analogue to an optical pinhole. The spatial profile of the transmitted beam is governed by the interplay between low-frequency diffraction and high-frequency near-field interference, yielding an optimal dimensionless frequency that minimizes beam divergence. Based on this directional transmission, an inverse localization scheme is formulated to identify unknown wave sources in the upper half-space using exclusively transmitted field data. Computational results confirm that the source coordinates are effectively retrieved via peak tracking, provided the incidence configuration avoids extreme grazing angles where edge diffraction induces systematic deflection. This work establishes a theoretical basis for utilizing finite interface scattering as a mechanism for inverse source characterization.
ai_text: 本研究针对通过有限界面连接的两个弹性半空间中剪切水平（SH）波的散射，提出了一种半解析解。利用区域分解策略和傅里叶-贝塞尔波函数展开，解决了由此产生的混合边值问题。通过严格强制界面上的位移和牵引连续性，确定了展开系数，并随后通过独立的有限元模拟进行了验证。物理分析表明，该有限界面起到了弹性动力学中类似于光学针孔的作用。透射光束的空间分布受低频衍射和高频近场干涉之间的相互作用控制，从而产生一个最小化光束发散的最优无量纲频率。基于这种定向传输，制定了一种反演定位方案，仅利用透射场数据来识别上半空间中的未知波源。计算结果表明，只要入射配置避免边缘衍射引起系统偏转的极端掠射角，通过峰值跟踪就能有效反演源坐标。这项工作为利用有限界面散射作为反演源表征机制奠定了理论基础。

title: Modal properties of guided waves in waveguides embedded in an infinite poroelastic media using SAFE-PML method
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Elastic wave propagating in fluid or solid embedded in infinite poroelastic media can provide critical information about geometry and physical properties, making it an important research topic in non-destructive testing, structural health monitoring, and geophysical exploration. While analytical methods can provide theoretical analysis, they are limited to simple geometries. Equivalent methods can handle complex structures but neglect the interaction between the pore fluid and solid skeleton, thereby losing essential physical information of poroelastic media. To overcome these challenges, this paper proposes a semi-analytical finite element (SAFE) method combined with perfectly matched layer (PML) to compute guided wave propagation characteristics in fluid or solid embedded in infinite poroelastic media. The SAFE-PML method is applied to two representative cases: a fluid-filled borehole and a steel pipe embedded in infinite poroelastic formation. Compared with analytical methods and equivalent methods, the proposed method can analyze the guided wave dispersion characteristics in fluid or solid with arbitrary cross section embedded in infinite poroelastic media, without loss of critical physical information
ai_text: 在无限多孔弹性介质中嵌入的流体或固体中传播的弹性波可以提供关于几何和物理性质的关键信息，使其成为无损检测、结构健康监测和地球物理勘探中的重要研究课题。虽然解析方法可以提供理论分析，但它们仅限于简单几何形状。等效方法可以处理复杂结构，但忽略了孔隙流体与固体骨架之间的相互作用，从而丢失了多孔弹性介质的关键物理信息。为了克服这些挑战，本文提出了一种半解析有限元（SAFE）方法与完全匹配层（PML）相结合的方法，用于计算在无限多孔弹性介质中嵌入的流体或固体中的导波传播特性。SAFE-PML 方法应用于两个代表性案例：一个充满流体的钻孔和一个嵌入无限多孔弹性地层中的钢管。与解析方法和等效方法相比，所提出的方法可以分析在无限多孔弹性介质中嵌入的任意横截面流体或固体中的导波频散特性，而不丢失关键物理信息。

title: Effect of roller cylindricity error on the stress distribution in multi-layered coatings
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Analytical studies on the mechanical behavior of multilayer coating systems have generally focused on ideal geometric profiles; however, tolerances arising from manufacturing processes inevitably lead to cylindricity errors. This study aims to fill this gap in the literature by presenting a comprehensive numerical framework that investigates the effect of realistic geometric defects, based on the ISO 12297–1 standard, on mechanical performance. The analyses are performed using an efficient semi-analytical model based on Papkovich-Neuber potentials. The results revealed a critical “stress locking” mechanism in single-layer stiff coatings. Contrary to general expectations, thickening the stiff coating has not improved performance; instead, it has confined the maximum stress to the interface due to the abrupt change in stiffness. The proposed 10-layer gradually transitioning architecture to overcome this structural constraint reduced the von Mises stress by 20% compared to the single-layer reference model in the most critical error class (Grade G5). More importantly, the gradual stiffness transition (stiffness smoothing) shifted the stress peak away from the interface into the coating, homogenizing the load sharing. This study demonstrates that, in realistic conditions with manufacturing errors, material and thickness selection are not sufficient to mitigate failure risks; the layer architecture must also be tailored.
ai_text: 对多层涂层系统力学行为的分析研究通常集中于理想几何轮廓；然而，制造过程中产生的公差不可避免地导致圆柱度误差。本研究旨在填补文献中的这一空白，通过提出一个全面的数值框架，基于 ISO 12297–1 标准，研究实际几何缺陷对力学性能的影响。分析采用基于 Papkovich-Neuber 势的高效半解析模型进行。结果揭示了单层硬涂层中一个关键的“应力锁定”机制。与普遍预期相反，增厚硬涂层并未改善性能；相反，由于刚度的突变，最大应力被限制在界面处。为克服这一结构约束，提出的10层渐变过渡结构在最关键的误差等级（G5 等级）中，与单层参考模型相比，将 von Mises 应力降低了20%。更重要的是，渐变的刚度过渡（刚度平滑）将应力峰值从界面处移入涂层内部，均匀化了载荷分配。本研究表明，在存在制造误差的实际条件下，材料和厚度的选择不足以减轻失效风险；层结构也必须进行定制。

title: Thermo-mechanically coupled constitutive model for glassy polymers over a wide range of strains and rates
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The behavior of glassy polymers, which is characterized by temperature-, rate-, time-, and stress-state dependence, remains to be fully elucidated. Existing constitutive theories have modelled this phenomenon with varying degrees of success. To date, no universally accepted theory fully and accurately describes the coupled thermo-mechanical response of glassy polymers over a wide temperature range, encompassing low to high strain rates, various time scales, including transient and long-term processes, and arbitrary deformation levels. To address these requirements, a fully thermodynamically coupled constitutive theory is formulated within a comprehensive kinematic and thermodynamic framework. To analyze the macroscopic behavior, three distinct microscopic entanglement structures are introduced into glassy polymers: transient entanglements, slidable entanglements, and permanent entanglements. The effects of external stimuli on the synergy, structural stability, and evolution of these entanglements are investigated, facilitating further elucidation of their disparate roles in regulating the profoundly intricate nonlinear macroscopic properties. By comparing the simulations with the macroscopic features of polycarbonate (PC) and polymethyl methacrylate (PMMA) under different external environments and various stress states, it not only verifies the effectiveness of the new theory in predicting the thermodynamically coupled under different temperatures and deformation rates, but also highlights its comprehensiveness and accuracy in describing time-related behaviors such as creep, stress relaxation, strain recovery, and highly nonlinear under arbitrary deformation.
ai_text: 玻璃态聚合物的行为，其特征表现为温度、速率、时间和应力状态的依赖性，尚未被完全阐明。现有的本构理论以不同程度的成功模拟了这种现象。迄今为止，尚无普遍接受的理论能够全面而准确地描述玻璃态聚合物在宽温度范围内、涵盖低到高应变率、各种时间尺度（包括瞬态和长期过程）以及任意变形水平下的耦合热机械响应。为满足这些要求，在一个综合的运动学和热力学框架内，构建了一个完全热力学耦合的本构理论。为分析宏观行为，在玻璃态聚合物中引入了三种不同的微观缠结结构：瞬态缠结、可滑动缠结和永久缠结。研究了外部刺激对这些缠结的协同作用、结构稳定性和演化的影响，从而有助于进一步阐明它们在调节极其复杂的非线性宏观特性中的不同作用。通过将模拟结果与聚碳酸酯（PC）和聚甲基丙烯酸甲酯（PMMA）在不同外部环境和各种应力状态下的宏观特征进行比较，不仅验证了新理论在预测不同温度和变形率下热力学耦合响应的有效性，还突出了其在描述时间相关行为（如蠕变、应力松弛、应变恢复）以及任意变形下的高度非线性方面的全面性和准确性。

title: Strengthening the transition zone of an additively manufactured hybrid TPMS structure for bone scaffold applications
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Hybrid TPMS structures can effectively mimic the heterogeneous morphology of human bone and are suitable candidates for scaffold applications. However, their use is limited by the weak transition zone and multidirectional loading in vivo. In this study, skeletal TPMS structures have been fabricated with stainless steel (SS316L) using laser powder bed fusion (LPBF). Compressive behaviors of two uniform TPMS; gyroid and diamond, and their hybrid configuration were examined. More than 97% reduction in effective stiffness was achieved by introducing 60% architected porosity in the bulk material. The structural dependence of local deformation was analyzed through digital image correlation (DIC). The transition zone of the hybrid TPMS structure was strengthened by tuning a mathematical sigmoid function that controls the transition steepness and shape of the transition. The loading direction had a significant effect on the compliance of the structure. More than 50% variation in effective stiffness was observed when the loading orientation was changed in the orthogonal direction. For a vertically hybridized TPMS, higher transition steepness resulted in more uniform local deformation behavior. The biocompatibility and osteoconductivity of the scaffolds were evaluated in vitro. All the scaffold groups have shown good cell proliferation and osteogenic potential on their surfaces. A novel methodology was proposed to tailor the transition parameters such that a hybrid TPMS scaffold behaves like a uniform one under physiological loading. The onset of stress concentration at the hybrid zone can be delayed by tailoring the transition parameters accordingly. The design strategy can be utilized to reduce stress shielding and stimulate uniform bone ingrowth inside a hybrid TPMS scaffold.
ai_text: 混合TPMS结构能有效模拟人骨的异质形态，是支架应用的合适候选。然而，其应用受到弱过渡区和体内多向加载的限制。在本研究中，使用激光粉末床熔融（LPBF）技术以不锈钢（SS316L）制备了骨架TPMS结构。研究了两种均匀TPMS结构（gyroid和diamond）及其混合配置的压缩行为。通过在基体材料中引入60%的架构孔隙率，实现了有效刚度降低超过97%。通过数字图像相关（DIC）分析了局部变形的结构依赖性。通过调整控制过渡陡度和形状的数学sigmoid函数，加强了混合TPMS结构的过渡区。加载方向对结构的柔度有显著影响。当加载方向在正交方向改变时，观察到有效刚度变化超过50%。对于垂直混合的TPMS，更高的过渡陡度导致更均匀的局部变形行为。在体外评估了支架的生物相容性和骨传导性。所有支架组在其表面均显示出良好的细胞增殖和成骨潜力。提出了一种新方法来定制过渡参数，使得混合TPMS支架在生理加载下表现得像均匀结构。通过相应调整过渡参数，可以延迟混合区应力集中的发生。该设计策略可用于减少应力屏蔽并刺激混合TPMS支架内均匀的骨长入。

title: Rate-dependent electro-mechanical deformation of nematic liquid crystal elastomers
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Theoretical modeling and numerical implementation of electro-viscoelastic interactions at finite strains of dielectric nematic Liquid Crystal Elastomers (LCE) are presented, capturing key phenomena such as Maxwell stress, director rotation, nonlinear deformations, the electric Fréedericksz transition, and energy dissipation. By combining continuum mechanics with Maxwell’s equations, governing equations for dielectric nematic LCEs are systematically derived via the principle of virtual power. The resulting thermodynamically consistent constitutive relations provide a relevant description of the coupled electro-mechanical and rate-dependent viscoelastic response, thereby enabling a reliable prediction of the material’s physical behavior. In addition to the electro-mechanical model, evolution equations for the viscous part of the deformation gradient are formulated using an internal variable approach, capturing the time-dependent dissipation characteristic of a generalized Maxwell’s rheological model. These equations are integrated using a fully implicit backward Euler scheme to ensure numerical stability and accuracy. Various deformation modes arising during the Fréedericksz transition are investigated, with particular attention to uniform expansion and thinning in the thickness direction as well as bending actuation observed in bi-layer samples. A fundamentally different actuation mode is demonstrated for bi-layer nematic LCE actuators, where reorganization of internal microstructures under an electric field enables two-sided actuation. Furthermore, electro-mechanical bulk instabilities such as buckling, arising from the combined effects of the Fréedericksz transition and Maxwell stresses, are analyzed. Special attention is given to rate-dependent behavior by demonstrating the effect of the electric potential ramp rate on deformation and on the emergence of buckling instabilities. Compared to classical dielectric elastomers, this behavior represents a more advanced mechanism with significant potential for next-generation active and soft robotic devices. Finally, the numerical simulations capturing the viscoelastic response are validated against experimental results from the literature to assess the accuracy and reliability of the proposed finite deformation model.
ai_text: 本文提出了有限应变下介电向列相液晶弹性体电-粘弹性相互作用的理论建模与数值实现，捕捉了麦克斯韦应力、指向矢旋转、非线性变形、电弗雷德里克兹转变及能量耗散等关键现象。通过将连续介质力学与麦克斯韦方程组相结合，基于虚功率原理系统地推导了介电向列相液晶弹性体的控制方程。所得热力学一致的本构关系恰当地描述了耦合的电-力学响应及率相关的粘弹性响应，从而能够可靠预测材料的物理行为。除了电-力学模型外，还采用内变量方法建立了变形梯度粘性部分的演化方程，捕捉了广义麦克斯韦流变模型的时间相关耗散特性。这些方程采用全隐式向后欧拉格式进行积分，以确保数值稳定性与精度。研究了弗雷德里克兹转变过程中产生的各种变形模式，特别关注厚度方向的均匀膨胀与减薄，以及在双层样品中观察到的弯曲驱动。研究证明，双层向列相液晶弹性体驱动器存在一种根本不同的驱动模式，即电场作用下内部微结构的重组实现了双侧驱动。此外，分析了由弗雷德里克兹转变和麦克斯韦应力共同作用引起的电-力学体失稳，例如屈曲。通过展示电势斜坡加载速率对变形及屈曲失稳出现的影响，特别关注了率相关行为。与经典介电弹性体相比，此行为代表了一种更先进的机制，对下一代主动式软体机器人器件具有重要潜力。最后，通过文献中的实验结果验证了捕捉粘弹性响应的数值模拟，以评估所提出的有限变形模型的准确性与可靠性。

title: Prestress-induced vibration, mode-shape evolution, and stability of circular cylindrical shells
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The influence of combined radial pressure and axial compression on the vibration characteristics, circumferential mode shapes, and stability of thin-walled circular cylindrical shells is investigated within a consistent Flügge–Lur’e–Byrne shell formulation. The governing equations are linearized about a prestressed equilibrium configuration, enabling a unified treatment of vibration and buckling within a single eigenvalue framework. The study demonstrates that radial and axial prestresses affect shell dynamics through fundamentally different physical mechanisms. Radial pressure induces pronounced stiffness softening accompanied by significant distortion of circumferential mode shapes, whereas axial compression primarily modifies natural frequency magnitudes with comparatively minor influence on modal distributions. To capture these effects, a semi-analytical differential transform method (DTM) is employed, which enables direct construction of continuous two-dimensional circumferential mode shapes for prescribed circumferential wave numbers, without spatial discretization and while retaining full displacement coupling. This capability allows systematic tracking of mode-shape evolution under increasing prestress, revealing features that cannot be inferred from frequency variation alone. The onset of instability is identified by the vanishing of the lowest natural frequency, providing a physically transparent criterion for determining critical buckling loads under both radial and axial prestresses. The predicted vibration characteristics, mode shapes, and buckling loads show excellent agreement with established analytical and numerical results. The findings provide new mechanics-based insight into prestress-induced vibration–stability interactions in cylindrical shells and are directly relevant to the design and stability assessment of thin-walled shell structures.
ai_text: 在一致的 Flügge–Lur’e–Byrne 壳理论公式框架内，研究了径向压力和轴向压缩共同作用对薄壁圆柱壳振动特性、周向模态形状及稳定性的影响。控制方程在预应力平衡构型附近线性化，使得振动和屈曲能在单一特征值框架内统一处理。研究表明，径向和轴向预应力通过根本不同的物理机制影响壳动力学。径向压力引起显著的刚度软化，并伴随周向模态形状的明显畸变；而轴向压缩主要改变固有频率幅值，对模态分布的影响相对较小。为捕捉这些效应，采用了一种半解析微分变换法（DTM），该方法能够直接构建指定周向波数的连续二维周向模态形状，无需空间离散化，同时保留完整的位移耦合。这种能力允许系统追踪预应力增加下的模态形状演化，揭示仅从频率变化无法推断的特征。不稳定性的起始通过最低固有频率的消失来识别，为确定径向和轴向预应力下的临界屈曲载荷提供了一个物理上透明的准则。预测的振动特性、模态形状和屈曲载荷与已有的解析和数值结果吻合良好。这些发现为圆柱壳中预应力诱导的振动-稳定性相互作用提供了新的力学见解，并直接关系到薄壁壳结构的设计和稳定性评估。

title: Optimal design of elastoplastic columns against global buckling
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper investigates the optimal design of self-similar columns that maximise elastoplastic global buckling load-bearing capacity for a given material volume and height. Although many classical solutions have been proposed, most neglect elastoplastic behaviour or focus on specific column types, thereby limiting their practical relevance and generality. In this study, the problem is revisited using modern numerical computational techniques. The optimal axial area distribution that maximises the global elastoplastic buckling load is first explored using Bayesian Optimisation. The column’s load-bearing capacity is evaluated through high-fidelity ABAQUS simulations that incorporate geometric and material nonlinearities, as well as initial imperfections. The Bayesian Optimisation framework efficiently guides the simulations towards near–global-optimal designs. The resulting optimal solutions inspire a heuristic design principle, termed the Edge Uniform Stress Design, which states that an optimal column is characterised by the simultaneous yielding of the compressed outer fibres across all cross-sections at the ultimate state. Based on this principle, the optimal column shape can be directly constructed for any given cross-section and normalised slenderness ratio. Compared with a uniform column, the improvement achieved by the optimal design increases with the normalised slenderness ratio, approaching an upper limit of approximately 34%.
ai_text: 本文研究了在给定材料体积与高度下，最大化弹塑性整体屈曲承载能力的自相似柱体的优化设计。尽管已有许多经典解决方案被提出，但大多忽略了弹塑性行为或仅关注特定柱体类型，从而限制了其实际相关性与普适性。在本研究中，我们利用现代数值计算技术重新审视了该问题。首先通过贝叶斯优化探索了最大化整体弹塑性屈曲载荷的最优轴向面积分布。柱体的承载能力通过高保真度的ABAQUS模拟进行评估，该模拟综合考虑了几何与材料非线性以及初始缺陷。贝叶斯优化框架有效地引导模拟趋近于全局最优设计。所得最优解启发了一个启发式设计原则，称为边缘均匀应力设计，该原则指出：最优柱体的特征是在极限状态下，所有横截面上受压的外缘纤维同时达到屈服。基于这一原则，对于任意给定的横截面形状与归一化长细比，均可直接构造出最优柱体形状。与均匀截面柱体相比，优化设计带来的承载能力提升随归一化长细比的增大而增加，并趋近于约34%的上限。

title: Homogenized anisotropic micromechanical modeling and cyclic mechanical response of fiber network flexible composites
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Fiber networks are widely used in soft-tissue repair owing to their excellent flexibility, breathability, moisture permeability, and structural versatility. During wound healing, they integrate with native tissue to form fiber network flexible composites (FNFCs), whose anisotropic cyclic stress softening and residual deformation critically influence therapeutic outcomes. However, previous studies have primarily focused on the theoretical models of flexible composites with simple fiber architectures, which are inadequate for capturing the cyclic mechanical behavior of FNFCs with highly complex mesostructures and hyper-visco-pseudoelastic properties. To address this limitation, we develop a homogenized anisotropic micromechanical model that couples a hyper-visco-pseudoelastic constitutive law for the soft matrix with a micromechanical homogenization framework, and implement it numerically. The model accurately predicts stress softening, residual deformation, and anisotropic responses during cyclic loading–unloading, and its validity is confirmed through cyclic experiments on knitted fabric flexible composites (KFFCs). By optimizing the knitted fabric architecture, we further demonstrate that the cyclic stress–strain responses of KFFCs can be closely matched to those of carotid artery tissue in both longitudinal and circumferential directions. Moreover, the model elucidates the governing role of helical fiber geometry in the cyclic mechanical behavior of FNFCs, identifying fiber crimp as a key parameter that controls reinforcement efficiency, stress softening, and residual deformation. These findings highlight the novelty and effectiveness of the proposed model and demonstrate its potential as a design tool for tailoring the biomechanical properties of fiber networks to improve soft-tissue repair.
ai_text: 纤维网络因其优异的柔韧性、透气性、透湿性和结构多样性，被广泛应用于软组织修复。在伤口愈合过程中，它们与原生组织整合形成纤维网络柔性复合材料（FNFCs），其各向异性循环应力软化和残余变形对治疗效果有重要影响。然而，先前的研究主要关注具有简单纤维结构的柔性复合材料的理论模型，这些模型不足以捕捉具有高度复杂细观结构和超粘-伪弹性特性的FNFCs的循环力学行为。为了解决这一局限，我们开发了一个均匀化各向异性微力学模型，该模型将软基体的超粘-伪弹性本构定律与微力学均匀化框架耦合，并进行了数值实现。该模型准确预测了循环加载-卸载过程中的应力软化、残余变形和各向异性响应，并通过针织织物柔性复合材料（KFFCs）的循环实验验证了其有效性。通过优化针织织物结构，我们进一步证明KFFCs的循环应力-应变响应可以在纵向和圆周方向上与颈动脉组织的响应紧密匹配。此外，该模型阐明了螺旋纤维几何形状在FNFCs循环力学行为中的主导作用，指出纤维卷曲是控制增强效率、应力软化和残余变形的关键参数。这些发现突出了所提出模型的新颖性和有效性，并展示了其作为设计工具定制纤维网络生物力学特性以改善软组织修复的潜力。

title: Intrinsic interfacial shear characterization of tangential cohesive Interface: fully coupled shear-lag modeling and universal PINN inversion strategy
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Interfacial shear transfer at the tangential cohesive interfaces between thin films and soft substrates critically determines the mechanical performance of layered systems. Classic cohesive zone models (CZMs)—characterized by parameters such as shear strength, stiffness, and fracture energy—govern critical phenomena including interfacial debonding, fatigue resistance, and strain transfer. Conventional shear-lag-based characterization methods typically assume uniform substrate strain equal to the far-field loading, neglecting bidirectional coupling at the interface that becomes particularly significant in systems involving compliant or finite-thickness substrates. Moreover, most existing studies predefine a specific CZM form—typically bilinear, despite the fact that actual traction–separation behavior is often unknown, highly nonlinear, and varies across material systems. This lack of generality poses a significant challenge for accurate and flexible interfacial characterization. To address these limitations, a fully coupled two-dimensional (2D) shear-lag model is developed by incorporating bidirectional shear transfer across the interface, which improves strain prediction accuracy and enables clear separation of intrinsic interface properties from substrate effects during parameter inversion, outperforming conventional sequential coupling methods. Furthermore, in the absence of closed-form solutions, a physics-informed neural network (PINN) framework is constructed to facilitate robust inversion of intrinsic interfacial shear properties from strain measurements. Additionally, a piecewise-linear strategy is proposed for flexible reconstruction of arbitrary CZM responses without prior specification of their functional forms. This framework integrates physical modeling and data-driven inference into a scalable approach for intrinsic interfacial shear characterization, providing a unified tool for interfacial mechanics analysis in thin film/substrate systems.
ai_text: 薄膜与软基底之间切向内聚界面的界面剪切传递，对层状系统的力学性能具有决定性影响。经典的内聚区模型（CZMs）——以剪切强度、刚度和断裂能等参数为特征——控制着包括界面脱粘、抗疲劳性和应变传递在内的关键现象。传统的基于剪切滞后的表征方法通常假设基底应变均匀且等于远场载荷，忽略了界面处的双向耦合，这种耦合在涉及柔顺或有限厚度基底的系统中尤为重要。此外，大多数现有研究预定义特定的 CZM 形式——通常是双线性的，尽管实际的牵引-分离行为往往是未知的、高度非线性的，并且随材料系统而变化。这种普遍性的缺乏对准确和灵活的界面表征提出了重大挑战。为了解决这些限制，通过纳入界面上的双向剪切传递，开发了一个全耦合的二维（2D）剪切滞后模型，该模型提高了应变预测精度，并在参数反演过程中实现了固有界面特性与基底效应的清晰分离，优于传统的顺序耦合方法。此外，在缺乏闭合形式解的情况下，构建了一个物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，以促进从应变测量中稳健地反演固有界面剪切特性。此外，提出了一种分段线性策略，用于灵活重构任意 CZM 响应，而无需预先指定其函数形式。该框架将物理建模和数据驱动推断整合为一个可扩展的固有界面剪切表征方法，为薄膜/基底系统的界面力学分析提供了一个统一工具。

title: Study of fracture behavior of α-quartz crystals with trigonal symmetry using combined experimental and modelling techniques
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The fracture of silica sand (α-quartz crystals) is significantly influenced by factors acting at both the macroscopic and microscopic levels. Prior research has established that α-quartz exhibits anisotropic behavior, meaning its mechanical properties vary depending on the loading direction. However, the existing literature lacks conclusive findings on how material orientation influences the fracture behavior of sand. This paper provides a mechanics-based experimental calibration of orientation-dependent fracture energy ( G c ) in single-crystal α-quartz and demonstrates how crystallographic anisotropy alters crack initiation, peak load, and crack-path evolution within a controlled phase-field framework. Systematic 3-point bending tests were conducted on U-notched plates and nanoindentation measurements were performed to verify crystallographic orientation. The resulting force–displacement curves were used to quantify fracture response under different notch geometries. A phase-field formulation incorporating trigonal elastic anisotropy was implemented to simulate crack propagation without prescribing crack paths. Numerical simulations were used to calibrate orientation-specific fracture energy values by minimizing the discrepancy between simulated and experimental peak loads. The calibrated fracture energies provide a quantitative basis for incorporating crystallographic anisotropy into particle-scale fracture models of silica sand. Unlike prior phase-field studies that assume prescribed anisotropic fracture parameters or focus on polycrystalline media, the present work directly links experimentally measured force–displacement responses to orientation-specific fracture energy in α-quartz crystals.
ai_text: 硅砂（α-石英晶体）的断裂行为受到宏观和微观层面因素的综合影响。先前研究已确认α-石英表现出各向异性行为，即其力学性能随加载方向而变化。然而，现有文献关于材料取向如何影响砂的断裂行为缺乏明确结论。本文提供了单晶α-石英中取向依赖性断裂能（G_c）的基于力学的实验标定，并展示了在受控相场框架下，晶体学各向异性如何改变裂纹萌生、峰值载荷和裂纹路径演化。对U型缺口板进行了系统的三点弯曲试验，并进行了纳米压痕测量以验证晶体学取向。所得的力-位移曲线用于量化不同缺口几何形状下的断裂响应。采用了一种包含三方弹性各向异性的相场公式来模拟裂纹扩展，而无需预设裂纹路径。通过最小化模拟与实验峰值载荷之间的差异，利用数值模拟标定了取向特定的断裂能值。标定后的断裂能为将晶体学各向异性纳入硅砂颗粒尺度断裂模型提供了定量基础。与先前假设预设各向异性断裂参数或关注多晶介质的相场研究不同，本工作直接将实验测量的力-位移响应与α-石英晶体中的取向特定断裂能联系起来。

title: Adhesion modulation induced by surface roughness and electric load in piezoelectric materials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: It is well-known that real surfaces are rarely uniform or smooth at the microscale, which often have some degree of roughness. Exploring the influence mechanism of surface roughness on adhesion has always been a research hotspot in the field of adhesive contact mechanics. However, existing works only focus on the rough adhesion behaviors of isotropic elastic materials. In this paper, the axisymmetric frictionless rough adhesive contact problem between a piezoelectric half-space and a rigid spherical indenter with wavy surface and different electric properties is investigated. By virtue of the superposition principle and Griffith energy balance criterion, the classical Johnson-Kendall-Roberts (JKR) and Maugis-Dugdale (M-D) models are extended to study the rough adhesion behaviors of piezoelectric materials for the first time. The analytical solutions of the physical quantities at the contact surface and the relationships among the indentation force, contact radius and indentation depth are obtained. The effects of electric load, surface roughness and piezoelectric effect on adhesion behaviors are revealed. It is found that the presence of surface roughness leads to the oscillation of equilibrium curves and yields irreversible energy dissipation due to unstable jumps, which thus results in a larger pull-off force compared with smooth case. Exerting electric load can enhance the adhesion effect between the spherical indenter and piezoelectric half-space for both of the smooth and rough cases, which indicates that the presence of surface roughness does not alter the effect of electric load on adhesion behavior. In addition, the pull-off force corresponding to rough case can accomplish the transition from Derjaguin-Muller-Toporov (DMT) solution to JKR solution as the transition parameter continuously increases. Furthermore, it is shown that adhesion enhancement induced by surface roughness and the influence of piezoelectric effect on pull-off force are primarily confined to the JKR region. The results derived from this work are helpful to understand microscale rough adhesion behaviors of piezoelectric materials.
ai_text: 众所周知，真实表面在微观尺度上很少是均匀或光滑的，通常具有一定程度的粗糙度。探索表面粗糙度对粘附的影响机制一直是粘附接触力学领域的研究热点。然而，现有工作仅关注各向同性弹性材料的粗糙粘附行为。本文研究了压电半空间与具有波状表面和不同电学性质的刚性球形压头之间的轴对称无摩擦粗糙粘附接触问题。基于叠加原理和Griffith能量平衡准则，经典的Johnson-Kendall-Roberts (JKR)和Maugis-Dugdale (M-D)模型首次被扩展用于研究压电材料的粗糙粘附行为。获得了接触表面物理量的解析解以及压入力、接触半径和压入深度之间的关系。揭示了电载荷、表面粗糙度和压电效应对粘附行为的影响。研究发现，表面粗糙度的存在导致平衡曲线振荡，并由于不稳定跳跃产生不可逆能量耗散，因此与光滑情况相比，产生了更大的拉脱力。施加电载荷可以增强球形压头与压电半空间之间的粘附效果，无论是在光滑还是粗糙情况下，这表明表面粗糙度的存在不会改变电载荷对粘附行为的影响。此外，粗糙情况下的拉脱力可以随着过渡参数的持续增加，实现从Derjaguin-Muller-Toporov (DMT)解到JKR解的过渡。此外，研究表明，由表面粗糙度引起的粘附增强以及压电效应对拉脱力的影响主要局限于JKR区域。本研究的结果有助于理解压电材料在微观尺度上的粗糙粘附行为。

title: An investigation on damage and fracture mechanisms of PBX under extrusion load using ordinary state-based peridynamics
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The dynamic damage and fracture of polymer-bonded explosives (PBXs) are closely related to their ignition behaviors and therefore it is of critical importance for understanding the safety of PBXs. Taking the PBX extruded from a hole as an example, this study focuses on the mechanical damage and fracture behaviors of PBX and associated mechanisms by means of a novel rate-dependent ordinary state-based peridynamic (OSB-PD) model. The accuracy and robustness of the model were validated through some classic numerical examples such as the Kalthoff-Winkler impact fracture test. Then, the complete processes of PBX damage and fracture under extrusion load was systematically simulated. Numerical results indicate that significant stress concentration occurs around the hole during extrusion, with fracture initiating in regions with relatively large equivalent plastic strain. Subsequently, a conical slip zone within the PBX is formed accompanying by the severely damaged materials flow into the hole. With increased extrusion velocity, the PBX in the central region undergoes the large macroscopic movement along the previously formed slip surfaces, ultimately developing into a double-conical slip mode. Moreover, with increased extrusion velocity and hole diameter, the slip surface tends to incline towards the loading direction, the angle between slip surface and horizontal direction, which is named as the “slip angle”, also increases. This research exhibits that the developed rate-dependent OSB-PD model can be an effective numerical technique for in-depth understanding of the failure behaviors of PBXs under complex loading conditions, holding theoretical and engineering significance for the safety design and assessment of charge structures.
ai_text: 聚合物粘结炸药（PBX）的动态损伤和断裂与其点火行为密切相关，因此对于理解PBX的安全性至关重要。以从孔中挤压出的PBX为例，本研究通过一种新颖的率相关普通状态近场动力学（OSB-PD）模型，重点研究PBX的机械损伤和断裂行为及其相关机制。该模型的准确性和鲁棒性通过一些经典数值算例进行了验证，例如Kalthoff-Winkler冲击断裂试验。然后，系统模拟了PBX在挤压载荷下损伤和断裂的完整过程。数值结果表明，挤压过程中孔周围出现显著的应力集中，断裂在等效塑性应变较大的区域起始。随后，PBX内部形成一个锥形滑移区，同时严重损伤的材料流入孔中。随着挤压速度的增加，中心区域的PBX沿先前形成的滑移面发生大尺度宏观运动，最终发展为双锥形滑移模式。此外，随着挤压速度和孔径的增加，滑移面倾向于向加载方向倾斜，滑移面与水平方向之间的角度（称为“滑移角”）也随之增大。本研究表明，所开发的率相关OSB-PD模型可以作为一种有效的数值技术，用于深入理解PBX在复杂加载条件下的失效行为，对装药结构的安全设计和评估具有理论和工程意义。

title: Line-based 4D-printed thermoplastics enabled by layerwise printing speed control: Concept, mechanics, and inverse design
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Thermally induced shrinkage in fused deposition modelling (FDM) of semi-crystalline thermoplastics is conventionally regarded as a manufacturing defect that compromises dimensional accuracy. In this work, we demonstrate that printing-induced shrinkage can instead be deliberately harnessed as a programmable design variable for deterministic shape forming. A co-directional, single-material printing strategy is proposed in which layerwise modulation of printing speed is used to control crystallinity development and, consequently, through-thickness shrinkage gradients. Upon thermal activation, these gradients generate predictable bending moments that transform initially straight, planar line elements into prescribed three-dimensional geometries. A systematic experimental programme is conducted to establish quantitative process–structure–property relationships linking printing speed, shrinkage strain, and resulting curvature. Building on this database, a reduced-order analytical model based on multi-layer beam theory is developed to predict the thermally activated deformation of isolated line elements and is validated through finite element simulations and experiments. Using this forward model, a mechanics-guided inverse design framework is formulated to map target geometries directly to layerwise printing speed distributions, enabling automated generation of manufacturing-ready process parameters. When extending the approach to continuous architectures fabricated via uninterrupted filament deposition, non-local thermal interactions are identified, leading to systematic curvature under-actuation and deviation from isolated-element predictions. To address this limitation, an iterative geometric calibration strategy is introduced and integrated into the inverse design workflow, enabling high-fidelity reconstruction of complex shapes. The framework is validated experimentally through a series of demonstrations, including alphabetical and non-trivial planar geometries. Overall, this study establishes layerwise crystallinity control via printing speed modulation as a manufacturing-compatible route for programmable shape forming in thermoplastic additive manufacturing, offering a scalable alternative to multi-material printing and complex toolpath anisotropy for 4D-printed structures.
ai_text: 在半结晶热塑性塑料的熔融沉积建模（FDM）中，热致收缩传统上被视为一种制造缺陷，会损害尺寸精度。在这项工作中，我们证明打印诱导收缩反而可以被有意地用作可编程的设计变量，用于确定性形状形成。提出了一种同向、单材料打印策略，其中通过逐层调制打印速度来控制结晶度发展，从而产生沿厚度方向的收缩梯度。在热激活下，这些梯度产生可预测的弯矩，将初始直的平面线元素转变为预设的三维几何形状。进行了一项系统的实验计划，以建立连接打印速度、收缩应变和 resulting 曲率的定量过程-结构-性能关系。基于此数据库，开发了一个基于多层梁理论的降阶分析模型，用于预测孤立线元素的热激活变形，并通过有限元模拟和实验进行了验证。利用这个正向模型，制定了一个力学引导的逆设计框架，将目标几何形状直接映射到逐层打印速度分布，从而实现制造就绪工艺参数的自动生成。当将该方法扩展到通过连续丝材沉积制造的连续结构时，识别出非局部热相互作用，导致系统性的曲率欠驱动和与孤立元素预测的偏差。为了解决这一限制，引入了一种迭代几何校准策略，并将其集成到逆设计工作流中，从而实现复杂形状的高保真重建。该框架通过一系列演示进行了实验验证，包括字母和非平凡平面几何形状。总体而言，本研究确立了通过打印速度调制进行逐层结晶度控制，作为热塑性塑料增材制造中可编程形状形成的制造兼容途径，为4D打印结构提供了可扩展的替代方案，以替代多材料打印和复杂工具路径各向异性。
