title: An effective method for solving three-dimensional frictional contact problems of multilayer materials considering multiscale rough morphological features
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: A novel mechanical model is developed to characterize the frictional contact behavior of multilayer structures, accounting for multiscale geometric morphological features and internal debonding. First, a geometric multiscale representation model is proposed to decompose and reconstruct the interface geometric morphology, including the macroscopic dimensional deviation, mesoscopic corrugated morphology and microscopic roughness. Then, an equivalent coating method is proposed to represent the stress transfer behavior between the internal debonded layers by using the statistical approach for contact analysis. Next, a three-dimensional contact model is developed to describe the interaction between a multilayer half-space system and an indenter with mixed geometric features, where internal debonding is represented by the equivalent coating. A fast and efficient semi-analytical solution is obtained through Fourier integral transforms and influence coefficient method. Finally, the present contact model is validated by comparing simulation results with existing theoretical results and finite element simulation with two simplified cases. Further results demonstrate the significant influence of multiscale roughness on the contact behavior in multilayer coating systems. This work provides a feasible and effective framework for analyzing the contact response of coating systems with complex multiscale surface morphologies.
ai_text: 开发了一种新的力学模型来表征多层结构的摩擦接触行为，该模型考虑了多尺度几何形态特征和内部脱粘。首先，提出了一种几何多尺度表示模型，用于分解和重构界面几何形态，包括宏观尺寸偏差、介观波纹形态和微观粗糙度。然后，提出了一种等效涂层方法，通过使用统计方法进行接触分析，来表示内部脱粘层之间的应力传递行为。接下来，开发了一个三维接触模型，用于描述多层半空间系统与具有混合几何特征的压头之间的相互作用，其中内部脱粘由等效涂层表示。通过傅里叶积分变换和影响系数法，获得了一种快速高效的半解析解。最后，通过将模拟结果与现有理论结果和有限元模拟在两种简化情况下进行比较，验证了本接触模型。进一步的结果表明，多尺度粗糙度对多层涂层系统的接触行为有显著影响。这项工作为分析具有复杂多尺度表面形态的涂层系统的接触响应提供了一个可行且有效的框架。

title: The lattice-intersection model for composite cylinders considering intersection effects
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: A critical, long-overlooked gap in lattice cylinder mechanics is the neglect of joint-region mechanical effects by conventional methods (equivalent continuum method, 3D stress–strain rotational axis superposition method). This oversight invalidates accurate differentiation of shear performances among structures with homogeneous members, undermining reliable strength and failure analysis for engineering use. This work proposes a lattice-intersection model (L-I model) for enabling mechanistically sound differentiation of shear performances for composite lattice cylinders. The L-I model is grounded in mechanics and only requires the proportion of the intersection region. The work further advances lattice mechanics by deriving a closed-form function for the 3D yield surface and summarizing failure mode methodologies for diverse lattice shells. Lattice specimens, fabricated via rigid-flexible hybrid molds and additive manufacturing, validate the model through experiments and simulations. Stiffness radar charts, 2D anisotropic Young’s modulus maps, 3D yield surfaces, and failure mechanism diagrams are presented, offering a rigorous, intuitive foundation for advancing lattice mechanics research and engineering applications.
ai_text: 晶格圆柱体力学中一个关键且长期被忽视的空白是传统方法（等效连续介质方法、三维应力-应变旋转轴叠加方法）忽略了连接区域的力学效应。这种疏忽使得在具有均匀构件的结构中准确区分剪切性能变得无效，从而削弱了工程应用中可靠的强度和失效分析。本研究提出了一种晶格交叉模型（L-I模型），用于实现复合材料晶格圆柱体剪切性能的机理上合理的区分。L-I模型基于力学原理，仅需要交叉区域的比例。该工作通过推导三维屈服面的闭合形式函数并总结多种晶格壳体的失效模式方法学，进一步推进了晶格力学。通过刚性-柔性混合模具和增材制造制备的晶格试样，通过实验和模拟验证了该模型。展示了刚度雷达图、二维各向异性杨氏模量图、三维屈服面和失效机理图，为推进晶格力学研究和工程应用提供了严格、直观的基础。

title: Nonlinear magneto-mechanical responses of hard-magnetic soft beams incorporating shear effects
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Large deformation characteristics of hard-magnetic soft beams determine that the structural analysis of the beams subjected to applied magnetic fields is essentially a geometrically nonlinear issue based on the hyperelastic materials. The extent to which shear effects affect the deformation performance of hard-magnetic soft beams is a topic of significant interest within the engineering community. To clarify and calculate the structural responses of the beams more accurately, a theoretical model considering shear effects is proposed. The equilibrium equations of hard-magnetic soft beams incorporating shear effects are derived according to the principle of minimum potential energy. A new iterative algorithm is proposed to obtain the solution of the equilibrium equations. By comparing with the existing experimental and theoretical data, the model is well validated. On this basis, the deformation behaviors of hard-magnetic soft beams under applied magnetic fields are analyzed. From the calculation results, it can be concluded that when the dimensionless quantity M is large and the aspect ratio is small, considering shear effects results in the larger dimensionless lateral displacement at the free end of the beam, relative to neglecting shear effects. The shear effects cannot be neglected for the various direction angles of the applied magnetic field α , except α = 180 ° . As for the tangential angle ϕ end at the free end of the beam, shear effects display little influence for different aspect ratios or direction angles of the applied magnetic field.
ai_text: 硬磁软梁的大变形特性决定了，在施加磁场下梁的结构分析本质上是一个基于超弹性材料的几何非线性问题。剪切效应影响硬磁软梁变形性能的程度是工程界高度关注的话题。为了更准确地阐明和计算梁的结构响应，提出了一个考虑剪切效应的理论模型。根据最小势能原理，推导了包含剪切效应的硬磁软梁的平衡方程。提出了一种新的迭代算法来求解平衡方程。通过与现有实验和理论数据比较，该模型得到了很好的验证。在此基础上，分析了硬磁软梁在施加磁场下的变形行为。从计算结果可以得出结论，当无量纲量 M 较大且纵横比较小时，考虑剪切效应会导致梁自由端的无量纲横向位移更大，相对于忽略剪切效应的情况。对于施加磁场的各种方向角 α，除了 α = 180° 外，剪切效应不可忽略。至于梁自由端的切向角 ϕ_end，对于不同的纵横比或施加磁场的方向角，剪切效应的影响很小。

title: Surface topology-based wear evolution model integrated with multiscale frictional contact in finite element analysis
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This work develops a wear evolution model formulated from surface topology and integrates it into a finite element (FE) framework for multiscale frictional contact. The wear equation is constructed by modifying Archard’s formulation so that the wear rate depends on key statistical descriptors of the pad surface, allowing the model to represent both running-in and steady-state regimes through consistent evolution of surface height distributions. To incorporate the effect of surface evolution on frictional response, the wear formulation is coupled with a multiscale friction model in which the interface traction depends on pressure, temperature, and the evolving topography parameters. A reduced-order surrogate representation of the multiscale friction model is obtained using a neural network trained on physics-based solutions, enabling efficient evaluation of the friction law during large-scale FE simulations. The full formulation is implemented into an iterative nonlinear FE scheme through user-defined contact subroutines, allowing direct integration of surface evolution into the contact algorithm. Application to a brake dynamometer loading sequence demonstrates that the framework captures the transition from running-in to stabilized wear, the evolution of interface tractions, and the spatial distribution of wear. The proposed formulation provides a mechanics-based approach for modeling wear evolution in frictional contact systems.
ai_text: 本研究开发了一种基于表面拓扑的磨损演化模型，并将其集成到一个用于多尺度摩擦接触的有限元（FE）框架中。通过修改Archard公式构建了磨损方程，使得磨损率取决于垫片表面的关键统计描述符，从而使模型能够通过表面高度分布的一致演化来表示跑合期和稳态期。为了纳入表面演化对摩擦响应的影响，磨损公式与一个多尺度摩擦模型相耦合，其中界面牵引力取决于压力、温度和演化的形貌参数。通过使用基于物理解决方案训练的神经网络，获得了多尺度摩擦模型的降阶代理表示，从而在大规模有限元模拟中能够高效评估摩擦定律。完整公式通过用户定义的接触子程序实现到一个迭代非线性有限元方案中，允许将表面演化直接集成到接触算法中。应用于制动测功机加载序列表明，该框架能够捕捉从跑合期到稳定磨损的转变、界面牵引力的演化以及磨损的空间分布。所提出的公式为摩擦接触系统中的磨损演化建模提供了一种基于力学的方法。

title: Computational homogenization of an initially orthotropic compressible structure using kinematic hardening law to model primary and secondary stages of creep
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Creep deformation is a critical consideration in designing structures subjected to constant or cyclic loading. Both primary and secondary creep stages are simulated with a unified constitutive law. The compressibility is a consequence of the presence of voids in the structure. A key observation at microscopic scale is that voids do not affect the transition time between primary and secondary creep stages. But their effect is observed both on the primary and secondary creep strain rate. Qualitative analysis of the simulations indicates a direct correlation between void volume and macroscopic strain; larger voids result in greater strain and faster strain rate. Within a thermodynamical framework, an anisotropic compressible kinematic hardening model for initially anisotropic materials was developed. This developed model was applied throughout computational homogenization to a Representative Volume Element (RVE) of a masonry without mortar joints. The homogeneous material parameters are determined using a multistart algorithm in conjunction with the Levenberg–Marquardt optimization method. The homogenized model efficiently captures the orthotropic compressible behavior due to creep of this masonry’s RVE.
ai_text: 蠕变变形是设计承受恒定或循环载荷结构时的一个关键考虑因素。使用统一的本构定律模拟了初级和次级蠕变阶段。可压缩性是由于结构中存在孔隙所致。在微观尺度上的一个关键观察是，孔隙不影响初级和次级蠕变阶段之间的过渡时间。但它们的效应在初级和次级蠕变应变率上都被观察到。模拟的定性分析表明，孔隙体积与宏观应变之间存在直接相关性；较大的孔隙导致更大的应变和更快的应变率。在热力学框架内，开发了一个用于初始各向异性材料的各向异性可压缩运动硬化模型。这个开发的模型通过计算均匀化应用于无砂浆接缝砌体的代表体积单元（RVE）。均匀材料参数使用多起点算法结合 Levenberg–Marquardt 优化方法确定。均匀化模型有效地捕捉了由于该砌体 RVE 蠕变引起的正交各向异性可压缩行为。

title: A constitutive stress–strain law based on acoustoplasticity and nanoproperties of the material defect subsystem
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Processes of elastic and plastic deformation of materials are considered within the acoustoplastic theory and the defect kinetics under material loading. The defect excitation is characterized by the Arrhenius law. The model relates nanoscale characteristics of a defect subsystem with meso- and macromechanical parameters of the material. Such mesoscale characteristics of the defect subsystem as defect concentration, internal friction stress and nanoscale characteristics including activation energy, activation volume and relaxation time are introduced in the theoretical model. The interaction of defects during plastic deformation is accounted for by the dependence of the defect activation energy on their concentration. The validity of the model is demonstrated for a variety of experimental data for metals. For tantalum alloy, the model correctly describes the dependence of compressive test data on the strain rate. A series of tensile tests at elevated temperatures for aluminum alloy allowed us to reveal the temperature dependence of the material parameters of the model. It is shown that the developed acoustoplastic model can be reduced to the well-known Johnson–Cook and Bodner–Partom empirical models and their modifications. The developed acoustoplastic model relates macroscopic parameters of empirical models with the material properties at the nanoscale. It provides a new opportunity to model stress–strain relations of materials by changing nanoscale parameters of defects.

title: A strength prediction hybrid framework of fiber reinforced composites by integrating physics-informed deep learning and generative AI
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Predicting the temperature dependent strength properties of fiber reinforced composites remains challenging due to the intricate interplay of thermal effects, constituent properties, interfacial bonding, and residual stress, exacerbated by limited availability of high-fidelity experimental data. To address this momentous issue, we developed an efficient hybrid framework for tensile strength prediction of FRP composites combining generative AI Large Language Model, Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), and Deep Neural Networks (DNN) with physical information. First, a novel generative AI model rapidly produces 1369 high-resolution cross-sectional images of representative volume element (RVE) of composites. Specifically, the DeepSeek-R1 model was utilized to program Python scripts for rapid RVE generation. A trained CNN architecture then autonomously extracts critical microstructure descriptors, typically fiber volume fraction and diameter, from these images with high precision. Afterwards, to circumvent experimental data scarcity, we constructed a hybrid data set integrating theoretical model predictions (validated as reliable proxies under controlled thermal conditions) with experimental measurements, effectively embedding physical information of composites into the data set. The physics-informed DNN model subsequently establishes the quantitative relationships between inputs parameters and tensile strength outputs, achieving prediction errors below 10%. By linking CNN-extracted microstructure features to the DNN predictor, we construct a direct mapping from microstructure images to macroscale tensile strength of FRP composites. This work pioneers a paradigm for performance prediction of composite materials by integrating physics-informed mechanics model and AI model. Further, an intelligent prediction software that can quantitatively evaluate the performance evolution of materials under extreme service conditions is being developed, which can enhance model interpretability and generalization ability, reduce reliance on massive data, and diminish computing power requirements.
ai_text: 由于热效应、组分性能、界面结合与残余应力之间复杂的相互作用，以及高保真实验数据的有限性，预测纤维增强复合材料的温度相关强度特性仍然具有挑战性。为解决这一重要问题，我们开发了一个结合生成式人工智能大语言模型、卷积神经网络（CNN）、深度神经网络（DNN）与物理信息的高效混合框架，用于预测FRP复合材料的拉伸强度。首先，一种新颖的生成式AI模型快速生成了1369张复合材料代表性体积单元（RVE）的高分辨率横截面图像。具体而言，利用DeepSeek-R1模型编写Python脚本以实现RVE的快速生成。随后，一个训练好的CNN架构从这些图像中高精度地自动提取关键微观结构描述符，通常是纤维体积分数和直径。之后，为规避实验数据稀缺的问题，我们构建了一个混合数据集，整合了理论模型预测（在受控热条件下已验证为可靠的代理）与实验测量数据，从而有效地将复合材料的物理信息嵌入数据集中。随后，基于物理信息的DNN模型建立了输入参数与拉伸强度输出之间的定量关系，实现了低于10%的预测误差。通过将CNN提取的微观结构特征与DNN预测器相连接，我们构建了从微观结构图像到FRP复合材料宏观拉伸强度的直接映射。这项工作通过整合基于物理信息的力学模型与AI模型，开创了复合材料性能预测的新范式。此外，一款能够定量评估材料在极端服役条件下性能演化的智能预测软件正在开发中，该软件有望增强模型的可解释性与泛化能力，减少对海量数据的依赖，并降低对计算能力的需求。

title: Elastoplastic constitutive model for concrete based on the cohesive-frictional deformation mechanism
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper presents a novel decoupled cohesive-frictional elastoplastic constitutive model for concrete that captures the coupled evolution and deformation characteristics of cohesive and frictional phases. Concrete is conceptualized as a two-phase material: a cohesive phase described by a hydrostatic-insensitive yield function with an equivalent plastic shear strain-controlled hardening/softening law, and a frictional phase governed by a cap-type yield function with hardening driven by plastic volumetric strain. Three combination schemes, namely series, parallel, and hybrid, are formulated to describe the interaction between the two phases, and the hybrid scheme is adopted to ensure consistency with the intrinsic deformation mechanisms of concrete. The model is parsimonious, involving nine material parameters with clear physical meaning, all obtainable from standard laboratory test. Validation against conventional triaxial tests on concretes of different grades and confining pressures shows that the model accurately captures peak strength, strain softening, and confining-pressure effects under multiaxial stress states. It also captures the progressive transition from cohesive-dominated to frictional-dominated behavior. The model describes both the independent mechanical evolution of the two phases and the resulting macroscopic response, enabling a clearer interpretation of their respective roles. Furthermore, the model can be reduced to purely frictional or purely cohesive model, rendering it potentially applicable to a wide range of geomaterials, including soils and rocks.
ai_text: 本文提出了一种新颖的解耦粘聚-摩擦弹塑性本构模型，用于混凝土，该模型捕捉了粘聚相和摩擦相的耦合演化和变形特性。混凝土被概念化为一种两相材料：粘聚相由静水压力不敏感的屈服函数描述，并带有等效塑性剪应变控制的硬化/软化法则；摩擦相由帽型屈服函数控制，其硬化由塑性体积应变驱动。提出了三种组合方案，即串联、并联和混合，来描述两相之间的相互作用，并采用混合方案以确保与混凝土固有变形机制的一致性。该模型简洁，涉及九个具有明确物理意义的材料参数，所有这些参数均可通过标准实验室试验获得。通过对不同等级和围压混凝土的常规三轴试验验证表明，该模型准确捕捉了多轴应力状态下的峰值强度、应变软化和围压效应。它还捕捉了从粘聚主导行为到摩擦主导行为的渐进转变。该模型描述了两相的独立力学演化及其产生的宏观响应，从而能够更清晰地解释它们各自的作用。此外，该模型可以简化为纯摩擦或纯粘聚模型，使其可能适用于广泛的地质材料，包括土壤和岩石。

title: A unified variational differential quadrature method-based framework for elastic wave attenuation in two-dimensional metamaterials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper introduces a unified semi-analytical framework for wave propagation in both infinite periodic lattices and finite arrays of two-dimensional (2D) metamaterials. The formulation is constructed within a weak-form setting, and applies the variational differential quadrature method (VDQM) on Chebyshev–Gauss–Lobatto (CGL) grids to obtain compact matrix operators without explicit high-order strong-form differentiation. Ligament-level stiffness and mass matrices are then assembled using finite-element-style connectivity through shared degrees of freedom (DOFs), enabling systematic modeling of multi-member unit cells. For the infinite metamaterial, periodic boundary conditions (PBCs) are enforced algebraically by projecting the unit cell DOFs onto the null space of the constraint system, yielding a reduced generalized eigenvalue problem for dispersion calculations. The same assembled model is also used to compute the transmission response of finite arrays, allowing attenuation peaks, band gap persistence, and period-dependent scaling to be quantified directly. The proposed framework is initially validated against the conventional re-entrant honeycomb (RH) as an established literature benchmark. Subsequently, it is utilized for an extensive analysis of a novel 2D re-entrant and tooth-shaped hybrid metamaterial (RTHM), formed by augmenting a baseline RH with tooth-shaped elements. To ensure rigorous predictive accuracy, the finite-array transmission responses of both the RH and RTHM are cross-verified between an in-house MATLAB implementation and COMSOL Multiphysics. Consequently, convergence and validation studies demonstrate numerical stability and rapid convergence, yielding results that are highly consistent across dispersion curves, iso-frequency contours, and low-frequency attenuation measures. The proposed RTHM delivers excellent low-frequency attenuation through a combination of robust band gap formation and strong waveguiding effects, as evidenced by the transmission response together with group velocity maps and directivity plots. Collectively, this study contributes both a new unified framework for wave propagation in infinite and finite periodic systems and a highly effective model for low-frequency wave attenuation, enabling the systematic design and optimization of next-generation metamaterials.
ai_text: 本文介绍了一种统一的半解析框架，用于研究无限周期晶格和有限阵列二维（2D）超材料中的波传播。该公式在弱形式设置下构建，并应用变分微分求积法（VDQM）于Chebyshev–Gauss–Lobatto（CGL）网格上，以获得紧凑的矩阵算子，而无需显式的高阶强形式微分。然后，通过共享自由度（DOFs）使用有限元风格的连接性组装韧带级别的刚度矩阵和质量矩阵，从而实现对多成员单元胞的系统建模。对于无限超材料，通过将单元胞自由度投影到约束系统的零空间上，代数地施加周期性边界条件（PBCs），从而得到一个简化的广义特征值问题用于色散计算。相同的组装模型也用于计算有限阵列的传输响应，从而可以直接量化衰减峰值、带隙持续性以及周期相关的缩放。所提出的框架首先以传统的重入式蜂窝（RH）作为文献基准进行验证。随后，该框架被用于广泛分析一种新型的二维重入式和齿形混合超材料（RTHM），该材料通过在基准RH上添加齿形元素形成。为确保严格的预测准确性，RH和RTHM的有限阵列传输响应在内部MATLAB实现和COMSOL Multiphysics之间进行了交叉验证。因此，收敛性和验证研究证明了数值稳定性和快速收敛性，在色散曲线、等频等高线和低频衰减测量方面得到高度一致的结果。所提出的RTHM通过结合稳健的带隙形成和强波导效应，实现了优异的低频衰减，这由传输响应以及群速度图和方向性图所证明。总之，本研究不仅贡献了一个用于无限和有限周期系统中波传播的新统一框架，还提供了一个高效的低频波衰减模型，从而支持下一代超材料的系统设计和优化。

title: Unraveling negative strain-rate sensitivity of a quenching & partitioning steel by a crystal plasticity model coupling solute-drag effect
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Advanced high-strength steels (AHSS) are crucial for lightweight, crashworthy automotive components, where high-strain-rate deformation is a key design consideration. Unlike traditional AHSS, which typically exhibit positive strain-rate sensitivity, recently developed quenching and partitioning (Q&P) steels display an anomalous negative strain-rate sensitivity. This phenomenon eludes conventional crystal plasticity models, which lack a physical description of solute-dislocation interactions. To address this limitation, we develop a crystal plasticity framework explicitly coupled to a novel solute-drag model that mechanistically links the spatiotemporal evolution of carbon atmospheres around dislocations to the dislocation waiting time via two diffusion mechanisms: cross-core diffusion and continuum diffusion. The framework models the multi-phase microstructure of Q&P steels, incorporating dislocation slip and deformation-induced martensitic transformation in retained austenite, and dislocation slip with the solute-drag effect in martensite. With a single parameter set, the model accurately reproduces stress–strain responses under continuous loading across a wide range of strain rates and temperatures, and successfully predicts unfitted behavior under interrupted loading histories, including the evolution of dislocation density and phase fractions. It is found that the negative strain-rate sensitivity originates predominantly from a severe, localized reduction of solute drag within critically stressed slip systems at high strain rates. This study provides a robust, microstructure-aware modeling framework for solute-dislocation interactions with slip-system resolution, advances the fundamental understanding of carbon segregation effects in multi-phase steels, and offers guidance for designing next-generation structural materials.
ai_text: 先进高强度钢（AHSS）对于轻量化、耐撞的汽车部件至关重要，其中高应变率变形是一个关键的设计考虑因素。与通常表现出正应变率敏感性的传统先进高强度钢不同，最近开发的淬火配分（Q&P）钢显示出一种反常的负应变率敏感性。这一现象超出了传统晶体塑性模型的描述范围，这些模型缺乏对溶质-位错相互作用的物理描述。为了克服这一局限，我们开发了一个晶体塑性框架，该框架与一种新颖的溶质拖曳模型显式耦合，该模型通过两种扩散机制（跨芯扩散和连续扩散）将位错周围碳气氛的时空演化与位错等待时间机制性地联系起来。该框架模拟了Q&P钢的多相微观结构，包括残留奥氏体中的位错滑移和变形诱导马氏体相变，以及马氏体中具有溶质拖曳效应的位错滑移。通过单一参数集，该模型准确再现了在宽范围应变率和温度下连续加载的应力-应变响应，并成功预测了中断加载历史下的未拟合行为，包括位错密度和相分数的演化。研究发现，负应变率敏感性主要源于高应变率下临界应力滑移系内溶质拖曳的严重局部降低。本研究为溶质-位错相互作用提供了一个稳健的、考虑微观结构的建模框架，具有滑移系分辨率，增进了对多相钢中碳偏聚效应的基本理解，并为设计下一代结构材料提供了指导。

title: Deformation-induced domains in silicone rubber
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: In-situ X-ray computed tomography observations show the development of spatially heterogeneous deformation in cylindrical silicone rubber specimens subjected to a spatially uniform axial strain. Using a doping agent, we demonstrate that this heterogeneity is associated with the motion of a mobile phase within the silicone rubber. The mobile phase is hypothesised to behave like a liquid crystal, with heterogeneity driven by the formation of nematic domains within it. A constitutive model for the deformation of a rubber with such a mobile phase is presented and analysed for axisymmetric uniaxial loading. An important outcome of this analysis is a phase map showing three regimes of behaviour under uniaxial deformation. Spatial heterogeneity develops due to a switch in the orientation of the mobile phase molecules, resulting in the formation of mechanically induced domains within the rubber. Consistent with observations, the model predicts that imposed tensile strains can result in volume loss in the core of the cylindrical specimen and dilation in the outer shell, whereas imposed compressive axial strains reverse this trend.
ai_text: 原位X射线计算机断层扫描观察显示，在承受空间均匀轴向应变的圆柱形硅橡胶试样中，空间非均匀变形得以发展。通过使用掺杂剂，我们证明这种非均匀性与硅橡胶内移动相的运动相关。假设移动相的行为类似于液晶，其非均匀性由内部向列相域的形成驱动。提出了一个具有这种移动相的橡胶变形的本构模型，并针对轴对称单轴加载进行了分析。该分析的一个重要结果是展示单轴变形下三种行为区域的相图。空间非均匀性由于移动相分子取向的切换而发展，导致橡胶内形成机械诱导域。与观察一致，模型预测施加的拉伸应变可导致圆柱试样核心体积损失和外壳膨胀，而施加的压缩轴向应变则逆转这一趋势。

title: Capturing flying objects through viscoelastic adhesion
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Adhesion-based strategies for capturing flying objects, exemplified by chameleon tongues and octopus tentacles, are widely employed in nature. These biological systems have inspired the use of viscoelastic adhesives for dynamic capturing in applications such as aerial robots or under microgravity conditions. Due to the complex interplay between rate-dependent material responses and contact dynamics, the mechanics of combined effects of adhesion and viscoelasticity in dynamic capturing remain poorly understood. Here, we develop a general theoretical framework for adhesive collision between a flat punch and a viscoelastic substrate based on the Maugis-Dugdale (M-D) model. Solutions are derived in the JKR/DMT-like regimes through asymptotic analysis. The results reveal two distinct adhesion mechanisms that prevent rebound: the viscoelastic dissipation that enlarges the cohesive zone during detachment in the JKR-like regime, thereby enhancing dynamic adhesion; and the long-range interfacial tractions that dominate and facilitate capture in the DMT-like regime. The critical capturing velocity exhibits a peak when the viscoelastic relaxation time is comparable to the elastic collision time, independent of the adhesion parameter. When normalized by the work of adhesion, the critical capturing velocity shows a continuous transition between two analytically predicted JKR and DMT limits. Our model provides a unified mechanics of adhesive collisions across adhesion regimes and timescales, offering theoretical guidance for the design and optimization of dynamic viscoelastic adhesive systems.

title: Unveiling scaling laws for wrinkling in compressed fiber-reinforced bilayers at any elastic mismatch
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Wrinkling is a stress-induced bifurcation commonly observed in both natural and engineered systems, arising from physical or geometric mismatches in thin films, membranes, and various systems adhered to substrates with complex microstructures. In biology, such corrugations underly fundamental processes such as leaf morphogenesis, brain folding, vascular mechanics, swelling and drying, tissue growth or repair. While wrinkling in isotropic bilayers under imposed lateral compression is well characterized through established scaling laws–particularly for large film-to-substrate elastic mismatches–corresponding relations for fiber-reinforced bilayers remain comparatively widely underexplored. In this work, we address this gap by analytically deriving asymptotic expansions for the onset of wrinkling when bifurcation occurs at both small and finite strains under prescribed compression, thereby capturing the full spectrum of elastic mismatches between the two sides of the bilayer. The film is modeled as an axially deformable elastic plate with bending stiffness, while the substrate is described using the Standard Reinforcing Model within finite elasticity. Two distinct sets of scaling laws for the critical strain and wavenumber at the wrinkling onset are obtained, revealing two regimes: a film-mediated regime and a substrate-governed one. The transition between such behaviors is characterized by an analytically derived threshold, providing a clear criterion for selecting the appropriate scaling law for the case at hand. Our framework applies to biological systems, as well as to engineered bilayers. For the latter, symmetry-breaking transition in the dispersion relation arises as the film-substrate mismatch decreases. Overall, this work provides a unified theoretical framework for rigorously obtaining scaling laws for wrinkling in fiber-reinforced bilayers across the full range of elastic mismatches, offering new insights into potentially analogous bifurcations in anisotropic compounds.
ai_text: 褶皱是一种应力诱导的分岔现象，常见于自然和工程系统中，源于薄膜、膜以及附着于具有复杂微结构基底的各类系统中的物理或几何失配。在生物学中，此类波纹结构是叶片形态发生、脑折叠、血管力学、肿胀与干燥、组织生长或修复等基本过程的基础。尽管在施加横向压缩下各向同性双层结构中的褶皱已通过既有的标度律得到充分表征——特别是对于薄膜与基底之间大弹性失配的情况——但纤维增强双层结构中的相应关系仍相对广泛地未被充分探索。在这项工作中，我们通过解析推导在预定压缩下小应变和有限应变时褶皱起始的渐近展开式，来填补这一空白，从而捕捉双层结构两侧之间弹性失配的完整谱系。薄膜被建模为具有弯曲刚度的轴向可变形弹性板，而基底则使用有限弹性理论中的 Standard Reinforcing Model 进行描述。我们获得了褶皱起始时临界应变和波数的两套不同的标度律，揭示了两种机制：薄膜主导机制和基底主导机制。这些行为之间的转变由一个解析推导的阈值所表征，为选择适用于当前情况的标度律提供了明确标准。我们的框架适用于生物系统，也适用于工程双层结构。对于后者，随着薄膜-基底失配的减小，色散关系中会出现对称性破缺转变。总体而言，这项工作提供了一个统一的理论框架，用于严格获取纤维增强双层结构中跨越全范围弹性失配的褶皱标度律，为各向异性化合物中潜在类似分岔提供了新见解。

title: Crack-tip deformation transitions and fracture mechanisms in glassy polymers revealed by particle-continuum coupling simulations
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: We investigate crack-tip deformation and fracture mechanisms of glassy polymers using a particle-continuum coupling method that embeds a molecular dynamics region within a finite element domain, with a coarse-grained atactic polystyrene glass as a model system. This approach enables molecular resolutions in the crack-tip region under strongly nonuniform deformation from the surrounding bulk at continuum scales, a regime that cannot be accessed by stand-alone molecular or continuum simulations. Across a broad range of temperatures, chain lengths, bond breakage criteria, and different geometric constraints, the deformation consistently organizes into three distinct stages governed by microscopic mechanisms at different scales: an early plastic regime, stable necking, and fibrillar instability, which are characterized by systematic changes in the microscopic deformation structure. The early plastic regime begins with local atomic dilatation and spatially distributed nonaffine rearrangements. Yielding is marked by the onset of coalescence of these localized plastic sites. Necking begins once this coalescence process is completed and a stable localized neck is established. In this regime, the load is carried by stretched entangled segments, leading to an approximately linear relation between the macroscopic stress and the average bond stretch that remains nearly insensitive to temperature. Continued loading destabilizes this state and leads to fibrillar breakdown, triggered by highly localized disentanglement events of polymer chains. Despite variations in temperature, molecular architecture and failure criteria, the neck and fibril stages exhibit consistent behavior: Stage transitions are driven by a small fraction of highly active regions, whereas the stabilized stages are governed by the collective response of the system.

title: The strange mechanics of an elastic rod under null-resultant transverse loads
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Two equal and opposite distributed dead loads are applied orthogonally to the axis of an elastic rod in its rectilinear reference configuration, one at the extrados and the other at the intrados, such that the resultant applied force per unit length is uniformly zero. In this configuration, the rod is subjected to a transverse (tensile or compressive) stress, which is usually believed to have no significant effect on the structural response and has therefore not been considered so far. Contrary to this common belief, the asymptotic behavior of an incrementally deformed elastic layer and three different rod models (the first derived as an asymptotic approximation of the elastic layer; the second based on Euler elastica; and the third obtained by homogenization of a discrete model) reveal that this loading condition produces the same deformation in the rod as an axial load. In particular, the transverse load adds to the axial load in a generalized version of the Euler elastica, leading to buckling and nontrivial postcritical deformations when compressive. The critical transverse stress for buckling is found to have the same form as the Euler critical stress under axial force and tends to zero in the limit of vanishing rod inertia. For this reason, instability induced by transverse loading persists even when the rod thickness tends to zero. These theoretical predictions are confirmed by numerical simulations of a slender elastic layer, which show that increasing transverse load can induce buckling and drive the layer along a deformation path that closely follows that predicted by the generalized Euler elastica throughout the entire postcritical regime, even beyond self-intersection. To show that this behavior can be realized in practice, a dedicated experimental setup is developed, and the experimental results fully confirm the theoretical and numerical predictions. The instability disclosed here may affect thin films and elastic layers subjected to transverse loading and is therefore relevant to several advanced technologies, including micro- and nanoscale devices.
ai_text: 在弹性杆的直线参考构型中，两个大小相等、方向相反的分布死载荷正交作用于杆轴，一个作用于外弧面，另一个作用于内弧面，使得单位长度上的合作用力均匀为零。在这种构型下，杆受到横向（拉伸或压缩）应力，通常认为这对结构响应没有显著影响，因此至今未被考虑。与这一普遍看法相反，增量变形弹性层的渐近行为以及三种不同的杆模型（第一种作为弹性层的渐近近似推导得出；第二种基于欧拉弹性线；第三种通过离散模型的均匀化获得）表明，这种加载条件在杆中产生的变形与轴向载荷相同。特别是，在广义欧拉弹性线版本中，横向载荷与轴向载荷叠加，当为压缩时导致屈曲和非平凡的后临界变形。发现屈曲的临界横向应力与轴向力下的欧拉临界应力具有相同形式，并在杆惯性趋于零的极限下趋于零。因此，即使杆厚度趋于零，由横向加载引起的不稳定性仍然存在。这些理论预测通过细长弹性层的数值模拟得到证实，模拟表明增加横向载荷可以诱发屈曲，并驱动层沿变形路径运动，该路径在整个后临界区域甚至超越自相交时，都与广义欧拉弹性线的预测紧密吻合。为了证明这种行为在实践中可以实现，开发了一个专用的实验装置，实验结果完全证实了理论和数值预测。这里揭示的不稳定性可能影响受横向加载的薄膜和弹性层，因此与包括微米和纳米尺度器件在内的多种先进技术相关。

title: Physics-guided inverse design of bio-inspired network metamaterials via a general non-linear mechanical framework for arbitrary curved-beam lattices
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Biological soft tissues achieve a remarkable balance of compliance, toughness, and durability through their hierarchical fibrillar architectures, giving rise to nonlinear mechanical responses such as the characteristic J‑shaped stress–strain curve. Inspired by these natural designs, periodic network metamaterials composed of curved beam elements have become promising candidates for soft robotics, bio‑integrated electronics, and tissue engineering. This emergence underscores the need for a rigorous theoretical framework capable of guiding the rational design of biomimetic architectures and predicting their nonlinear mechanical behavior. Prevailing theoretical models, however, are typically formulated for specific, idealized geometries, limiting applicability to more general and complex network architectures and hindering accurate capture of multiscale deformation mechanisms essential for biomimetic performance. To overcome these limitations, a generalized nonlinear mechanical framework is presented in this study to characterize periodic networks of arbitrarily shaped curved beams, systematically capturing the hierarchical transmission of mechanical responses by bridging individual beam mechanics with lattice‑level interactions under finite extension. The predictive capability is substantiated through finite element simulations and experimental validation across a wide spectrum of network configurations and loading conditions. Building upon this physically grounded framework, an efficient inverse design methodology enables precise tailoring of network architectures toward targeted mechanical specifications. In contrast to data-driven paradigms reliant on extensive training datasets or opaque neural architectures, the proposed approach combines computational efficiency with transparent physical interpretability. Collectively, this work provides a robust theoretical foundation and practical design paradigm for optimizing soft network metamaterials, offering a principled pathway for bio‑inspired mechanical systems.
ai_text: 生物软组织通过其分级纤维状结构实现了顺应性、韧性和耐久性的显著平衡，从而产生非线性力学响应，如特征性的J形应力-应变曲线。受这些自然设计的启发，由弯曲梁单元组成的周期性网络超材料已成为软体机器人、生物集成电子学和组织工程中有前景的候选材料。这一趋势凸显了需要一个严格的理论框架，能够指导仿生结构的合理设计并预测其非线性力学行为。然而，现有的理论模型通常针对特定的理想化几何形状制定，限制了其对更一般和复杂网络结构的适用性，并阻碍了准确捕捉对仿生性能至关重要的多尺度变形机制。为了克服这些限制，本研究提出了一个广义非线性力学框架，用于表征任意形状弯曲梁的周期性网络，通过桥接单个梁力学与晶格级相互作用在有限延伸下，系统性地捕捉力学响应的分级传递。预测能力通过有限元模拟和实验验证在广泛的网络构型和加载条件下得到证实。基于这一物理基础框架，一种高效的逆设计方法使得能够精确调整网络结构以满足目标力学规格。与依赖大量训练数据集或不透明神经架构的数据驱动范式相比，所提出的方法结合了计算效率与透明的物理解释性。总之，这项工作为优化软网络超材料提供了坚实的理论基础和实用设计范式，为仿生力学系统提供了一条原则性路径。

title: A variational phase-field model for anisotropic fracture accounting for multiple cohesive lengths
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: We propose a novel variational phase-field model for fracture in anisotropic materials. The model is specifically designed to allow for a more flexible calibration of crack nucleation than existing anisotropic fracture formulations, while avoiding the introduction of multiple damage variables. In addition to the classical components of anisotropic phase-field models based on a single damage variable-namely, anisotropic elasticity and the extension of the fracture energy density via a second-order structural tensor-the proposed approach introduces fracture anisotropy through a cohesive degradation function with potentially distinct cohesive lengths along the principal material directions. For this reason, we refer to it as multi-cohesive model. This feature enables independent control of the critical stresses governing crack nucleation in each material direction. We analyze the homogeneous solution and its second-order stability, and we compare the resulting strength surfaces with those of two representative anisotropic phase-field models available in the literature. Finally, numerical simulations in two and three dimensions demonstrate the capability of the proposed model to independently control crack nucleation and propagation in anisotropic fracture problems of increasing complexity.
ai_text: 我们提出了一种新颖的变分相场模型，用于各向异性材料中的断裂。该模型专门设计用于比现有各向异性断裂公式更灵活地校准裂纹成核，同时避免引入多个损伤变量。除了基于单一损伤变量的各向异性相场模型的经典组成部分——即各向异性弹性和通过二阶结构张量扩展的断裂能密度——所提出的方法通过一个内聚退化函数引入断裂各向异性，该函数沿主材料方向可能具有不同的内聚长度。因此，我们称之为多内聚模型。这一特征使得能够独立控制每个材料方向上控制裂纹成核的临界应力。我们分析了均匀解及其二阶稳定性，并将所得强度曲面与文献中两种代表性的各向异性相场模型进行比较。最后，二维和三维数值模拟证明了所提出模型在日益复杂的各向异性断裂问题中独立控制裂纹成核和扩展的能力。

title: Machine learning extraction of viscoelastic material properties from full-field deformation measurements
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Characterizing the mechanical properties of viscoelastic materials is crucial in various engineering disciplines, from structural mechanics to biomedical applications. Traditional characterization approaches often rely on analytical or numerical models and iterative processes that are computationally expensive and labor-intensive. In this study, we propose two novel deep learning-based frameworks designed to efficiently extract viscoelastic material properties from diverse data sources, including analytical methods, numerical simulation results, as well as experimental observations. The first algorithm, Deep learning V iscoelastic M aterial modeling with known F ield governing E quations (or Deep-VM-FE), is designed for problems with known analytical models. For Kelvin-Voigt viscoelastic material models, it decouples stress fields into rate-independent and rate-dependent components, which are learned by two parallel neural network channels. A comprehensive loss function ensures accurate total stress predictions. This approach was successfully validated on analytically generated databases for various hydrogel materials, including polyacrylamide, agarose, and gelatin. For more general applications where explicit governing equations are unavailable, we propose a second algorithm, called Deep learning V iscoelastic M aterial modeling with F ield D ata (or Deep-VM-FD). This method learns stress evolution directly from point-based, rate-dependent field data. A novel gradient pooling technique is incorporated to integrate information from neighboring points, enriching the model's spatial awareness. The Deep-VM-FD algorithm was extensively validated using numerical data from 1D creep and relaxation tests, as well as 2D cavitation and single-point loading simulations. Furthermore, its practical utility was demonstrated by successfully analyzing experimental results from bubble cavitation tests. Across all validation cases, the predictions showed excellent agreement with ground truth data. In summary, we demonstrate that our developed two deep learning-based approaches offer a powerful and efficient alternative for viscoelastic material characterization, capable of handling diverse data types and complex physical scenarios.
ai_text: 表征粘弹性材料的力学特性在各种工程学科中至关重要，从结构力学到生物医学应用。传统表征方法通常依赖于解析或数值模型以及迭代过程，这些方法计算成本高且劳动密集。在本研究中，我们提出了两种新颖的基于深度学习的框架，旨在从多种数据源中高效提取粘弹性材料特性，包括解析方法、数值模拟结果以及实验观察。第一种算法，Deep learning Viscoelastic Material modeling with known Field governing Equations（或Deep-VM-FE），专为具有已知解析模型的问题设计。对于Kelvin-Voigt粘弹性材料模型，它将应力场解耦为率无关和率相关分量，这些分量由两个并行的神经网络通道学习。一个综合的损失函数确保了准确的总应力预测。该方法在针对多种水凝胶材料（包括polyacrylamide、agarose和gelatin）的解析生成数据库上成功验证。对于更一般的应用，其中显式控制方程不可用，我们提出了第二种算法，称为Deep learning Viscoelastic Material modeling with Field Data（或Deep-VM-FD）。该方法直接从基于点的、率相关的场数据中学习应力演化。引入了一种新颖的梯度池化技术，以整合来自相邻点的信息，增强了模型的空间感知能力。Deep-VM-FD算法使用来自一维creep和relaxation试验的数值数据，以及二维cavitation和single-point loading模拟，进行了广泛验证。此外，通过成功分析bubble cavitation试验的实验结果，证明了其实际效用。在所有验证案例中，预测结果与ground truth数据表现出极好的一致性。总之，我们证明了我们开发的两种基于深度学习的方法为粘弹性材料表征提供了强大而高效的替代方案，能够处理多种数据类型和复杂的物理场景。

title: A thermodynamically consistent and length scale-insensitive phase-field methodology suitable for ductile fracture with coupled elastic-plastic driving forces
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Accurate prediction of ductile fracture in elastoplastic and pseudo-elastoplastic materials, including metals and Ultra-High-Performance Cementitious Composites (UHPC), is essential for structural design. Conventional phase-field models for ductile fracture are limited by excessive sensitivity to the regularisation length scale, reliance on ad hoc plastic work thresholds, and incomplete representation of softening behaviour. To overcome these issues, we propose a phase-field model that incorporates both elastic energy and plastic work as fracture driving forces, introducing separate intrinsic thresholds via dedicated degradation functions to ensure thermodynamically consistent crack initiation without arbitrary adjustments. Stiffness degradation is decoupled from the phase-field variable through an independent variable, removing geometric constraints on the length scale parameter and enhancing computational flexibility. The framework supports arbitrary softening laws through tailored characteristic functions, capturing post-peak stress-strain responses and eliminating the need for damage history variables. A semi-explicit numerical scheme, combining an explicit equilibrium algorithm with a neighboured element method for phase-field evolution, is implemented in ABAQUS/Explicit. Benchmark validations confirm minimal influence of the length scale parameter across various softening laws. By adjusting threshold values, the model reproduces a wide range of failure modes—including the transition between (quasi-)brittle and ductile fracture—while accurately capturing strain hardening and fracture in both dislocation-mediated metals and fibre-bridging-dominated pseudo-elastoplastic UHPC at the macroscopic level, thereby demonstrating broad applicability and robustness for ductile fracture analyses.
ai_text: 准确预测弹塑性和伪弹塑性材料中的韧性断裂，包括金属和超高性能水泥基复合材料（UHPC），对于结构设计至关重要。传统的韧性断裂phase-field模型受限于对正则化长度尺度的过度敏感性、对临时塑性功阈值的依赖以及软化行为的不完全表征。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种phase-field模型，该模型将弹性能和塑性功均作为断裂驱动力，通过专用的退化函数引入独立的本征阈值，以确保热力学一致的裂纹萌生，无需任意调整。刚度退化通过一个独立变量与phase-field变量解耦，消除了对长度尺度参数的几何约束，并增强了计算灵活性。该框架通过定制的特征函数支持任意软化定律，捕捉峰值后的应力-应变响应，并消除了对损伤历史变量的需求。一种半显式数值方案，结合了显式平衡算法和用于phase-field演化的相邻单元法，在ABAQUS/Explicit中实现。基准验证证实了长度尺度参数在各种软化定律下的影响最小。通过调整阈值，该模型再现了广泛的失效模式——包括（准）脆性断裂与韧性断裂之间的转变——同时在宏观层面上准确捕捉了位错介导的金属和纤维桥接主导的伪弹塑性UHPC中的应变硬化和断裂，从而证明了其在韧性断裂分析中的广泛适用性和鲁棒性。

title: Effective behavior of heterogeneous media governed by strain gradient elasticity
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Various mechanical phenomena depend on the length scale, and these have inspired a variety of nonlocal and higher gradient continuum theories. Mechanistically, it is believed that the length scale dependence arises due to an interplay between the length scale of heterogeneities in the material, the length scale of the material being probed and the phenomenon under study. In this paper, we seek to understand this interplay in a simple setting by studying the overall behavior of a one-dimensional periodic medium governed by strain gradient elasticity at the microstructural scale. We find through numerical experiments that the overall behavior is not described by a strain gradient elasticity. In other words, strain gradient theories are not invariant under averaging at this scale. We also find that the overall behavior may be described by a kernel-based nonlocal elasticity theory, but the kernel is highly oscillatory with slow decay. So we seek alternate characterization. First, we limit our interest to a range of length scales, and show that the behavior is described well by fractional strain gradient elasticity. Consequently, one can obtain various scaling laws with exponent between zero (classical elasticity) and one (strain-gradient elasticity). Second, we take a data-driven approach, and show that we can describe the overall behavior over a range of scales using a Fourier neural operator.
ai_text: 各种力学现象依赖于长度尺度，这激发了一系列非局部和高阶梯度连续介质理论的发展。从机制上讲，长度尺度依赖性源于材料中异质性的长度尺度、被探测材料的长度尺度以及所研究现象之间的相互作用。在本文中，我们通过研究在微观结构尺度上受应变梯度弹性支配的一维周期介质的整体行为，试图在一个简单背景下理解这种相互作用。通过数值实验，我们发现整体行为不能用应变梯度弹性来描述。换句话说，应变梯度理论在这个尺度下的平均过程中不是不变的。我们还发现，整体行为可能可以用基于核的非局部弹性理论来描述，但该核高度振荡且衰减缓慢。因此，我们寻求替代的表征方法。首先，我们将兴趣限制在一定长度尺度范围内，并表明该行为可以用分数阶应变梯度弹性很好地描述。因此，可以得到指数在零（经典弹性）和一（应变梯度弹性）之间的各种标度律。其次，我们采用数据驱动的方法，并表明我们可以使用傅里叶神经算子来描述一系列尺度上的整体行为。

title: Numerical experiments with a poro-viscoelastic continuum model for gels
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: The mechanical behavior of many hydrogels is governed by the coupled effects of viscoelasticity, arising from molecular rearrangements, and poroelasticity, due to fluid diffusion through the network. In this work, we develop a fully three-dimensional poro-viscoelastic model formulated with the equilibrium swollen state as the reference configuration. The model is consistent with thermodynamic constraints and capable of capturing complex time-dependent responses observed in polymeric, fibrous and brush gels. Through numerical simulations, we demonstrate that the model reproduces experimentally observed phenomena, including filament thinning in extensional rheology of polymeric gels and stress relaxation in step-wise compression of fibrous gels. Furthermore, we show that for brush gels with fixed small-strain shear modulus, mechanical behavior is governed by two key parameters: G 2, which modulates rate-dependent effects, and β, which controls the degree of strain stiffening. The model exhibits limitations in accurately capturing strong tension-induced stiffening and tensile dilation observed in certain brush gels due to the assumption of isochoricity in viscoelasticity. Finally, we show that hysteresis behavior under cyclic compression and indentation exhibits a non-monotonic dependence on the loading rate, governed by the intrinsic relaxation timescale of the network.
ai_text: 许多水凝胶的力学行为受粘弹性（源于分子重排）和孔隙弹性（由于流体在网络上扩散）的耦合效应支配。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个完全三维的孔隙-粘弹性模型，以平衡溶胀状态作为参考构型。该模型符合热力学约束，并能捕捉在聚合物凝胶、纤维凝胶和刷状凝胶中观察到的复杂时间依赖性响应。通过数值模拟，我们证明该模型能复现实验观察到的现象，包括聚合物凝胶在拉伸流变学中的细丝变薄和纤维凝胶在逐步压缩中的应力松弛。此外，我们表明，对于具有固定小应变剪切模量的刷状凝胶，其力学行为由两个关键参数控制：G 2，它调节速率依赖性效应；β，它控制应变硬化的程度。该模型在准确捕捉某些刷状凝胶中观察到的强张力诱导硬化和拉伸膨胀方面存在局限性，这是由于粘弹性中的等容性假设。最后，我们表明，循环压缩和压痕下的滞后行为表现出对加载速率的非单调依赖性，这由网络的本征松弛时间尺度控制。

title: Trapped fluids and dry zones: Adhesion’s role in soft lubrication instabilities
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Recent experiments have shown that adhesive interactions play a significant role in soft lubrication, introducing instabilities that drastically alter contact dynamics. These interactions disrupt fluid flow and generate surface undulations on soft substrates subjected to normal contact, creating dry zones and pockets which trap fluid and can significantly increase drainage time. In sliding experiments, such instabilities are found to trigger a transition from the elasto-hydrodynamic lubrication (EHL) regime to the mixed lubrication regime—even on smooth surfaces where roughness is negligible compared to the fluid gap thickness. In this study, we incorporate adhesive forces into the Reynolds lubrication theory to study instabilities arising during normal contact between a rigid surface and a soft substrate. A linear stability analysis reveals a dimensionless parameter, α, that predicts when small surface perturbations can grow and becomes unstable. To investigate the nonlinear evolution of these instabilities, we develop a numerical solver that couples a finite difference method for the Reynolds equation with a finite element method for elastic deformation of the substrate. Our simulations show that when α > 1, adhesion alone can induce "dry" contact zones—regions with nearly zero fluid thickness—separated by pockets of trapped fluid.
ai_text: 最近实验表明，粘附相互作用在软润滑中扮演重要角色，引入了显著改变接触动力学的不稳定性。这些相互作用扰乱了流体流动，并在承受法向接触的软基底上产生表面起伏，形成了干区和捕获流体的囊袋，从而显著增加排水时间。在滑动实验中，发现这种不稳定性会触发从弹性流体动力润滑（EHL）状态向混合润滑状态的转变——即使在粗糙度与流体间隙厚度相比可忽略的光滑表面上也是如此。在本研究中，我们将粘附力纳入雷诺润滑理论，以研究刚性表面与软基底之间法向接触过程中产生的不稳定性。线性稳定性分析揭示了一个无量纲参数α，该参数预测了何时小表面扰动会增长并变得不稳定。为了研究这些不稳定性的非线性演化，我们开发了一个数值求解器，该求解器将用于雷诺方程的有限差分法与用于基底弹性变形的有限元法耦合起来。我们的模拟表明，当α > 1时，仅粘附力就能诱导“干”接触区——即流体厚度几乎为零的区域——这些区域被捕获流体的囊袋分隔开。

title: A study of short-crack growth behaviour in an AM Ti alloy using an anisotropic phase field model coupled with crystal plasticity
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: This work investigates the fundamental failure mechanism associated with the growth of micro-structurally small cracks in an α′-phase Ti alloy fabricated by additive manufacturing (AM). Such alloy is used in critical components of aero-engines, where the uncertainty in the assessment about how long it will take for micro-structurally small cracks to grow to a critical size is crucial to the prediction and improvement of their operating lifetime. To that purpose, a new anisotropic phase field model coupled with non-local crystal plasticity is developed to study the effects of microstructural features of the additive manufactured α′-Ti alloy on the growth behaviour of small cracks. The coupled thermodynamic based formulation has been implemented numerically into the finite element method and used to study the behaviour of micro-structurally small cracks growing from AM defects. The results of the modelling work enabled the identification of (i) the best metric to define the local crack growth direction (i.e. maximal principal stress direction and normal to the plane of maximum accumulated plastic slip), (ii) the role played by the local stored strain energy as a driving force for small crack nucleation and growth from AM defects in the Ti alloy, and (iii) the effect of the AM microstructural features in general on the formation of hot spots or microcrack initiation sites.
ai_text: 本研究探讨了与增材制造（AM）制备的α′相钛合金中微结构小裂纹生长相关的基本失效机制。该合金用于航空发动机的关键部件，其中评估微结构小裂纹生长至临界尺寸所需时间的不确定性对于预测和改进其使用寿命至关重要。为此，开发了一种新的各向异性相场模型，结合非局部晶体塑性，以研究增材制造α′相钛合金的微观结构特征对小裂纹生长行为的影响。基于热力学的耦合公式已数值实现于有限元方法中，并用于研究从AM缺陷生长的微结构小裂纹的行为。建模工作的结果使得能够识别：(i) 定义局部裂纹生长方向的最佳度量（即最大主应力方向和最大累积塑性滑移平面的法线方向），(ii) 局部储存应变能作为钛合金中AM缺陷处小裂纹形核和生长的驱动力的作用，以及(iii) AM微观结构特征总体上对热点或微裂纹萌生位置形成的影响。

title: Selecting deformation patterns in Cosserat crystal plasticity by incremental energy minimization
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: In this paper, a strictly variational, rate-independent micropolar (or Cosserat, equivalently) crystal-plasticity framework is developed, aimed at capturing the spontaneous emergence of deformation bands in metallic single crystals. The incremental energy minimization approach is extended to encompass the Cosserat model of crystal plasticity at small strain by embedding it in the thermodynamic framework of gradient plasticity with energetic forces. It is shown that all balance equations and constitutive inequalities, including the consistency conditions, are then retrieved by minimizing the derived incremental energy function. The energetic preference of deformation banding is predicted analytically when the cross-hardening of slip systems exceeds their self-hardening and the band wavelength exceeds the established minimum value. To enhance clarity of the main concept, the simplest version of the Cosserat crystal plasticity is employed, and the examples are calculated using a plane-strain model in which the twelve fcc slip systems are reduced to three effective plastic slip mechanisms. The implementation of the incremental energy minimization scheme within the finite element numerical code has enabled automatic reproduction of deformation bands without resorting to artificial perturbations or geometric imperfections. In contrast to the more frequently analyzed case of isolated shear bands, the entire domain becomes filled with a laminated pattern formed by deformation bands with alternating slip-system activity. The simulations demonstrate the capacity of the Cosserat crystal plasticity model, when embedded in the incremental energy minimization approach, to predict and regulate complex deformation patterns, incorporating internal interfaces and length-scale effects.
ai_text: 本文发展了一种严格变分、率无关的微极（或等价地，Cosserat）晶体塑性框架，旨在捕捉金属单晶中变形带的自发出现。通过将增量能量最小化方法嵌入到带有能量力的梯度塑性热力学框架中，将其扩展至涵盖小应变下的Cosserat晶体塑性模型。研究表明，通过最小化导出的增量能量函数，可以恢复所有平衡方程和本构不等式，包括一致性条件。当滑移系统的交叉硬化超过其自硬化且带波长超过设定的最小值时，变形带形成的能量偏好可通过解析方式预测。为增强主要概念的清晰度，采用了最简单的Cosserat晶体塑性版本，并使用平面应变模型进行计算示例，其中十二个面心立方（fcc）滑移系统被简化为三个有效塑性滑移机制。在有限元数值代码中实现增量能量最小化方案，使得变形带能够自动再现，而无需借助人为扰动或几何缺陷。与更常分析的孤立剪切带情况不同，整个区域被由交替滑移系统活动形成的变形带所构成的层状图案填充。模拟结果表明，当嵌入增量能量最小化方法时，Cosserat晶体塑性模型能够预测和调控复杂变形图案，并纳入内部界面和长度尺度效应。

title: Universal scaling laws and a geometric mapping framework for deep indentation of soft materials
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Deep indentation of soft materials is common in biological and engineering systems, yet accurate predictions of contact behaviors at large indentation depths remain elusive. Classical Hertz theory and its extensions break down when the indentation depth becomes comparable to or exceeds the indenter radius, because these models are formulated in the undeformed configuration and cannot capture the dominant geometric nonlinearity. Here we develop a geometric mapping approach that establishes a Hertz-type normal pressure distribution in the deformed configuration, enabling analytical solutions for contact pressure, force, and radius under extremely large deformations. Closed-form expressions predict the full nonlinear evolution of the contact region, including the depth at which the sphere becomes fully submerged. Finite element simulations using neo-Hookean and Arruda Boyce materials confirm that geometric effects dominate over material nonlinearity for a broad class of elastomers. Experiments on polymers, food substrates, and biological tissues further validate a universal scaling law that collapses all measurements onto a single master curve. The proposed framework unifies deep indentation across soft materials and provides a fundamental basis for nonlinear contact mechanics with direct implications for soft robotics, tactile sensors, medical diagnostics, and tissue mechanics.
ai_text: 软材料的深度压痕在生物和工程系统中很常见，然而，在大压痕深度下接触行为的准确预测仍然难以实现。当压痕深度与压头半径相当或超过时，经典的赫兹理论及其扩展失效，因为这些模型基于未变形构型建立，无法捕捉主导的几何非线性。本文提出了一种几何映射方法，在变形构型中建立了赫兹型法向压力分布，从而在极大变形下获得了接触压力、力和半径的解析解。闭合形式表达式预测了接触区域的完整非线性演化，包括球体完全浸没的深度。使用 neo-Hookean 和 Arruda Boyce 材料的有限元模拟证实，对于一大类弹性体，几何效应主导于材料非线性。对聚合物、食品基底和生物组织的实验进一步验证了一个普适标度律，该律将所有测量数据坍缩到一条主曲线上。所提出的框架统一了软材料的深度压痕，并为非线性接触力学提供了基础，对软体机器人、触觉传感器、医学诊断和组织力学具有直接意义。

title: The mechanics of the Less In More Out artificial heart: Modeling fabric-based soft robotic devices
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Recently, the Less In More Out device, a fluidically actuated soft total artificial heart was proposed. This device uses arrays of pouch motors to achieve a positive fluidic lever when pneumatically actuated against physiological hemodynamic conditions. Extensive experimental characterization demonstrated its potential; however, experiments alone cannot resolve the internal mechanical fields that govern device durability and performance. Here, we develop a computational framework to investigate intrinsic device mechanics, such as stress concentrations, strain paths, and fatigue life, and to explore targeted design modifications that improve durability and efficiency. We show that our model reproduces the nonlinear deformations and pressure–volume relationships measured experimentally under varying hemodynamic conditions. Across designs, devices with fewer pouches deliver higher stroke volumes but exhibit up to 50% higher peak von Mises stresses, which reduces their fatigue life. Our simulations further identify heat-sealed seams and buckling regions as durability-limiting features. As a proof of concept, we vary the valve support aspect ratio and relative endocardial-epicardial pouch fabric compliance, reducing the peak von Mises stress by ∼ 10% while maintaining identical physiological outputs and improving mechanical efficiency. Overall, our framework enables detailed evaluation of stress hotspots, buckling, and fatigue life, and offers a foundation for optimizing artificial hearts and other fluidically actuated fabric-based soft robotic devices.
ai_text: 最近，Less In More Out 装置，一种流体驱动的软体全人工心脏被提出。该装置使用袋式马达阵列，在气动驱动下对抗生理血流动力学条件时，实现正的流体杠杆。广泛的实验表征展示了其潜力；然而，仅凭实验无法解析控制装置耐久性和性能的内部力学场。在此，我们开发了一个计算框架，以研究内在装置力学，如应力集中、应变路径和疲劳寿命，并探索提高耐久性和效率的针对性设计修改。我们表明，我们的模型再现了在不同血流动力学条件下实验测量的非线性变形和压力-体积关系。在不同设计中，袋数较少的装置提供更高的每搏输出量，但表现出高达50%更高的峰值 von Mises 应力，这降低了它们的疲劳寿命。我们的模拟进一步识别出热封接缝和屈曲区域作为耐久性限制特征。作为概念验证，我们改变阀支撑纵横比和相对心内膜-心外膜袋织物顺应性，将峰值 von Mises 应力降低约10%，同时保持相同的生理输出并提高机械效率。总体而言，我们的框架能够详细评估应力热点、屈曲和疲劳寿命，并为优化人工心脏和其他流体驱动的基于织物的软体机器人装置提供基础。

title: Uniqueness of solutions in high-energy x-ray based ‘eigenstrain tomography’ and other inverse eigenstrain problems: Counter examples and necessary conditions for well-posedness
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Eigenstrain tomography combines diffraction-based strain measurement with elasticity theory to reconstruct full three-dimensional residual stress fields within solids. Notwithstanding a number of recent examples, the uniqueness of such reconstructions has not yet been clearly established. In this paper, we examine the underlying inverse problem in detail and construct explicit counterexamples demonstrating non-uniqueness for a recent implementation of x-ray eigenstrain tomography involving reconstruction from a single measured component of strain. We follow on to explore minimum conditions for well-posedness and conclude that the full elastic strain tensor within an isotropic sample can be uniquely reconstructed from three measured components; specifically the three shear components, or the three diagonal components. We further prove two key results related to eigenstrain reconstruction in a general sense; 1. That any possible residual stress field can be generated by a diagonal eigenstrain and 2. That residual stress fields exist that cannot be generated by isotropic eigenstrains. Together, these findings establish rigorous minimum experimental and computational requirements for well-posed eigenstrain tomography techniques and inverse eigenstrain problems in general.
ai_text: Eigenstrain tomography 结合基于衍射的应变测量和弹性理论，以重建固体内部完整的三维残余应力场。尽管最近有许多例子，但此类重建的唯一性尚未明确确立。在本文中，我们详细研究了基础逆问题，并构建了明确的反例，证明了最近一种 X 射线 eigenstrain tomography 实现中的非唯一性，该实现涉及从单个测量的应变分量进行重建。我们接着探索适定性的最小条件，并得出结论：各向同性样品内的完整弹性应变张量可以从三个测量的分量唯一重建；具体来说，是三个剪切分量或三个对角分量。我们进一步证明了与特征应变重建相关的两个关键结果；1. 任何可能的残余应力场都可以由对角特征应变生成；2. 存在不能由各向同性特征应变生成的残余应力场。总之，这些发现为适定的 eigenstrain tomography 技术和一般的逆特征应变问题建立了严格的实验和计算最小要求。

title: Damage localization as a bifurcation phenomenon and the resulting fracture patterns in soft materials
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Symmetry breaking phenomena are central to the morphogenesis of natural structures and can also be harnessed in engineered soft materials subjected to external loads. While traditionally viewed as elastic instabilities, these phenomena may involve irreversible processes such as damage and fracture, significantly influencing the morphology of resultant patterns. Here, we investigate instabilities arising during radial expansion of soft, incompressible cylindrical bodies, employing a gradient damage framework coupled with hyperelastic constitutive modeling. Our analytical bifurcation analysis identifies the critical thresholds at which symmetric cavity growth transitions into localized, multi-lobed fracture modes, explicitly delineating how geometry, toughness, and intrinsic damage length scales govern the selection and morphology of these fracture patterns. Comparison with finite element simulations reveals a notable delay in the numerically predicted bifurcation threshold, highlighting limitations in existing finite element based methods, and underscoring the necessity of analytical benchmarks for accurate fracture initiation predictions. Ultimately, this work provides a road map for accurate prediction of damage induced bifurcations and sheds light on the role of geometry and constitutive properties in determining the failure modes of expanding tubular structures.
ai_text: 对称性破缺现象是自然结构形态发生的核心，也可以在受外部载荷的工程软材料中被利用。虽然传统上被视为弹性失稳，但这些现象可能涉及不可逆过程，如损伤和断裂，显著影响结果图案的形态。在此，我们研究了软质、不可压缩圆柱体在径向膨胀过程中出现的失稳，采用了梯度损伤框架与超弹性本构模型相结合的方法。我们的解析分岔分析确定了对称空腔生长转变为局部化、多瓣断裂模式的临界阈值，明确描述了几何、韧性和固有损伤长度尺度如何支配这些断裂模式的选择和形态。与有限元模拟的比较揭示了数值预测的分岔阈值存在显著延迟，突出了现有基于有限元的方法的局限性，并强调了解析基准对于准确预测断裂起始的必要性。最终，这项工作为准确预测损伤诱导的分岔提供了路线图，并阐明了几何和本构性质在决定膨胀管状结构失效模式中的作用。

title: A numerical spectral model for shear transformation zone dynamics in heterogeneous metallic glasses
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: A shear transformation zone dynamics numerical model using a spectral micromechanical solver based on fast Fourier transform algorithms is developed to study the effects of elastic stiffness spatial heterogeneities and/or porosity on shear localization and mechanical response of metallic glasses. The model is applied to Vitreloy 1 material system. In the model, the activation rate for individual shear events depends on the local stress field, while the nucleation time and the selection of the shear direction and nuclei positions are determined using a kinetic Monte-Carlo algorithm. A small strain framework with heterogeneous elasticity is used to predict strain localization at low temperatures and strain rates. Similar to existing finite element implementations, the shear transformation volumes are introduced as plastic eigenstrains within the spectral micromechanical solver and stress equilibrium is enforced. The effects of local elastic stiffness heterogeneity and porosity on shear band activity and mechanical response are first analyzed by performing 2D simulations. Results show that the spatial heterogeneity of elastic stiffness and/or porosity can significantly affect strain localization and maintain high mechanical strength; their combined action is further beneficial to the overall response of the system. Next, 3D microstructures with homogeneous/heterogeneous elasticity are simulated. As in 2D, the formation of multiple STZ clusters in soft regions produces a smoother elastoplastic transition in 3D volumes. However, unlike the 2D case, the 3D simulations ultimately develop an intense, locally wavy shear band, enabled by the fully three-dimensional internal stress state and the greater freedom in shear orientations. The 3D results thus show that local heterogeneity in elastic stiffness delays the onset of shear localization and enhances the overall plasticity of metallic glasses.
ai_text: 开发了一种基于快速傅里叶变换算法的谱微观力学求解器的剪切转变区动力学数值模型，用于研究弹性刚度空间异质性和/或孔隙率对金属玻璃剪切局部化和力学响应的影响。该模型应用于 Vitreloy 1 材料系统。在模型中，单个剪切事件的激活速率取决于局部应力场，而成核时间以及剪切方向和核位置的选择使用动力学蒙特卡洛算法确定。采用具有异质弹性小应变框架来预测低温和低应变率下的应变局部化。类似于现有的有限元实现，剪切转变体积作为塑性特征应变引入谱微观力学求解器中，并强制应力平衡。首先通过进行二维模拟分析了局部弹性刚度异质性和孔隙率对剪切带活动和力学响应的影响。结果表明，弹性刚度的空间异质性和/或孔隙率可以显著影响应变局部化并保持高机械强度；它们的联合作用进一步有益于系统的整体响应。接下来，模拟了具有均匀/异质弹性的三维微结构。与二维情况类似，在软区域中多个 STZ 簇的形成在三维体积中产生更平滑的弹塑性转变。然而，与二维情况不同，三维模拟最终发展出一个强烈的、局部波动的剪切带，这是由于完全三维的内部应力状态和剪切方向上的更大自由度所促成的。因此，三维结果表明，弹性刚度的局部异质性延迟了剪切局部化的发生，并增强了金属玻璃的整体塑性。

title: Configurational forces explain echelon cracks in soft materials
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Soft fracture in highly deformable solids involves both geometric and constitutive nonlinearities, necessitating advanced theoretical and computational frameworks for its accurate understanding. Tensile fractures subjected to mixed-mode loading deviate from their original planar shape, resulting in echelon crack patterns. When out-of-plane shear is superimposed, a crack front segments into an array of tilted facets. The physical interpretation of echelon cracks is only marginally understood, and it is typically based on rather limited approaches within Linear Elastic Fracture Mechanics. Here, we investigate mixed-mode I + III fracture within the framework of configurational mechanics. Using the Configurational Force Method, implemented as a post-processing algorithm in a finite-element-based simulation, we compute the configurational forces that act at the crack tip of model fracture geometries prior to propagation. Configurational forces characterize both the magnitude and direction of propagation for maximal energy release rate. Our results reveal the complex interactions between tilted facets and their critical role in shaping the fracture morphology. We also examine the effects of facet coalescence—driven by the growth of the parent crack—where neighboring facets merge into a unified crack front. These findings provide new insights into fracture processes in soft, quasi-brittle materials under mixed-mode loading.
ai_text: 高度可变形固体中的软断裂涉及几何和本构非线性，需要先进的理论和计算框架以准确理解。受混合模式加载的拉伸断裂偏离其原始平面形状，导致梯队裂纹图案。当叠加面外剪切时，裂纹前缘分割成一系列倾斜面。对梯队裂纹的物理解释仅被有限理解，且通常基于线性弹性断裂力学中相当有限的方法。在此，我们在构型力学的框架内研究混合模式 I + III 断裂。使用构型力方法，作为基于有限元模拟的后处理算法实现，我们计算了在传播前作用于模型断裂几何裂纹尖端的构型力。构型力表征了最大能量释放率下传播的大小和方向。我们的结果揭示了倾斜面之间的复杂相互作用及其在塑造断裂形态中的关键作用。我们还研究了面合并效应——由母裂纹生长驱动——其中相邻面合并成一个统一的裂纹前缘。这些发现为混合模式加载下软质、准脆性材料中的断裂过程提供了新的见解。

title: Initiation of regularized cracks is explained by the coupled criterion
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Matched asymptotic expansions and phase-field regularization are combined to propose an implementation of the coupled criterion that accounts for the presence of an initial process zone. The initial process zone is introduced by prescribing phase-field Dirichlet boundary conditions around the crack initiation location, which allows us to study either sharp or regularized crack initiation through an initial process zone. An increase in the initially prescribed phase-field value enlarges the effective process zone and progressively reduces the stress singularity at the V-notch tip, showing that even a partially developed process zone can mitigate singular stresses through non-uniform stiffness, without requiring plastic regularization. Furthermore the process zone tends to decrease the incremental energy release rate, thus resulting in a higher initiation generalized stress intensity factor than the one obtained without an initial process zone. The findings reveal that, unlike Griffith’s singular formulation, the phase-field model remains intrinsically regularized – even in the vanishing-length limit – raising the fundamental question of whether truly sharp cracks can exist or if a finite process zone always emerges through local structural rearrangement. The proposed approach thus extends the coupled criterion to study crack initiation and propagation in quasi-brittle materials.
ai_text: 匹配渐近展开与相场正则化相结合，提出了一种考虑初始过程区存在的耦合准则实现方法。通过在裂纹起始位置周围规定相场狄利克雷边界条件引入初始过程区，这使得我们可以通过初始过程区研究尖锐或正则化的裂纹起始。初始规定的相场值增加会扩大有效过程区，并逐渐降低V-notch尖端的应力奇异性，这表明即使部分发展的过程区也能通过非均匀刚度减轻奇异应力，而无需塑性正则化。此外，过程区倾向于降低增量能量释放率，从而导致比没有初始过程区时更高的起始广义应力强度因子。研究结果表明，与格里菲斯奇异公式不同，相场模型本质上是正则化的——即使在消失长度极限下——这引发了一个基本问题：真正尖锐的裂纹是否存在，或者是否总是通过局部结构重排出现有限过程区。因此，所提出的方法扩展了耦合准则，用于研究准脆性材料中的裂纹起始和扩展。

title: A unified transient network theory for viscoplastic response of dynamic polymer networks
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: The Transient Network Theory (TNT) offers a physically grounded continuum framework for modeling the mechanics of dynamic polymer networks, where the bonds continuously dissociate (or break) and (re)associate (or reform) over time. The strength of the TNT lies in its bottom-up molecular approach, which links macroscopic mechanical response to microscopic chain-level kinetics, thereby predicting viscoplastic flow as an emergent outcome of reversible bond dynamics. Since its inception by Green and Tobolsky (1946), TNT has been extensively applied to study polymer rheology; however, it has never been examined within the broader context of alternative, more traditional theories, such as finite viscoplasticity. The latter adopts a thermodynamically consistent, top-down approach typically based on (1) the multiplicative decomposition of the deformation gradient into elastic and inelastic parts, and (2) the principle of maximum plastic dissipation. This raises a fundamental question: in what ways is the viscoplastic behavior of dynamic polymer networks, as predicted by TNT, different from that of finite viscoplasticity? Understanding this distinction is essential for novel material design and synthesis, as it informs the selection of the most appropriate theoretical framework for accurately modeling and predicting material response. The objective of this study is twofold. First, to perform a detailed comparative analysis between TNT and finite viscoplasticity, demonstrating TNT’s suitability for modeling dynamic polymer networks. To this end, we conduct a rigorous mathematical examination of TNT within the setting of continuum mechanics, drawing explicit parallels with classical formulations, such as those by Simo (1998). By integrating polymer physics and continuum mechanics, we also reformulate the TNT in a unified manner. The resulting unified framework, validated against kinetic Monte Carlo simulations, unveils new mechanistic insights into the distinct roles of chain association and dissociation in governing macroscopic flow. Second, the unified TNT extends the conventional version to encompass both compressible and incompressible responses, thereby broadening its applicability to a diverse range of materials, including dynamic hydrogels. This involves presenting a systematic thermodynamically motivated approach to prescribe flow rules within TNT.
ai_text: 瞬态网络理论（TNT）提供了一个物理基础的连续介质框架，用于建模动态聚合物网络的力学行为，其中键随时间不断解离（或断裂）和（再）结合（或重组）。TNT的优势在于其自下而上的分子方法，将宏观力学响应与微观链级动力学联系起来，从而预测粘塑性流动作为可逆键动力学的涌现结果。自Green和Tobolsky（1946）提出以来，TNT已广泛应用于聚合物流变学研究；然而，它从未在更广泛的替代性、更传统理论的背景下进行过检验，例如有限粘塑性。后者采用热力学一致的自上而下方法，通常基于（1）变形梯度乘法分解为弹性和非弹性部分，以及（2）最大塑性耗散原理。这引发了一个基本问题：由TNT预测的动态聚合物网络的粘塑性行为，在哪些方面与有限粘塑性不同？理解这种区别对于新材料设计和合成至关重要，因为它为选择最合适的理论框架以准确建模和预测材料响应提供了信息。本研究的目标是双重的。首先，对TNT和有限粘塑性进行详细的比较分析，证明TNT适用于建模动态聚合物网络。为此，我们在连续介质力学背景下对TNT进行严格的数学检验，与经典公式（如Simo（1998）的公式）进行明确类比。通过整合聚合物物理和连续介质力学，我们还以统一的方式重新表述了TNT。所得的统一框架，通过动力学蒙特卡洛模拟验证，揭示了链结合和解离在控制宏观流动中的不同作用的新机制见解。其次，统一的TNT扩展了传统版本，以涵盖可压缩和不可压缩响应，从而拓宽了其适用于多种材料的范围，包括动态水凝胶。这涉及提出一种系统的热力学驱动方法来规定TNT内的流动规则。

title: Real-time prediction of thin-film wrinkling pattern by cGAN embedded into an innovative framework from 2D results to 3D morphology
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Wrinkling behaviors are widely observed from micro- to macro-scale materials and structures. Finite element method (FEM)-based numerical methods for simulating the detailed 3D morphology of wrinkles include implicit nonlinear buckling analysis and explicit pseudo-dynamics. However, the convergence is hard to achieve, and computation is inefficient for a large number of DOFs. This paper proposes an innovative and efficient approach to obtain 3D wrinkling morphologies of isotropic membranes using 2D FEM results obtained from Tension Field Theory (TFT), and leveraging a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) to achieve real-time prediction. Three main contributions of this study include: (i) an efficient 3D wrinkle database for training is constructed according to the wrinkling strain concept and a physically consistent constraint considering Poisson correction; (ii) the cGAN is generalized by designing a deep-convolutional conditional architecture and setting a hybrid loss function balancing adversarial loss and pixel-level L1 reconstruction; (iii) a fine-tuning technology able to integrate scarce experimental data or theoretical result is employed to improve the computational accuracy. The established cGAN is validated by two typical examples, which show that the computational efficiency is improved by several orders of magnitude, compared with the FEM-based post-buckling analysis. The study presents a promising AI-enhanced paradigm for the simulation of wrinkling, which encourages us to develop a powerful wrinkle generator in the future by collecting millions of training data, including a variety of geometries, loads and boundary conditions. The proposed method is also expected to be extended to orthotropic or hyperelastic thin films in finite strain.
ai_text: 褶皱行为在从微观到宏观尺度的材料和结构中被广泛观察到。基于有限元方法（FEM）的数值方法用于模拟褶皱的详细三维形态，包括隐式非线性屈曲分析和显式伪动力学。然而，收敛难以实现，并且对于大量自由度（DOFs）的计算效率低下。本文提出了一种创新且高效的方法，利用从张力场理论（TFT）获得的二维有限元结果，并借助条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）来实现实时预测，以获得各向同性薄膜的三维褶皱形态。本研究的三个主要贡献包括：(i) 根据褶皱应变概念和考虑泊松修正的物理一致约束，构建了一个高效的三维褶皱训练数据库；(ii) 通过设计深度卷积条件架构和设置平衡对抗损失和像素级L1重建的混合损失函数，对cGAN进行了泛化；(iii) 采用了一种能够整合稀缺实验数据或理论结果的微调技术，以提高计算精度。通过两个典型示例验证了所建立的cGAN，结果表明，与基于有限元的后屈曲分析相比，计算效率提高了数个数量级。该研究提出了一个有望的AI增强褶皱模拟范式，鼓励我们在未来通过收集数百万训练数据（包括各种几何形状、载荷和边界条件）来开发一个强大的褶皱生成器。所提出的方法也有望扩展到有限应变下的正交各向异性或超弹性薄膜。

title: Programmable mechanical metasurfaces enabled by pre-compressed curved beam architectures
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: This work presents a comprehensive study of bistability in elastic beams, with a focus on the pre-compressed curved beam as a unique structure exhibiting both tunability and asymmetry in its potential energy landscape. Analytical modeling, supported by finite element simulations and experimental validation, reveals the conditions under which bistability emerges and defines a discriminant surface separating bistable and non-bistable regimes. Unlike conventional bistable systems that rely on lateral loading to overcome energy barriers, the pre-compressed curved beam enables an alternative stable state switching mechanism: the switching is achieved by tuning axial compression to reshape the energy landscape from bistable to non-bistable and back, enabling a controlled stable state transition. Based on this mechanism, a coupled beam design is introduced as a unit cell for constructing programmable 2D metasurfaces. The switching behavior of these units is characterized, and metasurfaces of increasing complexity are demonstrated to achieve diverse and reconfigurable patterns via boundary loading or localized expansion. These findings provide a scalable strategy for shape-programmable mechanical systems with potential applications in soft robotics, adaptive surfaces, and deployable structures.
ai_text: 本研究对弹性梁中的双稳态性进行了全面研究，重点关注预压缩曲梁作为一种独特结构，在其势能景观中表现出可调性和不对称性。通过有限元模拟和实验验证支持的分析建模，揭示了双稳态性出现的条件，并定义了一个区分双稳态和非稳态区域的判别面。与依赖横向加载来克服能量势垒的传统双稳态系统不同，预压缩曲梁提供了一种替代的稳态切换机制：通过调节轴向压缩来重塑势能景观，从双稳态到非稳态再返回，从而实现可控的稳态转变。基于此机制，引入了一种耦合梁设计作为构建可编程二维超表面的单元细胞。这些单元的切换行为被表征，并且展示了复杂度递增的超表面，通过边界加载或局部膨胀实现多样化和可重构的图案。这些发现为形状可编程机械系统提供了一种可扩展的策略，在软体机器人、自适应表面和可展开结构中具有潜在应用。

title: Structural transition paths of tungsten oxide under static and dynamic extreme conditions
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Static-temperature and pressure factors can drive unique transition pathways on the same test sample, and one of the classic examples is TiO2. However, the phase stability order and transition pathways are greatly altered under dynamic shocked conditions. Herein, we study the structural and morphological responses of tungsten oxide nanoparticles (γ-WO3 NPs) under acoustic shock conditions, and the observed structural results are compared with shocked anatase-TiO2 NPs. From the static compression and heating experiments, the stability order is found to be anatase-TiO2>γ-WO3 NPs. However, according to the present experimental results, the stability order is found to be γ-WO3 > anatase-TiO2 NPs. A thermal conductivity-dependent superheating approach is adopted to explain the stability order. The investigation provides a new frame of knowledge to understand the structural response and its transition pathways under static compression and acoustic shock conditions, which may lead to a new chapter to understand the structural phase transitions in solids.

title: A multiscale investigation into the electroplastic effects in copper: Experiments and crystal plasticity modeling
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Electroplastic effects in metals show measurable changes in the exerted force in deformation processes under certain electric current conditions, holding potential to facilitate metal forming. However, the application of these effects is hindered by the so far unclear image of the underlying mechanisms, and the corresponding contributions are debatable. This work aims to quantitatively elucidate the athermal mechanisms of electroplasticity in copper with experimental and computational methods combined. Temperature-controlled pulsed-current electricity-assisted deformation (EAD) tests were conducted to emphasize athermal contributions, while large-area EBSD, two-beam TEM, and high-resolution EBSD (HR-EBSD) measurements were used to characterize texture evolution, slip systems, and semi-quantitative dislocation density. Then, a crystal plasticity model, incorporating electroplasticity-related mechanisms with thermodynamic evolution formulas, was applied to support a mechanism-focused interpretation of the observed electroplastic responses from dislocation behaviors. Analysis reveals that the reduced work hardening observed in the stress–strain curves originates from fluctuations in the local response. These fluctuations exhibit a characteristic two-stage behavior, consisting of a “rapid drop” followed by a “slow decline” of stress response. The associated changes in maximum flow stress and macroscopic work-hardening rate arise from the cumulative effect of EAD-induced softening during current pulses, which is linked to the recovery of statistically stored dislocations (SSDs). By quantitatively connecting short-term information to macroscopic stress–strain evolution within an electricity-coupled crystal plasticity framework and comparing with experimental textures and dislocation densities, this work provides mechanistic interpretations of athermal mechanisms and consolidate the understanding of electroplasticity in metals.
ai_text: 金属中的电塑性效应在特定电流条件下的变形过程中表现出可测量的受力变化，具有促进金属成形的潜力。然而，由于底层机制至今尚不清晰，这些效应的应用受到阻碍，且相应的贡献存在争议。本研究旨在通过实验和计算方法相结合，定量阐明铜中电塑性的非热机制。进行了温控脉冲电流辅助变形（EAD）测试以强调非热贡献，同时使用大面积EBSD、双束TEM和高分辨率EBSD（HR-EBSD）测量来表征织构演变、滑移系统和半定量位错密度。然后，应用了一个晶体塑性模型，该模型结合了电塑性相关机制和热力学演化公式，以支持从位错行为角度对观察到的电塑性响应进行机制聚焦的解释。分析表明，在应力-应变曲线中观察到的加工硬化减少源于局部响应的波动。这些波动表现出特征性的两阶段行为，包括应力响应的“快速下降”和随后的“缓慢下降”。最大流动应力和宏观加工硬化率的相关变化源于电流脉冲期间EAD诱导软化的累积效应，这与统计存储位错（SSDs）的恢复有关。通过在电耦合晶体塑性框架内定量连接短期信息与宏观应力-应变演变，并与实验织构和位错密度进行比较，本研究提供了非热机制的机理解释，并巩固了对金属电塑性的理解。
