title: Microwave damage mechanisms of transparent conductive films
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Transparent conductive films, owing to their combination of high electrical conductivity and high optical transmittance, are widely applied in modern electronic and optoelectronic devices. Nevertheless, their electrical, thermal, and mechanical stability issues in high-frequency electromagnetic environments are becoming increasingly prominent, with microwave damage, in particular, emerging as a critical bottleneck limiting their development. This study established an experimental system for simultaneous in-situ monitoring of temperature and damage under microwave irradiation, investigating the thermo-electro-mechanical damage evolution and failure mechanisms of indium tin oxide (ITO) transparent conductive film. Firstly, experimental findings revealed an edge effect of microwave hotspots. Simulations indicate that the underlying mechanism is the variation in thin film conductivity, which drives the transition from uniform heating dominated by dielectric loss to the formation of edge hotspots dominated by conduction loss. Secondly, microwave discharge was observed to generate at the mid-position of the film edge. This phenomenon originates from microcracks formed in the ITO layer due to tensile stress generated at edge hotspots, which alters the electromagnetic field distribution and leads to electric field concentration at the microcrack tips. Thirdly, the crack propagation lagging behind the discharge trajectory was captured. It was revealed that thermal stress concentration, induced by the localized high temperatures generated by microwave discharge, is the key mechanism driving the cracking of the substrate. In addition, a strategy was proposed whereby increasing the film thickness would prevent the occurrence of microcrack. These findings serve as direct evidence for a comprehensive understanding of microwave damage of conductive thin films.
ai_text: 透明导电薄膜，由于其高电导率和高光学透射率的结合，被广泛应用于现代电子和光电子器件中。然而，它们在高频电磁环境中的电、热和机械稳定性问题日益突出，特别是微波损伤，成为限制其发展的关键瓶颈。本研究建立了一个实验系统，用于在微波辐照下同时原位监测温度和损伤，研究氧化铟锡（ITO）透明导电薄膜的热-电-机械损伤演化和失效机制。首先，实验发现揭示了微波热点的边缘效应。模拟表明，其根本机制是薄膜电导率的变化，这驱动了从以介电损耗为主的均匀加热向以传导损耗为主的边缘热点形成的转变。其次，观察到微波放电在薄膜边缘的中部位置产生。这一现象源于边缘热点产生的拉伸应力在ITO层中形成的微裂纹，这些微裂纹改变了电磁场分布，导致电场在微裂纹尖端集中。第三，捕捉到了裂纹扩展滞后于放电轨迹的现象。研究表明，由微波放电产生的局部高温引起的热应力集中，是驱动基体开裂的关键机制。此外，提出了一种通过增加薄膜厚度来防止微裂纹发生的策略。这些发现为全面理解导电薄膜的微波损伤提供了直接证据。

title: An exact dimension-reduced dynamic theory for developable surfaces and curve-fold origami
journal: Journal of the Mechanics and Physics of Solids
abstract: Curve-fold origami, composed of developable panels joined along a curved crease, exhibits rich dynamic behaviors relevant to metamaterials and soft robotic systems. Despite multiple approximated models (shell model, Kirchhoff rod model, etc.), a comprehensive and exact dynamical theory for curve-fold origami remains absent, limiting the precise prediction of its dynamics, especially for those with wide panels. In this work, we develop an exact dimension-reduced theory that focuses on the dynamics of curve-fold origami, utilizing the intrinsic one-dimensional nature of developable surfaces. As is well known in differential geometry, a curve on a developable surface determines the local frame and the shape of the developable surface under isometric constraint, making the problem indeed one-dimensional. Starting from a single developable surface, we investigate the kinematics and kinetic energy of a moving developable surface. By overcoming the difficulty of describing the motion of local frames, we derive the exact velocity field of wide surfaces solely described by the motion of the reference curve, which leads to the kinetic energy of the entire surface. The elastic energy follows the Wunderlich functional applicable to wide panels. Owing to the one-dimensional feature, the Lagrangian of the system, composed of both kinetic and elastic energy, is a functional of the reference curve. Thus, we may variate the Lagrangian and derive a nonlinear dynamical theory for the reference curve, which comprises governing equations similar to the rod model but can precisely describe the motion of developable surfaces. The theory is validated consistently in both Lagrangian and Eulerian frameworks and is further extended to curved-fold origami modeled as a coupled bi-rod system. Utilizing our exact 1D model, we theoretically analyze the dynamical behaviors of various developable structures, revealing that the coupling of curvature and torsion along with the motion of local frames in our theory leads to the accurate modeling of arbitrarily deformed developable surfaces, which are validated by finite element analysis quantitatively. Our exact dimension-reduced dynamical theory captures the motions of developable surfaces and curve-fold origami (with wide panels) accurately at relatively low computational cost (since it is 1D), offering a potential contribution to the design of dynamical developable structures.
ai_text: 曲线折叠折纸，由沿曲线折痕连接的可展面板组成，展现出与超材料和软体机器人系统相关的丰富动态行为。尽管存在多种近似模型（壳模型、Kirchhoff杆模型等），但曲线折叠折纸的全面且精确的动力学理论仍然缺失，这限制了对其他动力学行为的精确预测，尤其是对于宽面板的情况。在这项工作中，我们发展了一种精确的降维理论，专注于曲线折叠折纸的动力学，利用可展曲面的内在一维性质。如微分几何中众所周知，可展曲面上的曲线在等距约束下决定了局部标架和可展曲面的形状，使得问题本质上是一维的。从单个可展曲面出发，我们研究了运动可展曲面的运动学和动能。通过克服描述局部标架运动的困难，我们推导了仅由参考曲线运动描述的宽曲面的精确速度场，从而得到整个曲面的动能。弹性能遵循适用于宽面板的Wunderlich泛函。由于一维特性，由动能和弹性能组成的系统的拉格朗日量是参考曲线的泛函。因此，我们可以对拉格朗日量进行变分，并推导出参考曲线的非线性动力学理论，该理论包含类似于杆模型的控制方程，但能精确描述可展曲面的运动。该理论在拉格朗日和欧拉框架下得到一致验证，并进一步扩展到建模为耦合双杆系统的曲线折叠折纸。利用我们精确的一维模型，我们从理论上分析了各种可展结构的动力学行为，揭示了理论中曲率和扭转的耦合以及局部标架的运动导致了对任意变形可展曲面的精确建模，这通过有限元分析进行了定量验证。我们精确的降维动力学理论以相对较低的计算成本（由于是一维）准确捕捉了可展曲面和曲线折叠折纸（带有宽面板）的运动，为动态可展结构的设计提供了潜在贡献。

title: Flattening of tape-rings
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Tape-rings are a novel variation on standard tape-spring geometry, manufactured as a toroidal cap. We investigate the flattening behaviour of a tape-ring between two plates: which is shown to exhibit novel bending-stretching coupling. In particular, the change in Gaussian curvature causes tension along the outer edge and compression on the inside, which leads to circumferential buckling of the inner edge, or transverse buckling of the cross-section if axisymmetry is enforced. The flattened strains and flattening force are predicted via analytical solutions, which are shown to agree well with FEA results and physical experiments.
ai_text: Tape-rings是标准tape-spring几何形状的一种新颖变体，制造为环形帽。我们研究了一个tape-ring在两板之间的压平行为，这被证明展示了新颖的弯曲-拉伸耦合。特别是，高斯曲率的变化导致外边缘产生张力，内边缘产生压缩，这引起内边缘的周向屈曲，或者如果强制轴对称，则引起横截面的横向屈曲。通过解析解预测了压平应变和压平力，这些解与FEA结果和物理实验吻合良好。

title: Interphase-mediated buckling behavior of soft layered composites: Theoretical modelling and simulations
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Multi-layered composites consisting of stiff layers and soft matrices are ubiquitous in biological systems, geological formations, and flexible electronics. Capturing the buckling instability is crucial for understanding structural morphogenesis and functional performance. Owing to the manufacturing processes and interactions between dissimilar materials, a finite-thickness transitional region (i.e., an interphase) commonly exists between the stiff layers and the soft matrix. However, its role in regulating the buckling behavior of multi-layered composites remains insufficiently understood. In this work, a unified mechanics model is developed for periodically reinforced composites with stiff layers by explicitly incorporating the interphase, while simultaneously accounting for the interfacial shear stress and transverse displacements. The proposed model enables accurate predictions of the critical compressive strain and the associated wrinkling wavelength, and allows for a clear identification of three distinct instability modes: single-layer wrinkling, tri-layer wrinkling, and long-wave buckling. Through parametric analysis, buckling diagrams are constructed to elucidate how the elastic modulus and thickness of the interphase regulate mode selection and transitions. This work establishes the interphase as a regulator of buckling patterns in layered composites and provides a unified theoretical framework for understanding instability in soft layered systems.

title: Thermal-mechanical computational continua approach of composite structures
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: A thermal-mechanical computational continua ( C 2 ) approach is developed for the multiscale analysis of composite structures. The displacement and temperature fields are divided into macroscopic terms and periodic microscopic perturbations. Since the dimension of computational unit cells (CUCs) in the microscopic problem is identical to the macroscopic element size, the geometric scale effect is abandoned in the decomposition of displacement and temperature fields. The finite element method (FEM) is adopted to discretize both the macroscopic and microscopic problems, and their governing equations are deduced from the thermal-mechanical coupling constitutive relationship and variational principle. By transferring the nodal value functions derived from the microscopic problem to the macroscopic problem, the macroscopic effective constitutive relation is derived. In the numerical examples, the proposed method is applied to solve the thermal-mechanical coupling problem of a hexahedron with inclusions, and the results are in good agreement with those of direct numerical simulation (DNS). In addition, the multiscale thermal-mechanical coupling analysis is carried out for the unidirectional and braided composite laminated plates.
ai_text: 提出了一种热-力学计算连续体（C2）方法，用于复合材料结构的多尺度分析。位移场和温度场被分解为宏观项和周期性微观扰动。由于微观问题中计算单元胞（CUCs）的尺寸与宏观单元尺寸相同，因此在位移场和温度场的分解中放弃了几何尺度效应。采用有限元方法（FEM）对宏观和微观问题进行离散化，并从热-力学耦合本构关系和变分原理推导出它们的控制方程。通过将微观问题导出的节点值函数传递到宏观问题，推导出宏观有效本构关系。在数值算例中，所提方法被应用于求解含夹杂六面体的热-力学耦合问题，结果与直接数值模拟（DNS）结果吻合良好。此外，对单向和编织复合材料层合板进行了多尺度热-力学耦合分析。

title: Inverse differential quadrature based shell strong unified formulation for 3D stress analysis of composite shell structures
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Shell structures stand as one of the most efficient and widely adopted structural elements across mechanical, civil, and aerospace engineering, offering efficient load transfer through coupled in-plane and bending actions. When combined with fibre-reinforced polymer composites, their structural performance is enhanced by enabling tailored mechanical responses through material lay-up configurations. Due to the strong dependence of composite shell behaviour on the shell thickness-to-radius of curvature ratio, high-fidelity, tunable higher-order theories are essential to capture complex structural responses accurately. Simultaneously, robust numerical methods are needed to evaluate derivatives of the field variables precisely for enhanced stress, strain, and displacement predictions. To address these challenges, this study introduces a novel strong-form framework: SSUF-iDQM, by integrating variable order kinematics-based Shell Strong Unified Formulation (SSUF) with the Inverse Differential Quadrature Method (iDQM) that circumvents differentiation-induced errors in higher-order systems. The framework is further enhanced with a robust yet simple 3D stress-recovery scheme to reconstruct through-thickness interlaminar transverse stresses, capturing complex through-thickness behaviour like stress reversals in bending-dominated shells. Demonstrating its broad applicability, SSUF-iDQM is applied across spherical, cylindrical, and flat composite and sandwich structures. It exhibits excellent accuracy within error margins of 0.5% for spherical shells and 0.3% for cylindrical shells while using only 0.37% of the degrees of freedom of 3D finite element models. In soft-core sandwich shells, the stress-recovery yields errors as low as 0.01%, confirming its effectiveness. Free from thin-shell assumptions ( h / R ≪ 1 ), SSUF-iDQM remains effective for thin to thick shells and is adaptable for a wide range of mechanical theories and complex structural problems.
ai_text: 壳结构是机械、土木和航空航天工程中最有效且广泛采用的结构元件之一，通过耦合的面内和弯曲作用实现高效的载荷传递。当与纤维增强聚合物复合材料结合时，通过材料铺层配置实现定制的力学响应，从而增强其结构性能。由于复合材料壳行为强烈依赖于壳厚度与曲率半径之比，高保真、可调的高阶理论对于准确捕捉复杂结构响应至关重要。同时，需要稳健的数值方法来精确评估场变量的导数，以增强应力、应变和位移的预测。为应对这些挑战，本研究引入了一种新颖的强形式框架：SSUF-iDQM，通过将基于可变阶运动学的壳强统一公式（SSUF）与逆微分求积法（iDQM）相结合，避免了高阶系统中的微分诱导误差。该框架进一步通过一个稳健而简单的三维应力恢复方案得到增强，用于重构厚度方向层间横向应力，捕捉复杂的厚度方向行为，如弯曲主导壳中的应力反转。为展示其广泛适用性，SSUF-iDQM 被应用于球形、圆柱形和平板复合材料及夹层结构。它在球形壳中误差范围在0.5%以内，圆柱形壳中在0.3%以内，同时仅使用三维有限元模型自由度的0.37%，表现出优异的精度。在软芯夹层壳中，应力恢复产生的误差低至0.01%，证实了其有效性。无需薄壳假设（h / R ≪ 1），SSUF-iDQM 对薄壳到厚壳均保持有效，并适用于广泛的力学理论和复杂结构问题。

title: A spatiotemporal framework for strain gradient viscoelasticity: Thermodynamic derivation and numerical implementation
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The mechanical response of many advanced materials is governed by a complex interplay between microstructural size effects and time-dependent dissipative processes. Classical continuum theories are insufficient for these systems as they lack intrinsic length and time scales. This paper introduces strain gradient viscoelasticity (SGV) within the thermoviscoelastic framework, which is a higher-order continuum theory that provides a unified spatiotemporal framework linking spatial gradients to temporal evolution. We develop and validate two distinct numerical solution schemes: a robust mixed-field finite element method and a physics-informed neural networks framework, which naturally handles higher-order derivatives via automatic differentiation and manages the time integration through a recurrence time-stepping formula. Using the beam bending problem, we demonstrate that both numerical models show excellent agreement with analytical solutions. Then, by constructing spatiotemporal phase portraits, we visualize the coupled nature of the theory, demonstrating how microstructural features and viscosity fundamentally modulate the mechanical property. Furthermore, we demonstrate the potential applicability of SGV by showing its ability to characterize the multiscale viscoelasticity of biological tissues, resolving distinct relaxation times associated with both cellular and microstructural components. This study provides a theoretical and computational foundation for modeling advanced materials where scale and time evolution are inextricably linked.
ai_text: 许多先进材料的力学响应由微观结构尺寸效应和时间依赖性耗散过程之间的复杂相互作用所支配。经典连续介质理论对于这些系统来说是不充分的，因为它们缺乏固有的长度和时间尺度。本文在热粘弹性框架内引入了应变梯度粘弹性（SGV），这是一种高阶连续介质理论，提供了一个统一的时空框架，将空间梯度与时间演化联系起来。我们开发并验证了两种不同的数值求解方案：一种稳健的混合场有限元方法和一个物理信息神经网络框架，后者通过自动微分自然处理高阶导数，并通过递推时间步进公式管理时间积分。利用梁弯曲问题，我们证明了两种数值模型与解析解都表现出极好的一致性。然后，通过构建时空相图，我们可视化了该理论的耦合性质，展示了微观结构特征和粘度如何从根本上调节力学性能。此外，我们通过展示SGV表征生物组织多尺度粘弹性的能力，证明了其潜在适用性，解析了与细胞和微观结构组件相关的不同松弛时间。本研究为建模尺度与时间演化密不可分的先进材料提供了理论和计算基础。

title: Energy-based fracture criterion and interaction integral method for anti-plane cracks in nonhomogeneous micropolar materials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study extends both the maximum energy release rate criterion and the interaction integral (I-integral) method of linear elastic fracture mechanics (LEFM) within the framework of micropolar elasticity. The anti-plane fracture behavior of nonhomogeneous micropolar materials is systematically investigated. Through theoretical derivation, a closed-form expression is established to predict the crack kinking angles. This expression incorporates the influences of the nonlocal nature of material, micropolarity, along with the stress intensity factor (SIF) and couple-stress intensity factors (CSIFs). To accurately extract fracture parameters in nonhomogeneous micropolar materials with complex interfaces, a novel I-integral method is developed. This approach eliminates the need for calculating the derivatives of material properties and rigorously maintains domain-independence for material interfaces. By combining with the extended finite element method (XFEM), the numerical accuracy and domain-independence of the proposed I-Integral in anti-plane fracture problems are verified. Numerical studies reveal that the mode III SIF and the crack propagation angle are significantly influenced by the nonlocal nature of the material. Significant size-dependent behavior is observed, where the crack propagation angle gradually decreases as the specimen size increases. This trend confirms that the influence of non-locality weakens at larger scales, primarily attributed to the diminishing contribution of the local screwing mode (mode IV) and the local rolling mode (mode V) to the energy release rate. An increase in the internal characteristic length provides a shielding effect that suppresses microrotations, causing the crack propagation angle to asymptotically approach zero. Regarding functionally graded materials, gradients parallel to the crack direction significantly alter the crack trajectory by diminishing the tearing mode while enhancing the local rolling mode. Under pure mode III loading, the intensity factors (IFs) in particle-reinforced composites are strongly affected by particle size, location, and distribution patterns. Asymmetric particle distributions about the crack activate the local rolling mode, thereby inducing crack kinking.
ai_text: 本研究在微极弹性框架内扩展了线性弹性断裂力学（LEFM）的最大能量释放率准则和相互作用积分（I-积分）方法。系统研究了非均匀微极材料的反平面断裂行为。通过理论推导，建立了一个闭合形式表达式来预测裂纹转折角。该表达式包含了材料的非局部性、微极性以及应力强度因子（SIF）和偶应力强度因子（CSIFs）的影响。为了准确提取具有复杂界面的非均匀微极材料中的断裂参数，开发了一种新的I-积分方法。该方法消除了计算材料属性导数的需求，并严格保持了材料界面的域独立性。通过与扩展有限元法（XFEM）结合，验证了所提出的I-积分在反平面断裂问题中的数值精度和域独立性。数值研究表明，III型应力强度因子和裂纹扩展角显著受材料非局部性的影响。观察到显著的尺寸依赖性行为，即裂纹扩展角随着试样尺寸的增加而逐渐减小。这一趋势证实了非局部性在更大尺度上减弱，主要归因于局部螺旋模式（模式IV）和局部滚动模式（模式V）对能量释放率的贡献减小。内部特征长度的增加提供了屏蔽效应，抑制了微旋转，导致裂纹扩展角渐近趋近于零。关于功能梯度材料，平行于裂纹方向的梯度通过减弱撕裂模式同时增强局部滚动模式，显著改变了裂纹轨迹。在纯III型加载下，颗粒增强复合材料中的强度因子（IFs）强烈受颗粒尺寸、位置和分布模式的影响。关于裂纹的不对称颗粒分布激活了局部滚动模式，从而诱发裂纹转折。

title: A strain gradient elastodynamic phase field model for dynamic fracture in heterogeneous materials by multiscale asymptotic homogenization
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The macroscopic fracture strength and crack propagation behavior of heterogeneous materials are strongly governed by their underlying microstructures. When the characteristic scale of microstructures becomes comparable to that of the macroscopic structure, strain rate and strain gradient effects play a crucial role in dynamic fracture. In this work, we extend our recently proposed quasi-static strain gradient phase field model to the dynamic regime. The framework consistently integrates microstructural size, strain gradient, strain rate, and phase field evolution within a unified variational energy formulation, and provides mathematically consistent definitions of higher-order constitutive tensors without relying on empirical assumptions. A penalty-based computational strategy is adopted to ensure numerical efficiency while avoiding higher-order continuity requirements. Benchmark simulations demonstrate that the model accurately captures key features of dynamic fracture, including crack branching and propagation velocity, with excellent mesh objectivity. Applications to fiber-reinforced composites and porous materials further confirm the model’s capability to reproduce fracture anisotropy, porosity-dependent dynamic fracture behavior, and experimentally observed damage zones and free-surface velocity histories in spallation problems.
ai_text: 异质材料的宏观断裂强度和裂纹扩展行为强烈受其底层微观结构支配。当微观结构的特征尺度与宏观结构的特征尺度相当时，应变率和应变梯度效应在动态断裂中起关键作用。在这项工作中，我们将最近提出的准静态应变梯度相场模型扩展到动态领域。该框架在统一的变分能量公式中一致地整合了微观结构尺寸、应变梯度、应变率和相场演化，并提供了数学上一致的高阶本构张量定义，而不依赖于经验假设。采用基于罚函数的计算策略，以确保数值效率，同时避免高阶连续性要求。基准模拟表明，该模型准确捕捉了动态断裂的关键特征，包括裂纹分支和扩展速度，并具有优异的网格客观性。应用于纤维增强复合材料和多孔材料进一步证实了该模型能够再现断裂各向异性、孔隙率依赖的动态断裂行为，以及在层裂问题中实验观察到的损伤区和自由表面速度历史。

title: Extracting interfacial interactions using elastic field decomposition and a deep complex neural network
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Extracting the nonlinear interactions across interfaces for cohesive zone modeling has always been challenging, yet critically important. Experimentally, obtaining displacement fields near discontinuities can be difficult, and tractions must be inferred, subject to assumptions that cannot always be met. The inverse extraction of cohesive laws often relies on forward modeling via the finite element method, which can be computationally cumbersome, particularly when iterative procedures that require many simulations are used in the extraction process. In this paper, a complex-valued neural network with an embedded displacement field solver that enables elastic field decomposition is developed. Furthermore, this inverse approach requires a limited amount of far-field data. With the full-field solution provided by the neural network, the near-tip fracture behavior of the interface is extracted in terms of cohesive laws. Specifically, the pseudo-elastic field surrounding the nonlinear fracture process zone is constructed with complex potentials represented by Jacobi polynomials with unknown coefficients. Subsequently, known probing fields, the interactive J-integral, and the Maxwell-Betti reciprocal work theorem are used to construct equations to solve for the coefficients of the Jacobi polynomials, thereby enabling the extraction of cohesive laws. Following successful validation that employed analytically known fields, the robustness of the developed approach is demonstrated using experimental data collected from laminated beams with a range of interactions between them. The results confirm that interfacial interactions can be efficiently probed using elastic field decomposition, interactive integrals, and a deep complex neural network.
ai_text: 提取跨界面的非线性相互作用以用于内聚区建模一直具有挑战性，但至关重要。在实验上，获取不连续附近的位移场可能很困难，且牵引力必须基于假设来推断，这些假设并非总能满足。内聚定律的逆提取通常依赖于通过有限元方法进行正向建模，这可能计算繁琐，特别是在提取过程中使用需要多次模拟的迭代程序时。本文开发了一种复值神经网络，其嵌入了位移场求解器，能够实现弹性场分解。此外，这种逆方法仅需要有限的远场数据。利用神经网络提供的全场解，界面近尖端断裂行为以内聚定律的形式被提取出来。具体而言，围绕非线性断裂过程区的伪弹性场通过由未知系数的 Jacobi 多项式表示的复势构建。随后，利用已知探测场、交互 J 积分和 Maxwell-Betti 互易功定理构建方程来求解 Jacobi 多项式的系数，从而能够提取内聚定律。在成功使用解析已知场进行验证后，通过从具有一系列相互作用的层合梁收集的实验数据，证明了所开发方法的鲁棒性。结果证实，利用弹性场分解、交互积分和深度复神经网络，可以有效地探测界面相互作用。

title: Stress-induced coupling of electromigration and electrochemical corrosion
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In high-temperature and high-humidity environments, microelectronic chips are inevitably subjected to both electrochemical corrosion and electromigration. The coupling between electromigration and electrochemical corrosion, and how they contribute to the failure of microelectronic interconnects, remains poorly understood. This paper presents a unified phase-field model that incorporates the combined effects of electromigration and electrochemical corrosion, along with electro–thermo–mechanical factors such as stress corrosion cracking, Joule heating and stress-induced migration. Using this model, the evolution of semicircular and triangular notches in interconnects under electrical and mechanical loads is systematically studied. A comparative analysis under uniaxial tension and compression reveals that, under tensile loading, the failure rate due to crack propagation in the coupled model is significantly higher than the sum of the failure rates from pure electromigration and electrochemical corrosion. In contrast, under compressive loading, the failure rate in the coupled model is predominantly governed by electromigration. These findings reveal the key role of stress in regulating the coupling between the electromigration and electrochemical corrosion.
ai_text: 在高温高湿环境中，微电子芯片不可避免地同时受到电化学腐蚀和电迁移的影响。电迁移与电化学腐蚀之间的耦合，以及它们如何导致微电子互连失效，目前仍知之甚少。本文提出了一个统一的相场模型，该模型结合了电迁移和电化学腐蚀的联合效应，以及电-热-力学因素，如应力腐蚀开裂、焦耳热和应力诱导迁移。利用该模型，系统研究了互连中半圆形和三角形缺口在电和机械载荷下的演化。在单轴拉伸和压缩下的对比分析表明，在拉伸载荷下，耦合模型中由于裂纹扩展导致的失效率显著高于纯电迁移和电化学腐蚀失效率之和。相反，在压缩载荷下，耦合模型中的失效率主要由电迁移主导。这些发现揭示了应力在调节电迁移与电化学腐蚀之间耦合中的关键作用。

title: Path-following methods for phase-field simulation of quasi-static crack propagation
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The variational approach to fracture, particularly through its regularization as a phase-field model, has become a widely used tool for simulating the quasi-static propagation of cracks in structures. However, classic incremental loading can induce unstable crack growth, violating the quasi-static assumption, and in some cases, leads to a loss of force balance, preventing self-consistency and the estimation of dissipated energy during snapback instabilities. To address this challenge, path-following methods are investigated. Their aim is to adjust the applied load so that it stays at the propagation threshold, thereby preserving the quasi-static assumption and ensuring equilibrium solutions. In this work, we apply and evaluate multiple path-following methods within the framework of variational phase-field fracture models, which are developed to regularize linear elastic variational sharp crack evolution problems. Our study pursues two objectives. First, we review several existing path-following methods, with a focus on partitioned strategies based on the displacement field, which decouple the path-following control equation from the rest of the system, facilitating easier integration with staggered solvers. In addition, we introduce a new path-following method whose particularity is to limit the maximum strain increment outside the cracked regions. Second, we use the Γ -convergence to the sharp crack model to evaluate these methods across three crack propagation problems of increasing complexity. The comparison demonstrates that the proposed path-following method offers a simple yet highly effective approach to capture the equilibrium path in phase-field fracture simulations. This method robustly maintains the quasi-static assumption, ensuring physically meaningful results. By enabling accurate estimation of the energy dissipated during snapback instabilities, it paves the way for the rational design of more resistant heterogeneous materials.
ai_text: 变分断裂方法，特别是通过相场模型进行正则化后，已成为模拟结构中裂纹准静态扩展的广泛应用工具。然而，经典的增量加载可能诱发不稳定的裂纹扩展，违反准静态假设，并且在某些情况下会导致力平衡丧失，从而无法在回跳失稳期间保持自洽性并估算耗散能量。为应对这一挑战，本文研究了路径跟踪方法。其目的是调整所施加的载荷，使其保持在扩展阈值，从而维持准静态假设并确保平衡解。在本工作中，我们在变分相场断裂模型的框架内应用并评估了多种路径跟踪方法，这些模型是为正则化线弹性变分尖锐裂纹演化问题而发展的。我们的研究追求两个目标。首先，我们回顾了几种现有的路径跟踪方法，重点关注基于位移场的分区策略，该策略将路径跟踪控制方程与系统其余部分解耦，便于与交错求解器集成。此外，我们提出了一种新的路径跟踪方法，其特点在于限制裂纹区域外的最大应变增量。其次，我们利用对尖锐裂纹模型的Γ-收敛性，在三个复杂度递增的裂纹扩展问题上评估这些方法。比较结果表明，所提出的路径跟踪方法为捕捉相场断裂模拟中的平衡路径提供了一种简单而高效的方法。该方法鲁棒地保持了准静态假设，确保了物理上合理的结果。通过能够准确估算回跳失稳期间耗散的能量，它为合理设计更具抗力的异质材料铺平了道路。

title: Buckling of fully-connected lattices with load-induced boundary rotation imperfections
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Slender load-bearing elements in fully connected, joint-free lattices (mechanical metamaterials) develop load-induced rotational imperfections when deformation of adjacent members imposes evolving end rotations on otherwise straight columns. We distinguish these effects from pre-existing geometric imperfections and derive a closed-form nonlinear load–deflection solution for columns with prescribed boundary rotations, complemented by a semi-analytical approach incorporating column shortening. Nonlinear finite-element analyses validate the analytical predictions. Across five representative settings (force-, moment-, and distributed-load systems, architected interfaces, and interaction with pre-existing imperfections), we show that load-induced rotations can significantly reduce load-bearing capability. In a point-loaded two-column system, for instance, the critical force can decrease to 22% of the critical force of the equivalent pinned connected column. The results indicate that joint-free lattices with compliant surroundings may exhibit notable reductions in critical forces due to enforced boundary rotations and deformations of the connecting elements. The framework offers a practical basis for stability assessment of metamaterials and other fully connected structures, where boundary effects depend on the loading rather than being static initial imperfections.
ai_text: 在完全连接、无接头的晶格（机械超材料）中，细长承载元件会发展出载荷诱导的旋转缺陷，当相邻构件的变形对原本笔直的柱施加不断变化的端部旋转时。我们将这些效应与预先存在的几何缺陷区分开来，并推导出具有规定边界旋转的柱的闭合形式非线性载荷-挠度解，辅以包含柱缩短的半解析方法。非线性有限元分析验证了这些解析预测。在五种代表性设置（力载荷、力矩载荷和分布载荷系统、架构界面以及与预先存在缺陷的相互作用）中，我们表明载荷诱导的旋转可以显著降低承载能力。例如，在点载荷双柱系统中，临界力可以降低至等效铰接柱临界力的22%。结果表明，具有柔顺环境的无接头晶格可能由于强制的边界旋转和连接元件的变形而表现出临界力的显著降低。该框架为超材料和其他完全连接结构的稳定性评估提供了实用基础，其中边界效应取决于载荷，而不是静态的初始缺陷。

title: Manufacturable curved links as a route to reduce the Poisson’s ratio of auxetic lattice metamaterials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study demonstrates improved auxetic behavior through the use of curved links in ordered metamaterials. This new approach was shown to reduce the Poisson’s ratio by 0.2 across the whole elastic range, when compared to existing linear re-entrant auxetic structures. The design approach stemmed from observations of curved link auxetic behavior in crumpled structures. This indicated that the edge length per unit volume was dominant in reducing the Poisson’s ratio, rather than the re-entrant angle, as often claimed in the literature. To leverage this approach, curved link functions were integrated into re-entrant structures. A set of smooth functions were then assessed using the finite element method, and validated with a series of physical tests on 3D printed auxetic lattices. Increasing the edge length per unit volume from 7.8 m−2 to 8.8 m−2 was found to reduce the Poisson’s ratio by up to 0.3. The potential uses are broad; the 70% increase in the magnitude of the Poisson’s ratio strengthened material deformation and leads to improved capabilities within strain based design, with substantial potential for light weight impact bearing structures in sports, transport and medical applications.
ai_text: 本研究通过使用有序超材料中的弯曲连杆，展示了改进的拉胀行为。与现有的线性内凹拉胀结构相比，这种新方法在整个弹性范围内将泊松比降低了0.2。该设计方法源于对褶皱结构中弯曲连杆拉胀行为的观察。这表明，单位体积边缘长度在降低泊松比方面起主导作用，而非文献中常声称的内凹角。为了利用这种方法，弯曲连杆函数被集成到内凹结构中。然后，使用有限元方法评估了一组平滑函数，并通过一系列对3D打印拉胀晶格的物理测试进行了验证。研究发现，将单位体积边缘长度从7.8 m−2增加到8.8 m−2，可将泊松比降低多达0.3。潜在应用广泛；泊松比幅值增加70%增强了材料变形，并提高了基于应变的设计能力，在体育、交通和医疗应用中的轻质抗冲击结构方面具有巨大潜力。

title: A fluid–peridynamic structure model of deformation and damage of microchannels
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Soft-walled microchannels arise in many applications, ranging from organ-on-a-chip platforms to soft-robotic actuators. However, despite extensive research on their static and dynamic response, the potential failure of these devices has not been addressed. To this end, we explore fluid–structure interaction in microchannels whose compliant top wall is governed by a nonlocal mechanical theory capable of simulating both deformation and material failure. We develop a one-dimensional model by coupling viscous flow under the lubrication approximation to a state-based peridynamic formulation of an Euler–Bernoulli beam. The peridynamic formulation enables the wall to be modeled as a genuinely nonlocal beam, and the integral form of its equation of motion remains valid whether the deformation field is smooth or contains discontinuities. Through the proposed computational model, we explore the steady and time-dependent behaviors of this fluid–peridynamic structure interaction. We rationalize the wave and damping dynamics observed in the simulations through a dispersion (linearized) analysis of the coupled system, finding that, with increasing nonlocal influence, wave propagation exhibits a clear departure from classical behavior, characterized by a gradual suppression of the phase velocity. The main contribution of our study is to outline the potential failure scenarios of the microchannel’s soft wall under the hydrodynamic load of the flow. Specifically, we find a dividing curve in the space spanned by the dimensionless Strouhal number (quantifying unsteady inertia of the beam) and the compliance number (quantifying the strength of the fluid–structure coupling) separating scenarios of potential failure during transient conditions from potential failure at the steady load.
ai_text: 软壁微通道广泛应用于从芯片器官平台到软体机器人执行器等多个领域。然而，尽管对其静态和动态响应进行了广泛研究，这些设备的潜在失效尚未得到解决。为此，我们探索微通道中的流固耦合相互作用，其中柔性顶壁由一种能够模拟变形和材料失效的非局部力学理论控制。我们通过将润滑近似下的粘性流与基于状态的 Euler–Bernoulli 梁的 peridynamic 公式耦合，建立了一个一维模型。peridynamic 公式使得壁能够被建模为一个真正的非局部梁，并且其运动方程的积分形式无论变形场是光滑的还是包含不连续性都保持有效。通过所提出的计算模型，我们探索了这种流体-peridynamic 结构相互作用的稳态和时变行为。我们通过对耦合系统的色散（线性化）分析，解释了模拟中观察到的波和阻尼动力学，发现随着非局部影响的增加，波传播表现出明显偏离经典行为，其特征是相速度逐渐抑制。我们研究的主要贡献是概述了微通道软壁在流体动载荷下的潜在失效场景。具体而言，我们在由无量纲 Strouhal 数（量化梁的非定常惯性）和 compliance 数（量化流固耦合强度）张成的空间中，发现了一条分界线，将瞬态条件下的潜在失效场景与稳态载荷下的潜在失效场景分开。

title: Bending response and impact resistance of reinforced re-entrant honeycomb sandwich beams based on additive manufacturing
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Enhancing the impact resistance of re-entrant honeycomb structures by coupling different cell configurations is an effective design strategy. However, its efficacy for beam-type protective structures commonly in engineering applications remains unclear. To expand research on the dynamic response and energy absorption characteristics of hybrid structures, this paper combines Auxetic Re-entrant Honeycomb (ARH) with Star Re-entrant Honeycomb (SRH), and Star Enhanced Auxetic Re-entrant Honeycomb (S-ARH) was prepared through 3D printing. Three-point bending tests were performed on the S-ARH beam to evaluate static flexural behaviour. Furthermore, we investigated the dynamic responses under localized impacts using foam-aluminum projectile tests, combining theoretical models to quantify the energy absorption of S-ARH beams under various loads. The mechanism of the influence of cell wall thickness and panel mass distribution on impact response was studied by establishing a finite element model. The S-ARH beam exhibits a negative Poisson’s ratio effect (NPR) during the impact process, and the embedded star structure produces reinforcement, thereby increasing the damage threshold of the overall structure. Appropriate cell wall thickness and panel thickness can improve the impact resistance of sandwich beams. Furthermore, the deflection of the S-ARH beam is 22.6% and 34.3% lower than that of equal-weight traditional hexagonal honeycomb (THH) and ARH beams, respectively. The S-ARH is better at absorbing energy and protecting against impact. This study provides a theoretical reference for the design of impact-resistant sandwich beam structure.
ai_text: 通过耦合不同胞元构型来增强内凹蜂窝结构的抗冲击性是一种有效的设计策略。然而，其在工程应用中常见的梁型防护结构上的有效性尚不明确。为了扩展对混合结构动态响应和能量吸收特性的研究，本文将拉胀内凹蜂窝（ARH）与星形内凹蜂窝（SRH）相结合，并通过3D打印制备了星形增强拉胀内凹蜂窝（S-ARH）。对S-ARH梁进行了三点弯曲试验以评估静态弯曲行为。此外，我们使用泡沫铝弹丸试验研究了局部冲击下的动态响应，并结合理论模型量化了S-ARH梁在各种载荷下的能量吸收。通过建立有限元模型，研究了胞壁厚度和面板质量分布对冲击响应的影响机制。S-ARH梁在冲击过程中表现出负泊松比效应（NPR），嵌入的星形结构产生增强作用，从而提高了整体结构的损伤阈值。适当的胞壁厚度和面板厚度可以提高夹层梁的抗冲击性。此外，S-ARH梁的挠度分别比等重的传统六边形蜂窝（THH）和ARH梁低22.6%和34.3%。S-ARH在吸收能量和抗冲击保护方面表现更优。本研究为抗冲击夹层梁结构的设计提供了理论参考。

title: MPA-optimized conv-NPR honeycomb metamaterial: Multi-resonant coupling for low-freq broadband near-perfect absorption
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Low-frequency noise control in lightweight engineering structures remains a significant challenge, particularly constrained by the poor low-frequency absorption performance and excessive thickness of conventional porous materials. To overcome these limitations, this study develops a systematic methodology for designing broadband high-performance acoustic metamaterials based on a multi-resonant coupling mechanism. A hybrid design strategy is proposed by integrating conventional, semi-re-entrant, and fully re-entrant negative Poisson’s ratio honeycomb units with Helmholtz resonators, thereby constructing a novel Multi-phase composite Honeycomb-cored Acoustic Metamaterial (MHAM). The geometric parameters are optimized via a bio-inspired Marine Predators Algorithm (MPA). Theoretical modeling founded on acoustic impedance theory and finite element simulations demonstrates that the optimized structure achieves continuous high-efficiency sound absorption (α ≥ 0.9) over the 433 Hz to 610 Hz range, with simultaneous coverage of a 50% half-power bandwidth and a 36% high-efficiency bandwidth within the 200–800 Hz band. The broadband enhancement mechanism is attributed to the parallel coupling of multiple resonant units, which merges discrete absorption peaks into a continuous near-perfect absorption band. Experimental validation using an impedance tube shows excellent agreement with numerical predictions. Furthermore, a comprehensive parametric analysis clarifies how key geometric variables—cell height, panel thickness, core thickness, and pore diameters—independently control absorption characteristics, providing clear guidance for inverse design. This work establishes a versatile methodology for developing lightweight, stiff, and acoustically tunable honeycomb-cored metamaterials, offering a promising approach for integrated structural–acoustic design in noise-sensitive thin-walled applications.
ai_text: 轻质工程结构中的低频噪声控制仍然是一个重大挑战，尤其受限于传统多孔材料的低频吸声性能差和厚度过大。为了克服这些限制，本研究开发了一种基于多谐振耦合机制的宽带高性能声学超材料设计系统方法。提出了一种混合设计策略，通过将传统、半凹角和全凹角负泊松比蜂窝单元与Helmholtz共振器集成，从而构建了一种新型多相复合蜂窝芯声学超材料（MHAM）。几何参数通过仿生海洋捕食者算法（MPA）进行优化。基于声阻抗理论和有限元模拟的理论建模表明，优化后的结构在433 Hz至610 Hz范围内实现了连续高效吸声（α ≥ 0.9），同时在200–800 Hz频带内覆盖了50%的半功率带宽和36%的高效带宽。宽带增强机制归因于多个谐振单元的并联耦合，将离散的吸声峰合并为一个连续的近完美吸声带。使用阻抗管进行的实验验证显示与数值预测高度一致。此外，全面的参数分析阐明了关键几何变量——单元高度、面板厚度、芯层厚度和孔径——如何独立控制吸声特性，为逆向设计提供了明确指导。这项工作建立了一种多功能方法，用于开发轻质、刚性和声学可调的蜂窝芯超材料，为噪声敏感薄壁应用中的集成结构-声学设计提供了一种有前景的途径。

title: Deep indentation model of thin film: Theory, experiment and application
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Traditional atomic force microscopy (AFM) methods for measuring Young’s modulus of thin films require indentation depths below 10% of film thickness to avoid artifacts from surface roughness, tension, and contact-point uncertainty—limitations that can cause over tenfold variability in stiffness measurements [(Wu et al., 2018) Nat. Methods 15, 491–498]. Here, we introduce a deep indentation model that overcomes these constraints by incorporating finite film thickness and geometric nonlinear corrections in the normal direction. This framework enables reliable indentation depths up to 50% of film thickness, validated through experiments on polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS) thin films and finite element method (FEM) simulations, which confirm agreement in force-depth relationships and stress/strain distributions. Applied to nanomechanical profiling of 4T1 cells (mouse breast carcinoma), the model reduces stiffness uncertainty by more than ten times, compared to shallow-indentation approaches. Crucially, the method mitigates artifacts from contact-point misjudgment and surface roughness, offering a robust platform for characterizing thin materials. By bridging theoretical rigor with experimental practicality, this work redefines the limits of AFM-based mechanical analysis for ultrathin film systems.
ai_text: 传统原子力显微镜（AFM）方法测量薄膜杨氏模量时，要求压痕深度低于薄膜厚度的10%，以避免表面粗糙度、张力和接触点不确定性引起的伪影——这些限制可能导致刚度测量中出现超过十倍的变异性[(Wu et al., 2018) Nat. Methods 15, 491–498]。在此，我们提出了一种深压痕模型，通过纳入有限薄膜厚度和法向几何非线性修正，克服了这些限制。该框架使得可靠的压痕深度可达薄膜厚度的50%，并通过聚二甲基硅氧烷（PDMS）薄膜实验和有限元方法（FEM）模拟验证，确认了力-深度关系和应力/应变分布的一致性。应用于4T1细胞（小鼠乳腺癌）的纳米力学分析，该模型与浅压痕方法相比，将刚度不确定性降低了十倍以上。关键的是，该方法减轻了接触点误判和表面粗糙度引起的伪影，为表征薄材料提供了一个稳健的平台。通过将理论严谨性与实验实用性相结合，这项工作重新定义了基于AFM的超薄膜系统力学分析的极限。

title: Investigation of a novel space-filling polyhedral unit for construction applications
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The geometry of a construction element can have a significant impact on the mechanical performance of the designed assembly. This direct relation between the microstructure and mechanical properties is strongly manifested in the field of material engineering, structural design and technology of metamaterials. This work presents a unique, space filling octahedron, along with a number of interesting structures which can be assembled using this specific polyhedron. In particular, a 24-faces, space filling solid which resembles an adamantane cage and which enables the construction of diamond-like superstructures. The symmetry of the object ensures uniform spatial force redistribution in a stack and thus makes it a perfect candidate to design constructions exposed to demanding loads or damage. 3D printed models are experimentally examined. Furthermore, a new truss architecture, based on the space filling octahedron, is introduced and evaluated, both experimentally and computationally, in terms of its strength and stability. Moreover, the Young’s modulus of the materials and displacement of the structures are experimentally determined on a test stand.
ai_text: 构建单元的几何形状对设计组件的力学性能有显著影响。这种微观结构与力学性能之间的直接关系在材料工程、结构设计和超材料技术领域得到强烈体现。本工作提出了一种独特的空间填充八面体，以及一系列可以使用这种特定多面体组装的有趣结构。特别地，一种24面的空间填充固体，类似于金刚烷笼，能够构建类金刚石超结构。该物体的对称性确保了在堆叠中均匀的空间力重新分布，因此使其成为设计承受苛刻载荷或损伤的结构的理想候选。通过实验检验了3D打印模型。此外，基于空间填充八面体，引入了一种新的桁架架构，并通过实验和计算评估了其强度和稳定性。此外，在试验台上通过实验确定了材料的杨氏模量和结构的位移。

title: Effect of short-range ordering on cyclic deformation of N-containing austenitic High-Mn steels
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In order to help comprehend the influence of short-range ordering (SRO) on the cyclic deformation behavior of N-containing austenitic high-manganese (high-Mn) steels, and reveal the underlying micromechanisms governing their low-cyclic fatigue performance, a microstructure-based crystal plasticity constitutive model is developed in this work, which covers the key deformation mechanisms including the evolution of dislocation microstructure, dynamic annihilation of Cr-N SROs, and the coupling effect of backstress evolution. An innovative model of dislocation evolution is proposed to characterize the transformation between mobile and immobile dislocations driven by the accumulated plastic strain, capturing the rearrangement of dislocation substructures (e.g., from tangled dislocations to walls or cells) that affects cyclic hardening/softening. Additionally, a dynamic framework for SRO annihilation is established to quantify the process where repeated dislocation shearing induces the destruction of Cr-N SROs, forming “softening channels” that enhance cyclic softening. Moreover, the model incorporates the coupling effect of backstress evolution to characterize the cyclic responses influenced by interstitial N atoms, which promote the SRO formation and reduce stacking fault energy, thereby altering the dislocation slip modes (e.g., planar slip). To help validate the proposed constitutive equations, the cyclic deformation behaviors of polycrystalline 00 N (0 wt% N) and 21 N (0.21 wt% N) high-Mn steels, including the evolution of stress amplitude, hysteresis loops, and microstructural changes such as the decay of SRO density and dislocation rearrangement, are compared between the experimental data and theoretical results. A good agreement is achieved that can help verify the proposed theoretical model and facilitate the comprehension of the underlying deformation mechanisms.
ai_text: 为了帮助理解短程有序（SRO）对含氮奥氏体高锰钢循环变形行为的影响，并揭示其低周疲劳性能的微观机制，本研究开发了一种基于微观结构的晶体塑性本构模型，该模型涵盖了关键变形机制，包括位错微观结构的演化、Cr-N SROs的动态湮灭以及背应力演化的耦合效应。提出了一个创新的位错演化模型，以表征由累积塑性应变驱动的可动与不可动位错之间的转变，捕捉了影响循环硬化/软化的位错亚结构重排（例如，从缠结位错到壁或胞状结构）。此外，建立了SRO湮灭的动态框架，以量化重复位错剪切诱导Cr-N SROs破坏的过程，形成增强循环软化的“软化通道”。此外，该模型还包含了背应力演化的耦合效应，以表征受间隙氮原子影响的循环响应，这些氮原子促进SRO形成并降低堆垛层错能，从而改变位错滑移模式（例如，平面滑移）。为了验证所提出的本构方程，将多晶00 N（0 wt% N）和21 N（0.21 wt% N）高锰钢的循环变形行为，包括应力幅值、滞后回线的演化以及微观结构变化（如SRO密度衰减和位错重排），在实验数据和理论结果之间进行了比较。获得了良好的一致性，这有助于验证所提出的理论模型，并促进对潜在变形机制的理解。

title: Mechanical performance of equilateral triangular lattices: The role of nodal fillets
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Triangular lattices are widely employed for their high strength to weight ratios, yet their mechanical performance is sensitive to geometric features, particularly the nodal geometry. This study investigates the influence of nodal geometry on the mechanical behavior of equilateral triangular lattices across a broad range of relative densities using high fidelity finite element simulations. We characterize the elastic properties, and strength limits as functions of fillet radius. Our results confirm the expected trend that, in stretching-dominated lattices with low relative density, the introduction of fillets reduces both stiffness and buckling resistance. In contrast, at higher relative densities, filleted nodes can alter the load bearing mechanism and enhance both stiffness and structural stability. Across all ranges of relative density, fillets are effective in mitigating stress concentrations, resulting in notable improvements in yield strength. Optimal nodal configurations are identified, achieving up to 80% of the yield strength predicted by simple beam models that neglect nodal effects and effective stiffness values that approach or exceed the non filleted configuration. Finally, the results are synthesized into a design guideline for selecting the optimum fillet radius to enhance the strength of equilateral triangular lattices, and serving as a quick and practical tool for researchers and engineers to identify the best nodal configuration.
ai_text: 三角形点阵因其高比强度而被广泛应用，但其力学性能对几何特征，特别是节点几何形状，十分敏感。本研究通过高保真有限元模拟，探究了在较宽相对密度范围内节点几何形状对等边三角形点阵力学行为的影响。我们表征了弹性性能与强度极限随圆角半径的变化规律。结果证实了预期的趋势：在低相对密度的拉伸主导点阵中，引入圆角会同时降低刚度和抗屈曲能力。相反，在较高相对密度下，带有圆角的节点可以改变承载机制，从而增强刚度和结构稳定性。在所有相对密度范围内，圆角都能有效缓解应力集中，使屈服强度得到显著提升。研究确定了最优的节点构型，其屈服强度可达忽略节点效应的简单梁模型预测值的80%，且有效刚度值接近或超过无圆角构型。最后，研究结果被整合成一条设计准则，用于选择最佳圆角半径以增强等边三角形点阵的强度，为研究人员和工程师快速、实用地确定最佳节点构型提供了工具。

title: Atomistic insights on the shear properties of the Diamond/SiC interface
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Diamond and silicon carbide (SiC) exhibit excellent mechanical, electrical and thermal properties, which is ideal for thermal management in advanced electronics. This study employs large-scale molecular dynamics simulations to investigate the shear properties and failure mechanisms at the nano-diamond (ND)/SiC interface. The interface characterized by the formation of C-C sp3 bonds, exhibits a brittle failure feature. It is found that higher strain rates increase shear strength marginally, while higher temperatures result in a reduced shear strength. Interestingly, the residual stress is found to oscillate after fracture, which is attributed to the free vibration of the SiC region. Additionally, empirical potentials are found to exert profound effects on the interfacial bonding and failure patterns. These insights provide critical guidance for designing high-performance diamond/SiC composites for advanced electronics.
ai_text: 金刚石和碳化硅（SiC）展现出优异的机械、电学和热学性能，这使其成为先进电子器件中热管理的理想材料。本研究采用大规模分子动力学模拟，以研究纳米金刚石（ND）/SiC界面的剪切性能和失效机制。该界面以形成C-C sp3键为特征，表现出脆性失效特性。研究发现，较高的应变率会略微提高剪切强度，而较高的温度则导致剪切强度降低。有趣的是，残余应力在断裂后被发现会振荡，这归因于SiC区域的自由振动。此外，经验势函数被发现对界面结合和失效模式产生深远影响。这些见解为设计用于先进电子器件的高性能金刚石/SiC复合材料提供了关键指导。

title: Seismic damage prediction in concrete gravity dams using a new framework based on Machine learning
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In this study, a comprehensive machine learning-based framework is presented for predicting seismic damage levels in concrete gravity dams in five different classes. The main objective of this study was to evaluate the impact of Feature Engineering approach compared to the traditional Feature Selection method on the performance of classification and ensemble learning models. For this purpose, optimal intensity measures (IMs) are used as input features, and a Global Damage Index ( D I G ), defined based on area-weighted local damage indices, is used as the output variable. The damage index data are obtained through nonlinear finite element analysis using Abaqus software. The main innovation in this research is the generation of a new composite feature from the intelligent combination of three optimal features (ASI, Tm and SED) that enhances the ability of the models to extract hidden patterns. The results show that the use of the new composite feature has significantly improved the performance of all the models studied in key evaluation criteria such as Accuracy, Precision, Recall, Specificity, F1-Score and AUC. This improvement was especially significant for models such as KNN and XGBoost, which had poorer performance in the feature selection approach. Finally, the feature engineering approach resulted in stable and reliable performance in all models and enabled them to best classify intermediate damage classes. This framework can be used as an efficient tool for pre-earthquake crisis management and prediction of overt and even covert damage in infrastructure structures.
ai_text: 本研究提出了一种基于机器学习的综合框架，用于预测混凝土重力坝的五种不同地震损伤等级。本研究的主要目的是评估特征工程方法与传统特征选择方法相比，对分类和集成学习模型性能的影响。为此，采用最优强度指标作为输入特征，并采用基于面积加权局部损伤指数定义的全局损伤指数（D I G）作为输出变量。损伤指数数据通过使用Abaqus软件进行非线性有限元分析获得。本研究的主要创新在于，通过智能组合三个最优特征（ASI、Tm和SED）生成了一个新的复合特征，增强了模型提取隐藏模式的能力。结果表明，新复合特征的使用显著提升了所有研究模型在准确率、精确率、召回率、特异性、F1分数和AUC等关键评估指标上的性能。这一改进对于KNN和XGBoost等在特征选择方法中表现较差的模型尤为显著。最终，特征工程方法使所有模型获得了稳定可靠的性能，并使其能够最佳地分类中间损伤等级。该框架可作为震前危机管理和预测基础设施结构显性乃至隐性损伤的有效工具。

title: Impact dynamics of three-dimensional horseshoe microstructure lattice under indentation deformation
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Owing to its exceptional flexibility, designability, and capacity to mitigate peak impact forces, horseshoe microstructure lattice has shown great potential for personal protection. However, considering the geometric diversity of impactors in practical applications, lattice structures may exhibit distinct indentation deformation under impact, which could significantly affect their energy absorption capacity. To address this, in the present paper, the dynamic response of three-dimensional horseshoe microstructure lattice (THML) under indentation deformation was investigated, with the indentation geometry being primarily governed by the configuration of projectile. Based on the deformation modes of single beams, a theoretical model was developed to predict the energy absorption capacities of the THML under indentation deformation. It is revealed that under impact loading, the beams undergo severe fracture, with fracture strain exhibits a positive correlation with arc angle, indicating enhanced flexibility at larger curvatures. Furthermore, THML exhibits two distinct deformation stages, the first stage mainly involves indentation deformation, followed by uniform compression stage. For THML with small arc angles, the external energy was primarily absorbed through indentation deformation. Furthermore, the energy absorption mechanisms of THML is significantly influenced by indentation geometry. Compared to pyramidal indentations, the THML under spherical indentations exhibits superior energy absorption capacity via beam compression. Moreover, as the maximum indentation depth increases, energy absorbed by beam tension in THML is progressively enhanced, whereas the reaction force exhibits a corresponding reduction.
ai_text: 由于其卓越的柔韧性、可设计性和减轻峰值冲击力的能力，马蹄形微结构晶格在个人防护方面显示出巨大潜力。然而，考虑到实际应用中冲击物的几何多样性，晶格结构在冲击下可能表现出不同的压痕变形，这可能显著影响其能量吸收能力。为了解决这个问题，本文研究了三维马蹄形微结构晶格（THML）在压痕变形下的动态响应，其中压痕几何主要由抛射物的构型决定。基于单梁的变形模式，建立了一个理论模型来预测THML在压痕变形下的能量吸收能力。研究表明，在冲击载荷下，梁发生严重断裂，断裂应变与弧角呈正相关，表明在较大曲率下柔韧性增强。此外，THML表现出两个不同的变形阶段，第一阶段主要涉及压痕变形，随后是均匀压缩阶段。对于小弧角的THML，外部能量主要通过压痕变形吸收。此外，THML的能量吸收机制受压痕几何形状的显著影响。与金字塔形压痕相比，球形压痕下的THML通过梁压缩表现出更优的能量吸收能力。此外，随着最大压痕深度的增加，THML中梁拉伸吸收的能量逐渐增强，而反作用力则相应减小。

title: Modeling and simulation of dipped textile cords: Investigating the role of glue in bending response
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This work proposes a mesoscopic finite element modeling approach that captures the mechanical effects of glue coatings in textile cords. The main contributions include the development of a novel contour selection algorithm tailored for textile cables and the implementation of 3D constraints based on a stiffness formulation that accounts for the geometry of the adhesive layer between filaments. The model has been applied to the case study of three-point bending of dipped textile cords. It demonstrates a good agreement with experimental results, marking a significant step forward in the simulation of textile cords. Different glue configurations have been explored by varying the stiffness and penetration depth of the adhesive. The results highlight the stiffening effect of the glue on the bending response of the cord. Additionally, the study also shows a link between the glue coating and the frictional energy dissipated in the cord, and it offers insights into how the adhesive layer deforms.
ai_text: 本研究提出了一种介观有限元建模方法，用于捕捉纺织绳中胶涂层的力学效应。主要贡献包括开发了一种针对纺织缆的新型轮廓选择算法，以及基于考虑纤维间粘合剂层几何形状的刚度公式实现三维约束。该模型已应用于浸渍纺织绳的三点弯曲案例研究。结果表明与实验结果吻合良好，标志着纺织绳模拟的重要进展。通过改变粘合剂的刚度和渗透深度，探索了不同的胶配置。结果突出了胶对绳弯曲响应的硬化效应。此外，研究还显示了胶涂层与绳中耗散的摩擦能量之间的联系，并提供了关于粘合剂层如何变形的见解。

title: Mesoscopic mechanism of dynamic crack propagation and branching of pipe under internal detonation loading
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: In nuclear, chemical, and transportation industries, dynamic crack propagation and branching of pipelines may be triggered by accidental internal explosions. From the mesoscopic perspective, this is the result of microvoids nucleation and evolution in the region ahead of crack tips. However, macroscopic damage models fail to capture the detailed evolution of microvoids, and the underlying mesoscopic mechanism of dynamic fracture remains unclear. To bridge this knowledge gap, the Gurson-Tvergaard-Needleman (GTN) mesoscopic damage model was incorporated into the Johnson-Cook thermo-viscoplastic constitutive model to reveal the mesoscopic mechanism of dynamic crack propagation and branching. The fluid-structure interaction between internal detonation wave and pipe was achieved using the immersed boundary method (IBM) and softened contact algorithm. Results demonstrated that the developed model effectively described void nucleation, growth and void volume fraction (VVF) evolution. The increase of VVF at the main crack tip was primarily governed by void nucleation (VVFN). Conversely, at the branched crack tip, it was mainly driven by void growth (VVFG). Results further revealed that the simultaneous occurrence of void nucleation and growth at the crack tips led to following straight crack propagation. In contrast, crack branching developed when void growth occurred after the void nucleation had reached 55%-70% of its peak value. In this case, the crack branching angle was consistent with the direction of both the maximum VVFG and strain rate in the region ahead of crack tip. The study provides new insights into the mesoscopic mechanism of dynamic crack propagation of pipe due to internal explosive loading.
ai_text: 在核能、化工和运输行业中，管道动态裂纹扩展和分叉可能由意外内部爆炸引发。从细观角度来看，这是裂纹尖端前方区域微孔洞成核和演化的结果。然而，宏观损伤模型无法捕捉微孔洞的详细演化，动态断裂的潜在细观机制仍不清楚。为了填补这一知识空白，将Gurson-Tvergaard-Needleman（GTN）细观损伤模型纳入Johnson-Cook热粘塑性本构模型，以揭示动态裂纹扩展和分叉的细观机制。内部爆轰波与管道之间的流固耦合通过浸没边界法（IBM）和软化接触算法实现。结果表明，所开发的模型有效地描述了孔隙成核、生长和孔隙体积分数（VVF）的演化。在主裂纹尖端，VVF的增加主要由孔隙成核（VVFN）主导。相反，在分叉裂纹尖端，它主要由孔隙生长（VVFG）驱动。结果进一步揭示，裂纹尖端孔隙成核和生长的同时发生导致后续的直线裂纹扩展。相比之下，当孔隙成核达到其峰值55%-70%后发生孔隙生长时，裂纹分叉发展。在这种情况下，裂纹分叉角与裂纹尖端前方区域最大VVFG和应变率的方向一致。该研究为内部爆炸载荷下管道动态裂纹扩展的细观机制提供了新的见解。

title: Theoretical and numerical analysis of arbitrarily shaped planar cracks in 2D hexagonal piezoelectric quasicrystals
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study provides a comprehensive theoretical and numerical analysis of arbitrarily shaped planar cracks in two-dimensional (2D) hexagonal piezoelectric quasicrystals (PQCs). The theoretical framework is established based on Fabrikant’s analysis method and the hypersingular integral equation method, through which conventional boundary integral equations are transformed into hypersingular forms. This formulation enables an analysis of the asymptotic singularity behavior induced by coupled electrical-phonon-phason fields, and the corresponding singular solutions are derived. Building on this analysis, the extended stress intensity factors are expressed, and their relationships with the energy release rate are established. To support the theoretical results, a numerical scheme based on the extended displacement discontinuity (EDD) boundary element method is developed. The crack is discretized into triangular elements, and the associated fundamental solutions are constructed applying the principle of linear superposition. The validity and effectiveness of the proposed numerical approach are demonstrated through representative numerical examples. The results show that this present method can effectively predict the behavior of arbitrarily shaped planar cracks in 2D hexagonal PQCs, offering a robust framework for fracture analysis in PQCs under multi-field coupling conditions.
ai_text: 本研究对二维六方压电准晶体（PQCs）中任意形状平面裂纹进行了全面的理论和数值分析。理论框架基于 Fabrikant 分析方法和超奇异积分方程方法建立，通过这些方法，常规边界积分方程被转化为超奇异形式。该公式使得分析由耦合电-声子-相位子场引起的渐近奇异性行为成为可能，并推导了相应的奇异解。基于此分析，表达了扩展应力强度因子，并建立了它们与能量释放率之间的关系。为了支持理论结果，开发了一种基于扩展位移不连续性（EDD）边界元方法的数值方案。裂纹被离散为三角形单元，并应用线性叠加原理构建了相关的基本解。通过代表性数值算例，验证了所提数值方法的有效性和效率。结果表明，本方法能有效预测二维六方压电准晶体中任意形状平面裂纹的行为，为多场耦合条件下压电准晶体的断裂分析提供了一个稳健的框架。

title: Mixed-mode traction–separation laws for crystalline UHMWPE interphases derived from molecular dynamics
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) simulations were performed to develop Mode II and mixed-mode traction–separation laws for crystalline ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene (UHMWPE) interphases formed between rotated crystal planes. Interphases were constructed by bringing together free (100) and (010) crystal surfaces with relative in-plane rotations ranging from 0° to 150°. Full three-dimensional traction–separation relations, including normal, transverse shear, and axial shear components, were obtained under proportional mixed-mode loading at prescribed displacement angles. Peak traction, critical separation, and fracture energy were extracted from the MD responses and used to construct mixed-mode failure envelopes. Interphases formed between misaligned crystal planes exhibited reductions of up to 75% in peak shear traction and 77% in energy absorption relative to the perfect crystal interface. The MD-derived traction laws were subsequently fitted to the Park–Paulino–Roesler cohesive zone model to determine characteristic parameters and assess coupling between deformation modes. The results reveal strong anisotropic coupling between normal and transverse shear components and weaker coupling involving axial shear, demonstrating limitations of scalar effective shear formulations for representing crystalline interphases.
ai_text: 进行了分子动力学（MD）模拟，以开发旋转晶面之间形成的结晶超高分子量聚乙烯（UHMWPE）界面相的II型和混合模式牵引-分离定律。界面相通过将自由（100）和（010）晶面以相对面内旋转从0°到150°的范围结合在一起而构建。在规定的位移角度下，通过比例混合模式加载，获得了完整的三维牵引-分离关系，包括法向、横向剪切和轴向剪切分量。从MD响应中提取了峰值牵引力、临界分离和断裂能，并用于构建混合模式失效包络线。相对于完美晶体界面，错位晶面之间形成的界面相在峰值剪切牵引力上减少了高达75%，在能量吸收上减少了77%。随后，将MD导出的牵引定律拟合到Park–Paulino–Roesler内聚区模型，以确定特征参数并评估变形模式之间的耦合。结果揭示了法向和横向剪切分量之间的强各向异性耦合，以及涉及轴向剪切的较弱耦合，证明了标量有效剪切公式在表示结晶界面相时的局限性。

title: Shearing rigid–soft granular mixtures: Intrinsic micro–meso signatures underlying critical-state strength
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study numerically investigates the large-strain shearing behaviour of rigid–soft granular mixtures, with particular emphasis on the combined effects of rigid-grain shape and soft-grain fraction. A coupled mesh-free continuum–discrete framework is employed to perform simple shear tests on mixtures composed of polygonal rigid grains, ranging from angular pentagons to rounded discs, and deformable inclusions with varying content. Macroscopically, the critical-state stress ratio decreases with increasing soft-grain fraction for angular-grain packings, whereas this effect progressively weakens with decreasing grain angularity, and vanishes for disc-based assemblies. Micromechanical analysis indicates that this behaviour is governed by the competition between the opposite dependencies of contact orientation anisotropy and tangential force anisotropy on soft-grain fraction. Furthermore, a mesoscale cell-based tessellation is adopted to indicate that, in all systems, the evolution of the mean cell elongation and mean cell stress ratio mirrors the corresponding macroscopic stress response. This approach reveals the universal features of cell statistics in rigid–soft granular systems, with cell order distributions following a theoretically derived exponential decay, and normalised cell stress ratio distributions collapsing onto a single Weibull distribution. These insights establish a direct link between micro- and mesoscale self-organisation and macroscopic material strength for understanding and modelling rigid–soft granular mixtures.
ai_text: 本研究通过数值模拟研究刚软颗粒混合物的大应变剪切行为，重点关注刚性颗粒形状与软颗粒含量共同产生的影响。采用一种耦合的无网格连续-离散框架，对由多边形刚性颗粒（从角形五边形到圆形盘片）及不同含量的可变形夹杂物组成的混合物进行简单剪切试验。宏观上，对于角形颗粒堆积，临界状态应力比随软颗粒含量增加而降低；但随着颗粒棱角性减弱，该效应逐渐减弱，并在盘状颗粒组构中消失。微观力学分析表明，该行为受接触取向各向异性与切向力各向异性对软颗粒含量相反依赖关系之间的竞争所主导。此外，采用一种基于中尺度单元的镶嵌法表明，在所有系统中，平均单元伸长率与平均单元应力比的演化均反映了相应的宏观应力响应。该方法揭示了刚软颗粒系统中单元统计的普遍特征：单元阶数分布遵循理论推导的指数衰减规律，归一化的单元应力比分布则收敛于单一的 Weibull 分布。这些认识建立了微观与中尺度自组织与宏观材料强度之间的直接联系，有助于理解和模拟刚软颗粒混合物。

title: Inverse prediction and data augmentation of concrete failure behavior under high impact loads based on physics-consistent machine learning
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: The inverse prediction of concrete failure behavior under high impact loads is a critical challenge in impact dynamics, where traditional empirical, theoretical, and numerical methods face significant limitations. Machine learning provides a promising alternative due to its strong nonlinear fitting capability. However, the scarcity of concrete failure data hinders the robustness and generalization of these models. To address this challenge, a data augmentation method named Uncertainty-Quantified Physics-Informed Generative Adversarial Network (UQ-PIGAN) and a data-driven inverse prediction model are developed. Traditional theoretical models are integrated into the data augmentation model as constraints. The inherent uncertainty of these physical models is quantified to prevent theoretical errors from misleading the training of neural network. Experimental results demonstrate that UQ-PIGAN efficiently generates synthetic data with high physical consistency. The augmented datasets significantly improve the performance and generalization of machine learning models. Furthermore, the inverse prediction model trained on these datasets exhibits excellent accuracy and physical reliability, providing an effective way of disaster reconstruction.
ai_text: 高冲击载荷下混凝土破坏行为的逆预测是冲击动力学中的一个关键挑战，传统的经验、理论和数值方法面临显著限制。机器学习因其强大的非线性拟合能力提供了一个有前景的替代方案。然而，混凝土破坏数据的稀缺性阻碍了这些模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。为了解决这一挑战，开发了一种名为不确定性量化物理信息生成对抗网络（UQ-PIGAN）的数据增强方法和一个数据驱动的逆预测模型。传统理论模型作为约束集成到数据增强模型中。这些物理模型的固有不确定性被量化，以防止理论误差误导神经网络的训练。实验结果表明，UQ-PIGAN 高效地生成了具有高物理一致性的合成数据。增强的数据集显著提高了机器学习模型的性能和泛化能力。此外，在这些数据集上训练的逆预测模型表现出优异的准确性和物理可靠性，为灾害重建提供了一种有效方法。

title: A hyperelastic constitutive model for compressible particle-reinforced neo-Hookean elastomers with interphases at finite deformation
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper presents systematic model framework based on micromechanics to characterize the macroscopic response of compressible particle-reinforced composites with multilayered interphases under finite deformations. For the sake of simplicity, all constituent phases of the composites are modeled as neo-Hookean hyperelastic materials with different material properties in this framework. Based on the analysis of numerical homogenization results, we introduce a constitutive closure hypothesis where the macroscopic constitutive response of the composites is postulated to retain the functional form of their individual constituent phases. On this basis, the classical composite-sphere model and three-phase model are respectively generalized to predict the effective material parameters of the proposed model, namely the effective shear modulus μ ¯ and the effective bulk modulus k ¯ . To assess the performance of the developed constitutive model, a comprehensive series of numerical simulations are conducted. Specifically, the effects of particle volume fraction, interphase thickness, interphase-to-matrix stiffness ratio, number of interphase layers and various loading conditions on the macroscopic response of the composites are first investigated under incompressible conditions, followed by a detailed discussion on the compressible hyperelastic behaviors of the composites. The predictions of the macroscopic constitutive model are in excellent agreement with the numerical homogenization results across all considered cases. Finally, validation against experimental data reported in the literature further verifies the applicability and effectiveness of the proposed model.
ai_text: 本文提出了一种基于细观力学的系统模型框架，用于表征有限变形下具有多层界面的可压缩颗粒增强复合材料的宏观响应。为简化起见，该框架中复合材料的所有组成相均被建模为具有不同材料属性的neo-Hookean超弹性材料。基于对数值均匀化结果的分析，我们引入了一个本构闭合假设，即假定复合材料的宏观本构响应保持其各组成相本构关系的函数形式。在此基础上，分别推广了经典的复合球模型和三相模型，以预测所提出模型的有效材料参数，即有效剪切模量μ̄和有效体积模量k̄。为评估所建立本构模型的性能，我们进行了一系列全面的数值模拟。具体而言，首先在不可压缩条件下研究了颗粒体积分数、界面厚度、界面与基体刚度比、界面层数以及各种加载条件对复合材料宏观响应的影响，随后详细讨论了复合材料的可压缩超弹性行为。在所有考虑的情况下，宏观本构模型的预测结果与数值均匀化结果均吻合良好。最后，通过与文献中报道的实验数据进行对比验证，进一步证实了所提出模型的适用性和有效性。

title: Extension of scaled boundary finite element method for delamination simulations in laminated composites under three-dimensional framework
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This work investigates a three-dimensional (3D) Scaled Boundary Finite Element Method (SBFEM) based framework for simulating progressive interlaminar crack growth in laminated composites. A 3D formulation enables modelling of complex geometries with irregular crack fronts. The methodology employs zero-thickness cohesive elements to accurately represent the interlaminar interfaces. Several benchmark case studies were performed, including both pure-mode and mixed-mode fracture, encompassing cases where the crack front undergoes shape variations during crack propagation. The case studies were validated against experimental results and results obtained from other simulation techniques, such as conventional finite element method or analytical models, demonstrating a strong correlation among them. A key novelty of SBFEM explored in this paper is ability to decouple surface and volume discretization. This allows the framework a much higher flexibility in terms of meshing architectures and significantly reduces the number of degrees of freedom (DOFs) needed to accurately solve the problem. It also allows for straightforward local mesh refinement of surfaces in critical regions, such as adjacent to cohesive zone elements. The paper concludes with a discussion of the potential of the proposed approach in advancing the understanding and analysis of fracture phenomena in laminated composites.
ai_text: 本研究探讨了一种基于三维（3D）比例边界有限元法（SBFEM）的框架，用于模拟层合复合材料中的渐进层间裂纹扩展。三维公式使得能够建模具有不规则裂纹前缘的复杂几何形状。该方法采用零厚度内聚单元来准确表示层间界面。进行了多个基准案例研究，包括纯模态和混合模态断裂，涵盖了裂纹前缘在裂纹扩展过程中发生形状变化的情况。这些案例研究通过实验结果和其他模拟技术（如传统有限元法或解析模型）获得的结果进行了验证，显示出它们之间的强相关性。本文探讨的 SBFEM 的一个关键新颖之处是能够解耦表面和体积离散化。这使得框架在网格架构方面具有更高的灵活性，并显著减少了准确解决问题所需的自由度（DOFs）数量。它还允许在关键区域（如邻近内聚区单元的区域）对表面进行直接的局部网格细化。本文最后讨论了所提出方法在促进对层合复合材料断裂现象的理解和分析方面的潜力。

title: An anisotropic damage model for the mechanical and chemo-mechanical coupling behaviors of double-network hydrogels
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Double-network (DN) hydrogels exhibit outstanding mechanical properties, yet they display complex behaviors such as necking and stress softening under large deformations. To date, constitutive models have rarely been applied to simultaneously describe both the mechanical responses and the chemo–mechanical coupling behaviors, especially when additional factors, such as deformation modes, are considered. In this work, an anisotropic damage model is developed. For a highly heterogeneous filler network, both the chain length distribution and the orientation distribution of polymer chains are considered. In addition, a non-affine micro–macro mapping, combining the classical eight-chain model with the affine full-network model, is adopted, which is the key to accurately characterizing the degree of anisotropy. The progressive damage of material is captured through the evolution of the probability density–chain length distribution. Moreover, the model incorporates the post-damage swelling behavior of DN gels by analyzing the stress equilibrium and chemical potential equilibrium. The developed model captures various mechanical/chemo-mechanical responses well, including stress softening under various deformation modes and stretch ratio levels, the reloading stress along different directions, and the anisotropic swelling behavior. For several essential indicators, i.e., the directional modulus reduction factor, the directional energy dissipation factor, and the swelling anisotropy factor, the model predictions are in good agreement with the experimental results. The ability of the developed model to predict both mechanical and chemo-mechanical coupling behaviors provides critical insights for the rational design and practical application of DN gels.
ai_text: 双网络（DN）水凝胶表现出优异的力学性能，但在大变形下会显示复杂的行为，如颈缩和应力软化。迄今为止，本构模型很少被用于同时描述力学响应和化学-力学耦合行为，尤其是在考虑额外因素（如变形模式）时。在这项工作中，开发了一个各向异性损伤模型。针对高度异质的填料网络，考虑了聚合物链的链长分布和取向分布。此外，采用了一种非仿射微-宏观映射，结合了经典的八链模型和仿射全网络模型，这是准确表征各向异性程度的关键。材料的渐进损伤通过概率密度-链长分布的演化来捕捉。此外，该模型通过分析应力平衡和化学势平衡，纳入了DN凝胶的损伤后溶胀行为。所开发的模型很好地捕捉了各种力学/化学-力学响应，包括不同变形模式和拉伸比水平下的应力软化、沿不同方向的再加载应力以及各向异性溶胀行为。对于几个关键指标，即方向模量降低因子、方向能量耗散因子和溶胀各向异性因子，模型预测与实验结果吻合良好。所开发模型预测力学和化学-力学耦合行为的能力，为DN凝胶的合理设计和实际应用提供了关键见解。

title: Tunable viscoelasticity in phase-separated soft materials
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: Multiple glass transitions and relaxation processes in phase-separated polymeric materials enable a pronounced combination of resilient and dissipative mechanical properties at small to large strains. Inspired by the phase-separated morphology widely found in block copolymers and thermoplastic elastomers, we design, 3D-print and test heterogeneous soft materials that exhibit distinct glass transitions. To this end, we utilize the Cahn-Hilliard framework to generate microstructures exhibiting diverse connectivity features. Our 3D-printed heterogeneous materials comprising thermoplastic and rubbery components demonstrate that the viscoelastic features associated with energy storage and dissipation are finely tunable through the subdomain connectivity.

title: Digital programming of deformation and energy absorption in TPMS metamaterials via binary image encoding
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study presents a programmable design methodology for triply periodic minimal surface (TPMS) metamaterials that integrates negative Poisson’s ratio (NPR) and positive Poisson’s ratio (PPR) unit cells via binary image encoding. By spatially arranging NPR and PPR architectures within a digital matrix, the mechanical properties—including stiffness, energy absorption, and deformation behavior—can be precisely tailored to target specifications. Experimental and numerical analyses demonstrate that the PPR‑reinforced NPR configuration increases the elastic modulus by 247% (307.7 ± 21.2 MPa) while achieving a specific energy absorption of 12.2 ± 0.8 J/g. The binary encoding framework enables programmable control of Poisson’s ratio (−0.8 to 0.38), bending angle α (6°–25°), and shear angle θ (9°–36°). This work establishes a proof-of-concept programmable design strategy for tailoring the mechanical performance and deformation behaviors of CLP-Gyroid hybrid TPMS systems, and the proposed strategy advances metamaterial development in energy absorption engineering and adaptive deformation systems.
ai_text: 本研究提出了一种可编程设计方法，用于三周期极小曲面（TPMS）超材料，该方法通过二进制图像编码集成负泊松比（NPR）和正泊松比（PPR）单元。通过在数字矩阵中空间排列NPR和PPR结构，力学性能——包括刚度、能量吸收和变形行为——可以精确地定制到目标规格。实验和数值分析表明，PPR增强的NPR构型将弹性模量提高了247%（307.7 ± 21.2 MPa），同时实现了12.2 ± 0.8 J/g的比能量吸收。二进制编码框架实现了对泊松比（−0.8到0.38）、弯曲角α（6°–25°）和剪切角θ（9°–36°）的可编程控制。这项工作建立了一种概念验证的可编程设计策略，用于定制CLP-Gyroid混合TPMS系统的力学性能和变形行为，并且所提出的策略推动了能量吸收工程和自适应变形系统中超材料的发展。

title: Buckling behavior of 3D-printed Beetle Elytron-inspired cellular structures with regular and auxetic honeycomb cores: Experimental and numerical study
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This study investigates the in-plane buckling behavior of bio-inspired cellular structures, focusing on regular (HBEP) and inverted (IHBEP) Honeycomb Beetle Elytron Plate designs and benchmarking them against their conventional honeycomb (HP) and inverted honeycomb (IHP) counterparts. The combined effects of Beetle Elytron-inspired trabeculae and auxetic cell walls are examined for the first time using a coupled experimental–numerical approach based on 3D-printed specimens and nonlinear Riks simulations. Experiments show that HBEP and IHBEP cores significantly increase the critical buckling loads compared to conventional honeycombs. In sandwich panels, the improvement is less pronounced due to the dominant structural role of the facesheets. Notably, BEP-inspired designs delay local facesheet instabilities and mitigate facesheet–core interface fracture in the post-buckling regime. A factorial numerical design of experiments highlights the interaction between facesheet and cell-wall slenderness, showing that the highest performance gains of IHBEP over IHP are achieved with thin facesheets and thick cell walls. In addition, IHBEP promotes a transition toward global buckling, reducing failure risks such as facesheet–core interface damage. Finally, empirical regression models are proposed to efficiently predict the critical buckling loads, providing a practical design tool across a wide range of configurations.
ai_text: 本研究研究了仿生蜂窝结构的面内屈曲行为，重点关注规则（HBEP）和倒置（IHBEP）蜂窝甲虫鞘翅板设计，并以传统蜂窝（HP）和倒置蜂窝（IHP）为基准进行比较。首次通过基于3D打印试样和非线性Riks模拟的耦合实验-数值方法，研究了甲虫鞘翅启发的骨小梁和负泊松比胞壁的联合效应。实验表明，与传统蜂窝相比，HBEP和IHBEP芯层显著提高了临界屈曲载荷。在夹层板中，由于面板的主导结构作用，改进不那么明显。值得注意的是，BEP启发的设计延迟了局部面板失稳，并减轻了后屈曲阶段的面板-芯层界面断裂。因子数值实验设计突出了面板和胞壁细长度之间的相互作用，表明IHBEP相对于IHP的最高性能增益是通过薄面板和厚胞壁实现的。此外，IHBEP促进了向整体屈曲的转变，减少了如面板-芯层界面损伤等失效风险。最后，提出了经验回归模型，以有效预测临界屈曲载荷，为广泛配置提供了实用的设计工具。

title: On the direct determination of the right stretch tensor and the admissible region of its principal invariants
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper addresses the admissible domains and visualization of deformation and stretch tensors along with their principal scalar invariants. A unified framework is presented for both compressible and incompressible materials, with particular emphasis on the invariant-based characterization of the stretch tensor, defined as the square root of the right Cauchy–Green deformation tensor. Existing approaches for the direct computation of the stretch tensor are reviewed, including formulations that provide explicit expressions in terms of its scalar invariants. Consequently, determining these invariants becomes essential. Available procedures for their computation are examined, leading to quartic equations associated with the first and second scalar invariants. The relationships between the invariants of the deformation and stretch tensors are further explored from a geometric perspective. The admissible invariant domains associated with the square root of the right Cauchy–Green tensor are characterized graphically, enabling an unambiguous selection of the physically relevant roots of the governing quartic equations. By exploiting the concept of attainable domains, the admissible region corresponding to the selected solution — represented in the plane spanned by the first and second scalar invariants of the stretch tensor — is visualized. The proposed approach also results in the definition of a closed attainable region, which facilitates the systematic analysis and visualization of invariant-based quantities, such as principal stretches and strain energy density functions, over the entire admissible domain.
ai_text: 本文探讨变形张量和拉伸张量及其主标量不变量的容许域和可视化。提出了一个适用于可压缩和不可压缩材料的统一框架，特别强调基于不变量的拉伸张量表征，该张量定义为右 Cauchy–Green 变形张量的平方根。回顾了直接计算拉伸张量的现有方法，包括基于其标量不变量的显式表达式。因此，确定这些不变量变得至关重要。检查了计算这些不变量的可用程序，导出了与第一和第二标量不变量相关的四次方程。从几何角度进一步探讨了变形张量和拉伸张量不变量之间的关系。以图形方式表征了与右 Cauchy–Green 张量平方根相关的容许不变量域，从而能够明确选择控制四次方程的物理相关根。通过利用可达域的概念，可视化了对应于所选解的容许区域，该区域在由拉伸张量的第一和第二标量不变量张成的平面中表示。所提出的方法还定义了一个封闭的可达区域，便于在整个容许域上系统分析和可视化基于不变量的量，如主拉伸和应变能密度函数。

title: A time spectral numerical manifold method for efficient elastodynamic analysis
journal: International Journal of Solids and Structures
abstract: This paper proposes a hybrid numerical framework that integrates the spectral integration technique into the numerical manifold method for accurate and efficient elastodynamic analysis. Based on Gaussian quadrature and orthogonal polynomial expansions, the solution accuracy can be systematically improved with an increase in the number of Gaussian points, and in principle, arbitrary-order temporal discretization accuracy can be achieved. A major strength of this approach lies in overcoming strict time step limitations, thus ensuring high accuracy and stability even with coarse temporal discretization. Spatial discretization of the dynamic equilibrium equation is performed within the numerical manifold method, where the dual cover system decouples the mathematical cover from the physical boundaries, offering superior flexibility in addressing problems with complex geometries. A series of benchmark examples involving transient loading and complex geometries are investigated. The results verify the applicability of the proposed method under diverse mechanical conditions, demonstrate its superior performance in terms of solution accuracy and computational cost, and thus confirm it as a competitive alternative for elastodynamic analysis.
ai_text: 本文提出了一种混合数值框架，将谱积分技术集成到数值流形方法中，用于准确高效的弹性动力学分析。基于高斯积分和正交多项式展开，解算精度可以随着高斯点数量的增加而系统性地提高，并且原则上可以实现任意阶时间离散精度。该方法的一个主要优势在于克服严格的时间步长限制，从而即使在粗时间离散下也能确保高精度和稳定性。动态平衡方程的空间离散在数值流形方法内进行，其中双重覆盖系统将数学覆盖与物理边界解耦，为处理复杂几何形状问题提供了卓越的灵活性。研究了一系列涉及瞬态加载和复杂几何形状的基准算例。结果验证了所提方法在不同力学条件下的适用性，展示了其在解算精度和计算成本方面的优越性能，从而确认其作为弹性动力学分析的一个有竞争力的替代方案。
